body:
With fundamental rights and freedoms under attack here in Texas and
throughout the country, especially now that Trump’s Republicans will soon
have a majority in the House of Representatives, it’s important that we
continue to do all we can to meet this challenge.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20221122.C1CmZQ&refcode=ema20221122-217552&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=217552%2E444211%2E-B_Edd ]Please join me and Amy in donating today to return Raphael Warnock to
the United States Senate. His runoff election is only a couple of weeks
away, and early voting begins soon. Let’s make sure he has the resources
he needs to reach the voters that must turn out if he’s going to win.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20221122.C1CmZQ&refcode=ema20221122-217552&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=217552%2E444211%2E-B_Edd ]Contribute $3

And because we have a long-term opportunity to build upon the organizing
and voter recruitment work we've done in Texas, part of each contribution
will go to funding voter registration in the lone star state to ensure

Thank you for answering the call to help keep champions for democracy in
office and to ensure we elect more of them in future elections.

Sincerely,

Beto O’Rourke

Friend, this is exciting: We're just two weeks away from our runoff election on Dec. 6 – and we just launched a brand-new TV ad to make sure the people of Georgia know who I am and what I'm fighting for in the Senate.
You'd think that Herschel Walker would _also_ want to explain what he stands for. But instead, he repeats the same lies – trying to distract from the fact that he's not ready to represent Georgia. But I know if I stay focused on the issues that matter to Georgia families, we'll make voters' choice at the ballot box clear – and we'll win this race. So that's what I intend to do.
**And for the record, I _love_ puppies. (You'll have to watch the ad to understand that part!)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54979971/380271417/-1936314725?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5222-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmRhZDhlOS1jYTZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hxrskCKYhWrC9x3uUgLyYHuBRRdKXgPfUnsXdB6YlP8=)

name: Herschel
subject: Looking for you to go the extra mile
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I can’t remember ever losing an overtime game in my football career.
|
---
Friend,

**This is it.**

We're in overtime. The crowd is cheering, and the lights are bright.

name: Roger Stone
subject: Who really killed JFk?
body:
| |
---
**59th Anniversary of JFK Assassination**
---
| [](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=zlno5eivn2d1ma1zyp&linkid=0&link=82cd5fe514e040ea957f2cc7b0259144) **GET YOUR SIGNED COPY OF THE MAN WHO KILLED KENNEDY: THE CASE AGAINST LBJ** **Political veteran Roger Stone uses eye-witness evidence, fingerprint evidence, and deep Texas politics to make a compelling case that Vice President Lyndon Baines Johnson orchestrated the murder of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy so that LBJ would not be dropped from the ticket and prosecuted for epic corruption.** Stone's heavily documented book paints an appalling picture of LBJ as an abusive, ambitious, manipulating liar with an actual history of murdering those who might reveal his corruption or the blatant voter fraud that he used to get to national power. Roger Stone reveals how LBJ was the drum major of a carefully planned plot in which the CIA, Organized Crime, FBI, Big Texas Oil, and LBJ's Texas-based confederates including the Dallas County Sheriff's Office, the Dallas City Police and the Secret Service, luring John F. Kennedy to Texas and insisting on the deadly route through Dealy Plaza. Stone establishes LBJ's motive, means and opportunity to orchestrate Kennedy's murder and uses solid evidence to tie convicted murderer and long-time Johnson hit man Malcolm 'Mac' Wallace to the sixth floor of the Texas School Book Depository and John F. Kennedy's murder on November 22, 1963. Stone reveals how LBJ ordered the murder of at least 17 men, according to White House Aide Clif Carter, to cover-up voter-fraud and corruption. "_LBJ would order a murder the way you or I would order a ham sandwich_ ," said Stone. Stone reveals the plans of syndicated columnist Drew Pearson, who had written a story accusing LBJ of bribery in a $7 billion dollar jet fighter contract doled out to Texas firm General Dynamics. Bobby Baker associate Don Reynolds, in testimony on the morning of the assassination, detailed Baker carrying a suitcase containing $100,000 to LBJ in payment for steering the contract to the Fort Worth company. The story with details of the sweetheart deal were to hit newsstands and 700 newspapers November 24, 1963. Instead, it was spiked after LBJ became President. Stone outlines how Attorney General Robert Kennedy intended to prosecute LBJ for corruption in both the Bobby Baker and Billie Sol Estes cases. Johnson knew he was being dropped for the 1964 Democratic ticket and his federal prosecution were both imminent. Stone establishes that LBJ authorized the false flag attack on the USS ship Liberty by the Israeli air force in a military operation designed to provide a pretext for war with Egypt. 34 American servicemen were killed on Johnson's orders. Stone reveals Johnson even found a way to desecrate the USS Sequoia, a presidential yacht that serviced Presidents from Herbert Hoover to Jimmy Carter, with masturbatory excess: "_Lyndon Johnson would put a film projector on this table and come up here and watch stag movies_ ," said boat owner Gary Silversmith, "_reportedly in a robe and in his underwear so he was relaxed and alone, and they would sail to Mount Vernon_." Stone names names, identifying at least three illegitimate children fathered by LBJ while President or Vice President and revealing Johnson's simultaneous sexual affairs with five women in the White House Secretarial pool. Stone outlines how LBJ stole $1 billion in Gold bullion from the US Government, had the gold flown to the LBJ ranch and then later to Canada for smelting. Stone also documents Johnson's daughters unloading the gold on the International market after LBJ's death. Stone tells the compelling tale of the Vietnam war profiteering of Lyndon and Lady Bird Johnson. He exposes their stock ownership in defense contractors who benefited from multi-million dollar contracts that were part of Johnson's escalation of the Vietnam war. Stone even outlines how contracts for military helicopters with one company, Kaman, were abruptly canceled and re-award to Bell Helicopter where the Johnson's owned stock, just days after LBJ became President. Stone exposes Johnson and his right hand man Bobby Baker's ownership of a San Juan abortion clinic and affiliated Capital Hill Travel Agency. Pregnant women seeking an illegal abortion could purchase a "_Weekend Holiday Package_ " that included their round-trip flight, abortion and hotel room. Stone exposes how Johnson learned about and canceled a military plane ordered by Vice President Humbert Humphrey that was to fly a Boston brain surgeon from Boston to Los Angeles in attempt to save the wounded Robert F. Kennedy's life. "_Is he dead yet? Is he dead yet?_ " Johnson barked, when informed of Kennedy's condition. The hardcover edition of _The Man Who Killed Kennedy - the Case Against LBJ_ reached number 15 on the New York Times bestseller list. The new updated paperback edition greatly expands the case against the most evil and mentally unbalanced man to ever occupy the White House. **Order Your Signed Collectors Copy Autographed by Roger Stone** **Order Your Copy****NOW****:** [](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=zlno5eivn2d1ma1zyp&linkid=1&link=d62cb0db6f8a4bd79f017d8d76231feb)
**[https://stonezone.com/product/the-man-who-killed-kennedy-the-case-against-lbj-signed-paperback/](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=zlno5eivn2d1ma1zyp&linkid=2&link=8eded470c184409e87987e399309f798)**
---

| [ [View in Browser](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/view?sid=zlno5eivn2d1ma1zyp) ] [ [Forward to a Friend](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/forward?sid=zlno5eivn2d1ma1zyp) ] [ [Unsubscribe](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/unsub?sid=zlno5eivn2d1ma1zyp&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) ] [ [Report Spam](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/unsol?sid=zlno5eivn2d1ma1zyp&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) ] Email Marketing by [ [DirectIQ ] ](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=zlno5eivn2d1ma1zyp&linkid=8&link=https://www.DirectIQ.com?utm_source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_content=3027935&utm_campaign=)
---

subject: The left HATES Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
| |
---
| | | It's turkey time, Peter!

That's right. For most people (normal people), Thanksgiving is a time to rejoice, spend time with friends and family and commemorate how the settlers and native Americans put their differences aside to share a meal together.

---
| | [STAND UP FOR AMERICAN HISTORY ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938797:6WT0sCGNM:m:1:3317145305:63984710E8A17573DDD175E2862A28B7:r)
---

**_But not to the woke left._** To these people, Thanksgiving is just another excuse to trash the history of our nation and engage in the lowest form of Anti-American bigotry.
Thanksgiving is "racist," they tell us.

Did the settlers bravely cross the ocean to establish a new home in what would become the greatest country the world has ever seen? _No, no, no, the pilgrims were nothing but privileged "white supremacists." _

**_In other words, Thanksgiving is now canceled. _**
---
| | | [UNCANCEL THANKSGIVING ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938798:6WT0sCGNM:m:1:3317145305:63984710E8A17573DDD175E2862A28B7:r)
---
The effort to erase America's history and culture is now mainstream in our nation's schools.
**Thankfully, conservatives like Governor Ron DeSantis are leading the charge against woke indoctrination in schools. **
Fighting identity politics and revisionist history in schools is no small task.

**_[Top state Republicans like Governor DeSantis NEED your support in this PIVOTAL battle for our nation's future.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938798:6WT0sCGNM:m:1:3317145305:63984710E8A17573DDD175E2862A28B7:r "Top state
Republicans like Governor DeSantis NEED your support in this PIVOTAL battle for our nation's future.")_** If you want the next generation to be able to celebrate Thanksgiving, you need to step up IMMEDIATELY.

---
| | [SECURE AMERICA'S FUTURE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938798:6WT0sCGNM:m:1:3317145305:63984710E8A17573DDD175E2862A28B7:r)
---

name: Rep. Alex Mooney
subject: OFFICIALLY LAUNCHED:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mooney for Senate, Inc
body:
This is how we take back the Senate.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61940123:6PbiTCG2N:m:1:3331421248:CE57992DF79C10B1BCA609F4398A651B:r)
---
Peter,
---
With the Democrats clinging to the narrowest of Senate majorities, our path to retaking the upper chamber in 2024 runs through West Virginia.
---
Assuming we win in Georgia, we'll only need to win this 1 seat to retake the Senate majority, and President Trump carried our great state by a whooping 39 percentage points in 2020!
---
_**We can 't let a red state like West Virginia continue to be represented by a liberal like Joe Manchin who's empowering the most radical, far-Left administration in American history. **_
---
That's why I'm officially launching my campaign for U.S. Senate. Now, I need your help to FIRE Manchin and take back the Senate for President Trump!
---
**[Please make a contribution to become a Founding Member of my U.S. Senate campaign to FIRE Joe Manchin and FLIP West Virginia's Senate seat to the Republicans.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61940123:6PbiTCG2N:m:1:3331421248:CE57992DF79C10B1BCA609F4398A651B:r)**
---

---

---

[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61940126:6PbiTCG2N:m:1:3331421248:CE57992DF79C10B1BCA609F4398A651B:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61940127:6PbiTCG2N:m:1:3331421248:CE57992DF79C10B1BCA609F4398A651B:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61940128:6PbiTCG2N:m:1:3331421248:CE57992DF79C10B1BCA609F4398A651B:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61940123:6PbiTCG2N:m:1:3331421248:CE57992DF79C10B1BCA609F4398A651B:r)
---

Joe Manchin wants you to believe he's a moderate who's willing to stand up to Joe Biden.
---
_But when push comes to shove, he sells out._
---
**His words and empty promises are just a pathetic attempt to cover up his efforts to empower Biden 's liberal agenda. **
---
He doesn't have the guts to stand up to his own party and do what's right for the people of West Virginia.
---
_**[CONTRIBUTE TO FIRE MANCHIN>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61940123:6PbiTCG2N:m:1:3331421248:CE57992DF79C10B1BCA609F4398A651B:r)**_.
---
Unlike Manchin, I'll always put you first, Peter.
---
In my hotly contested congressional primary against a liberal Republican, I won President Trump's endorsement last year because I'm a proud America First conservative with a proven track record of fighting for election integrity, defeating socialism, supporting the Second Amendment, and defending our shared conservative values.
---
I'll bring that exact same agenda to the Senate, where I'll work with my colleagues to defend your freedom, lower inflation, secure our border, and get our country back on track.
---
**But make no mistake: firing a well-entrenched liberal career politician like Manchin isn 't going to be easy, even in deep-red West Virginia. **
---
Biden and his allies in the swamp are already gearing up to spend MILLIONS to try and get Manchin reelected.

clean_body: This is how we take back the Senate. | Peter, With the Democrats clinging to the narrowest of Senate majorities, our path to retaking the upper chamber in 2024 runs through West Virginia. Assuming we win in Georgia, we'll only need to win this 1 seat to retake the Senate majority, and President Trump carried our great state by a whooping 39 percentage points in 2020! We can 't let a red state like West Virginia continue to be represented by a liberal like Joe Manchin who's empowering the most radical, far-Left administration in American history. That's why I'm officially launching my campaign for U.S. Senate. Now, I need your help to FIRE Manchin and take back the Senate for President Trump! Joe Manchin wants you to believe he's a moderate who's willing to stand up to Joe Biden. But when push comes to shove, he sells out. His words and empty promises are just a pathetic attempt to cover up his efforts to empower Biden 's liberal agenda. He doesn't have the guts to stand up to his own party and do what's right for the people of West Virginia. . Unlike Manchin, I'll always put you first, Peter. In my hotly contested congressional primary against a liberal Republican, I won President Trump's endorsement last year because I'm a proud America First conservative with a proven track record of fighting for election integrity, defeating socialism, supporting the Second Amendment, and defending our shared conservative values. I'll bring that exact same agenda to the Senate, where I'll work with my colleagues to defend your freedom, lower inflation, secure our border, and get our country back on track. But make no mistake: firing a well-entrenched liberal career politician like Manchin isn 't going to be easy, even in deep-red West Virginia. Biden and his allies in the swamp are already gearing up to spend MILLIONS to try and get Manchin reelected. There 's no time to waste. To FLIP this critical Senate seat, I'm going to need an army of grassroots, America First conservatives fighting by my side. I hope I can count on you to step up and join my team. Thank you, Rep. name: David Horowitz
subject: Top 20 Hollywood Liberal Degenerates
body:
If you’ve turned on your TV any time in the past 5 years, you’ve seen the liberal insanity that spews from the Hollywood elite. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0164%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=7XiuXe4ZFUV72Adee1gCmQ&sysid=1)
| | | Dear friend, If you’ve turned on your TV any time in the past 5 years, you’ve seen the liberal insanity that spews from the Hollywood elite. For all their glamorous parading on red carpets, and their self-righteous posturing about social justice, Tinseltown is teeming with _permanently damaged children_ , _spoiled brats_ , and _liberal degenerates_. I’m sick and tired of these virtue-signaling narcissists being given a megaphone by the mainstream media who ask _no questions_ about their blatant hatemongering. _So, I came up with a solution:_
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41679%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O5qmaf9BYZvMsXZAc1HXJg&sysid=1)
---
Since these Hollywood liberals only care about filling their mansions with pointless awards and trophies, why don’t I give them the award they _truly_ deserve. **The distinguished honor of being one of the _20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers_.** In fact, I even put this list in a new pamphlet the Freedom Center just published, and I want you to have a copy of it so you can read it for yourself. **[Friend, if you donate $10 or more to the Freedom Center today, I will you send you a complimentary copy of _The 20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers_. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41670%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VdU95UvYKQ7qPSIXmkjQbA&sysid=1)**
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zetp9tl48gvnebjumqps529tcqee7r0949vj8kao_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4cdh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9o21i12ac7cj3jfsb4grjk22o4gefet2hra8180_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4cdh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zer69qk3vgb3pghueq3o2ccf2lk1ojac4hc3700o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4cdh2bs)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**

subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi9i0n6lh6erstkcopg28dd8qcn3k5vqvopa9t20_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4chh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zft6ivq5tjqqkn0lpqllnj3c7kr01kuoi1gos5d8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4chh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdoi0fnll7vpcks6bfv4is5qbfp9uh13sosu8j6o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4chh2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc06cl1ijfc00ej4kbld2hqsv8baknjtdhosslug_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4chh2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqslpfgs8hho8aj4kntqkbaelrcrja0m4d8sn6j8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4chh2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zogl91hoqb800ovpma8s1ukk0okm8odi18bce7h8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4chh2bs)

name: Cindy Cerquitella
subject: I have a secret. Promise not to tell
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941070:6z7w8CGkN:m:1:3374627611:9A8B32C72A64171038C9E8FCCD592C8B:r)

Hello Peter,

I have a secret to tell you -- just make sure to keep it from the radical Left.

Here it is: **America 's Future has spies inside their organizations. **

And we have people working behind enemy lines in companies like CNN, Google, and TikTok.

My name is Cindy Cerquitella, executive director at America's Future (AF). AF helps young professionals to become effective, lifelong advocates who inspire others to embrace freedom.

You see, America's Future members are young, liberty-minded professionals working to build a freer culture in America.

**And they need your support, Peter.** That's why I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters before the end of the week.

[_**Can you support a student today by chipping in just $25, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941070:6z7w8CGkN:m:1:3374627611:9A8B32C72A64171038C9E8FCCD592C8B:r)

Many popular conservative and libertarian writers you hear about today were often AF members when they were younger. But that's not all.

**AF members may live across the country and work in different sectors, but they all have one goal in mind: continuing the fight for liberty.**

AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming.

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce.

**America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists. **

We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs.

Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term.

[_**Support a young professional today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941070:6z7w8CGkN:m:1:3374627611:9A8B32C72A64171038C9E8FCCD592C8B:r)

By building up lifelong advocates, supporting young leaders, and building robust communities that believe in freedom, America's Future can turn the tide where it matters most.

These brave liberty activists who work behind enemy lines all started at the same point as our new members. But thanks to generous supporters like you, they have moved into leadership positions where they can make a change.

Peter, can you invest in the future of America by supporting an AF member? **Click below to send your gift and help us reach our goal.**

body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941078:Jcd78CGNn:m:1:3374012347:D92BF98AA47BF39D3B2E9AA16845332E:r)

Hello Peter,

I have a secret to tell you -- just make sure to keep it from the radical Left.

Here it is: **America 's Future has spies inside their organizations. **

And we have people working behind enemy lines in companies like CNN, Google, and TikTok.

My name is Cindy Cerquitella, executive director at America's Future (AF). AF helps young professionals to become effective, lifelong advocates who inspire others to embrace freedom.

You see, America's Future members are young, liberty-minded professionals working to build a freer culture in America.

**And they need your support, Peter.** That's why I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters before the end of the week.

[_**Can you support a student today by chipping in just $25, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941078:Jcd78CGNn:m:1:3374012347:D92BF98AA47BF39D3B2E9AA16845332E:r)

Many popular conservative and libertarian writers you hear about today were often AF members when they were younger. But that's not all.

**AF members may live across the country and work in different sectors, but they all have one goal in mind: continuing the fight for liberty.**

AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming.

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce.

**America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists. **

We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs.

Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term.

[_**Support a young professional today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941078:Jcd78CGNn:m:1:3374012347:D92BF98AA47BF39D3B2E9AA16845332E:r)

By building up lifelong advocates, supporting young leaders, and building robust communities that believe in freedom, America's Future can turn the tide where it matters most.

These brave liberty activists who work behind enemy lines all started at the same point as our new members. But thanks to generous supporters like you, they have moved into leadership positions where they can make a change.

Peter, can you invest in the future of America by supporting an AF member? **Click below to send your gift and help us reach our goal.**

By building up lifelong advocates, supporting young leaders, and building robust communities that believe in freedom, America's Future can turn the tide where it matters most. name: GOP Presidential
subject: Revealed: Plan to Transform America
body:
Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy?
| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...
From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvhkm17783sae0rclck680jv85r5shrt4sb7mff8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g62o76c1h2bs) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she’s discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ could affect you – and find out what it means for your money.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbehfv30vqukr70h388hmdfoh8p24k0gjstj9cko_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g62o76c1h2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrper6tmepimdvsit7g69qsp1cqg47mf0o1g0j0o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g62o76c1h2bs)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Join the fight to protect the unborn
body:
I’m writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn. An
|
---
| | Hi Friend,

This is Dr. Ben Carson--I'm writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn.** And today I need your help.**

Right now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the Supreme Court's decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice democrats and major media outlets to codify on-demand abortion at taxpayers' expense.

**We cannot allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that abortion should be unrestricted.**

Today I'd like to ask you to join thousands of others who believe the sanctity of life is worth defending by adding your name to the pledge I have linked below:

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/sign-pro-life-statement/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zihg3dkseaougbcf46bpc09t2m1mjvjjmqh4pqj0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj1chh2bs)**

I will do everything in my power to defend every American life and stop the spread of the Left's anti-life ideology. [**Will you take one minute to stand with me by signing this pledge now?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqd6rh0gq0p8pt2qmcv3filu7e7s7jjq23csn9do_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj1chh2bs)

I'd like to thank you for joining this critical effort. Together, we can save thousands of lives from abortion over the next year. Gratefully,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4gjg7dj4ra5e6kkuaa45avquvfdaht0p4atrj9g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4c9h2bs)

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgju5p6mb3gpc5lkeio8kf9kn6j5i0op8plfv330_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4c9h2bs)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zquvt74k1akscltesn8b697n4ffafe5vaaq084og_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4c9h2bs)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z97b791q7d4gt8no8nr6n191b2iv87epacd41h58_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4c9h2bs)

| | | Dear Fellow Conservative, We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... [**That’s why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation of $35 or more today.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zknjj09n5joqrr0iohicstas6gn5dtuh2frs6s9g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4s1h2bs) We recently filed suit against a school AND the activists pretending to be teachers to make them pay for what they’re doing to our young and vulnerable children. Because the ONLY way we’re going to stop them -- is to make these extremists pay for their crimes... And that’s exactly what our landmark lawsuit does! Let me quickly give you the details in case you missed us while we were on **Laura Ingraham** ’s great **Fox News **show talking about our case: Jessica Konen, the mother of an innocent 12-year-old girl, was called into her daughter’s school and told that her daughter was now a “boy”. She found out that her young daughter had been groomed into believing she was “transgender” and “bisexual”... Her impressionable daughter didn’t even know these words until they were forced on her by these radicals. The school then pushed Jessica’s innocent daughter to create a whole new identity -- complete with a new boy’s name, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom... They also created a “Gender Support Plan” and ordered the faculty to use her new name and pronouns -- all without her mother’s knowledge! **And Jessica had no idea because her young daughter was told NOT to tell her mother since she couldn’t be “trusted”****.**
* These people are not real teachers.
* They’re not concerned with teaching our children to read...
* They’re not concerned with teaching our children math and arithmetic...
* They’re not concerned with teaching history...

They want to indoctrinate an entire generation of children to reject their parent’s values and embrace their radical Left-Wing propaganda -- and we have to stop them. [**That’s why I’m asking you to rush in your donation of $35 or more to help us stop these child groomers now.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvbkl7rp12amn74e5taf1asmar7rqjrsjq9rej4g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4s1h2bs) After all this, Jessica did what any good mother would do and questioned the principal about what was happening to her young daughter at school... ... And what happened next? Child Protective Services was called to her house and “interviewed” her children! This grooming is happening behind closed doors in classrooms across the country... And it’s happening in secret so parents, grandparents andthe community don’t know what’s going on. Jessica’s innocent daughter is just one of the countless victims -- and if we don’t act, there will be more and more every day... Since we announced our lawsuit **The Ingraham Angle** , tons of concerned parents, grandparents and teachers have reached out to us. It’s horrible and sickening that this is happening, but we have to stop it... And our lawsuit is the key. Political pressure and new laws will not work -- we must drag these radical activists and schools into court and make them pay. That’s why our lawsuit names the individual “teachers” -- we must hold **them** accountable... Only when these extremists are scared of being dragged into court and are forced to pay will they stop. Make no mistake -- if we win this landmark case every single one of these so-called teachers will take notice. They will think of the consequences before pushing their radical agenda on our vulnerable children... [**So please, join me today with a donation of $35 or more to fund our lawsuit to protect our kids from out of control leftist teachers.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd5f6otp3e5etsek46hrgklr8v6bj4vure9fbl68_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4s1h2bs) But to stop them, we need to win this case... And if you can give more today – $50, $100, $250 or more – I will use it to protect our children and our constitutional rights from these radical Left extremists. But, whatever amount you can send, I ask that you rush it in right away. And please know that here at the Center for American Liberty we don’t just file lawsuits – we **WIN** them!! We recently won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court and we’re fighting Big Tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop these extremists from corrupting and damaging our innocent children is too important to lose. And the only way to stop them is to make them know we’re going to make them pay for their actions... [**So please, join the fight today****with your emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100 or more today.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkb64ohlujrc7ip6imr3kcggrtmqfn0q28cqfppg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4s1h2bs) We’re ready to go to the mat to win this case, but we can’t do it without you. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
|
---
| | P.S. The grooming and indoctrination happening in our schools must be stopped – and making the schools and individual “teachers” pay is the only way! That’s why I’m asking you to join our critical lawsuit today. [**Please, follow this link to make your****best tax-deductible donation of $20,****$35, $50, $100, $250 or more.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl4i6pd4a8jh7pq8bsmr4ciues92j32quj1t3578_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj4s1h2bs)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9ep1loa1fcdrnuq80ooor4pck5m1e7f5qbi3968_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj5c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm1s6bf0r49rm5o4tadjrksf98lr4vj1nnu42de0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj5c1h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zovhkndbeonttqoii44t08adilbb08nl0slgtd7o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g68oj5c1h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zu6kbc7s76sfp12uo5870bb1frqv1id6hia00cd8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: A gift for you
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas!
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4m317iuor4rhfan9rgpdfbfb1f7ibund5d3cjs0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g66or2cph2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl5rpmcseluf9u3m3ip7gp8cve36jqqkj5v3fqvo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g66or2cph2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z44rjtse0his9md0v4is5cuqppdji9inm4fqdm28_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g66or2cph2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8gf0ofd7nji4uni1q3maefcek8m2apemlpmudko_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g66or2cph2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znkjprr8bb9v05900ic1pk7m1f6okq07el5rkgh0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g66or2cph2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv3ir95uhprrf4mdhql6o1qippjqmmdtbrokg0p0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g66or2cph2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdi7je20tgoa5p6ci56btdn6taptiaq4ljhi2b60_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g66or2cph2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znjgnmcgjk3tb9pr170updcv5k5g3c8n559nlrqo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g66or2cph2bs)

---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

body:

_**I can't remember ever losing an overtime game in my football career, and I certainly don't intend to start now.**_ I'm asking for your support today so that I can be the 50th Senate vote against the disastrous Biden-Schumer-Warnock agenda.

Georgia deserves better. America deserves better.

It's time to pull out this win in overtime.

Thanks,

name: Cindy Cerquitella
subject: I have a secret. Promise not to tell
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941176:6J0L6CGNd:m:1:3373497171:A6DED47D898C1A903E5C52943CFC8249:r)

Hello Peter,

I have a secret to tell you -- just make sure to keep it from the radical Left.

Here it is: **America 's Future has spies inside their organizations. **

And we have people working behind enemy lines in companies like CNN, Google, and TikTok.

My name is Cindy Cerquitella, executive director at America's Future (AF). AF helps young professionals to become effective, lifelong advocates who inspire others to embrace freedom.

You see, America's Future members are young, liberty-minded professionals working to build a freer culture in America.

**And they need your support, Peter.** That's why I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters before the end of the week.

[_**Can you support a student today by chipping in just $25, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941176:6J0L6CGNd:m:1:3373497171:A6DED47D898C1A903E5C52943CFC8249:r)

Many popular conservative and libertarian writers you hear about today were often AF members when they were younger. But that's not all.

**AF members may live across the country and work in different sectors, but they all have one goal in mind: continuing the fight for liberty.**

AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming.

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce.

**America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists. **

We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs.

Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term.

[_**Support a young professional today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941176:6J0L6CGNd:m:1:3373497171:A6DED47D898C1A903E5C52943CFC8249:r)

By building up lifelong advocates, supporting young leaders, and building robust communities that believe in freedom, America's Future can turn the tide where it matters most.

These brave liberty activists who work behind enemy lines all started at the same point as our new members. But thanks to generous supporters like you, they have moved into leadership positions where they can make a change.

Peter, can you invest in the future of America by supporting an AF member? **Click below to send your gift and help us reach our goal.**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941177:6J0L6CGNd:m:1:3373497171:A6DED47D898C1A903E5C52943CFC8249:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941178:6J0L6CGNd:m:1:3373497171:A6DED47D898C1A903E5C52943CFC8249:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941179:6J0L6CGNd:m:1:3373497171:A6DED47D898C1A903E5C52943CFC8249:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941180:6J0L6CGNd:m:1:3373497171:A6DED47D898C1A903E5C52943CFC8249:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941181:6J0L6CGNd:m:1:3373497171:A6DED47D898C1A903E5C52943CFC8249:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941182:6J0L6CGNd:m:1:3373497171:A6DED47D898C1A903E5C52943CFC8249:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941183:6J0L6CGNd:m:1:3373497171:A6DED47D898C1A903E5C52943CFC8249:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941176:6J0L6CGNd:m:1:3373497171:A6DED47D898C1A903E5C52943CFC8249:r)

Thank you,

Cindy Cerquitella
Executive Director
America's Future

Since 1995, America's Future has been the premier nationwide network of liberty-minded young leaders, providing unique opportunities to learn the ideas of liberty and develop the skills necessary to articulate them.

name: VP Mike Pence
subject: Have you gotten a copy of my book yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
body:
I’m so privileged to be reaching out to you today with some BIG news! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0170%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=f%2b5Cd0wO8S8J0Zguu9iUpA&sysid=1)

| |
---
| | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41687%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iYmu6LikdQfNEpiwcgSW3g&sysid=1)
---

I’m so privileged to be reaching out to you today with some BIG news!

I’ve set aside a FREE signed copy of my new book just for you. Here’s the situation:

My new book - “So Help Me God” - will give you an exclusive look into my life in public service and all the incredible figures that helped me live it, from my Irish immigrant grandfather to my combat veteran father and my unstoppable 90 years young mother. Each played a role in helping me achieve my American dream.

I know it’s hard to believe, but I used to be a Democrat! We all make mistakes... One man drew me to the Republican movement through moments with a force I was never able to shake: Ronald Reagan. He reminded me of my lifelong love for the Constitution of the United States, and how conservative values are at the core of the American way of life.

He shaped my path, one that led to lessons in my early days that I carried with me all the way to the White House.

I can’t wait to share this journey with you.

That’s why I asked my team to reserve a signed copy of my book for you!

All you have to do is chip in $62 or more today to support my work to Advance American Freedom, and I’ll send you a signed copy.

It’s a win-win situation: you get a signed copy of the book and also help us get back to the policies that worked so well during the Trump-Pence Administration!

---
| | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41688%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zdmrppGUN%2bLH%2b%2fO2yw5mIQ&sysid=1)
---

I look forward to signing a book for you soon!

In Faith & Freedom,
Mike Pence
48th Vice President of The United States

---
|
---
| Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
---

801 Pennsylvania Ave Ste 930
Washington, DC 20004

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: U.S. Marine illegally arrested by FBI gets 8 months in prison
body:
On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington,
On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn8k294i38dmcn4v56kqbdo49s1n5g4hkb2kigpg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g61ob0s9h2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfqlanhbp21knch8pj2mgccksitibm4rs7heq6r0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g61ob0s9h2bs) Hi Patriot,

**[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z92q7gl7erntvckpmmjf2n6gdbhgjchgh8m6mcj8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g61ob0s9h2bs)**

(Because you’re a valued supporter of Freedom Watch, I had to rush you this urgent update about my client, Jesus Rivera. Please bear with me if you’ve seen some of this information before...it will be shocking to new supporters.)

On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

He didn’t protest (when I first heard his story, I thought he did).

Jesus didn’t attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud.
**
Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn’t receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden’s Gestapo DOJ and its FBI!

**What’s more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison.
**
Let me tell you, I’ve locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly.

She’s a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She’s the absolute worst judge I’ve appeared before in 45 years.

And now she’s throwing a true patriot and innocent man to the wolves.

**Patriot, I’ve filed a critically important class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera – and on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who is getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
I’m suing everyone responsible for this outrage: the lead agents, each agent who searched Jesus’ home, even FBI Director Christopher Wray.

The shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can’t be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can push around a peaceful, church-going Marine veteran for simply recording the events at the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.
**
That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsb0snl0np0rul603tuvs1hf4unovsduvrdpenr8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g61ob0s9h2bs)
I’m using two powerful class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

[**Please give what you can right away.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbcmiov2q2v29kdvs7g4t5ooeolg9b2ka9j0n0k0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g61ob0s9h2bs)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, you can read more about my urgent class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera and all January 6 peaceful protesters by just[clicking on this link](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znc94aau38bj78cdiuf95d7940k6cv3mosgij8pg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g61ob0s9h2bs) and selecting the view button. After, simply scroll down to read the legal document.

[**Then think of U.S. Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera and each of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters I’m fighting for...and dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zakdo7er1ue7imqajul0kdgf316b37bdcjofue78_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9g61ob0s9h2bs)

body:
If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6485%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=m6sG91zM8UsOH%2fa9PwnJsw&sysid=1)

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83459%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dekibZexFa5%2f%2b%2bXhcTCa5w&sysid=1)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83451%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FePdHY8M4rJCHQIQKdtMMw&sysid=1)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $5 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83452%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T0jus8gpYSLcvu%2fY1DcHqg&sysid=1)**

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm counting on you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.** My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. That’s why I have to ask: [**Please, friend, will you chip in $15 or more right now to split between me and Serve America so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54984438/380288769/-392698372?refcode=20221123_SAP_Warnock&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGIxZjNlYS0zNTZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KbPxiv_ymXG9zyrxAZfu5M7kETE-2NMXDDsuP6xoA3A=) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54984439/380288770/-392698372?refcode=20221123_SAP_Warnock&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGIxZjNlYS0zNTZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KbPxiv_ymXG9zyrxAZfu5M7kETE-2NMXDDsuP6xoA3A=)** I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress. **They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: This isn’t over
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943048:J3fqpCGxN:m:1:3374012347:8EFDEECBF70F1263CDE3544CB25269AE:r)

It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to you?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943048:J3fqpCGxN:m:1:3374012347:8EFDEECBF70F1263CDE3544CB25269AE:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943048:J3fqpCGxN:m:1:3374012347:8EFDEECBF70F1263CDE3544CB25269AE:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943048:J3fqpCGxN:m:1:3374012347:8EFDEECBF70F1263CDE3544CB25269AE:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.
