name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp9pkjbkrfj1tsrle6pupvmr99amt6gtrdk1ouv0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i64o31cdh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbjqq7o6o8ln3al347eo5h6el2srcvc21jl0qp3g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i64o31cdh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8k3biqmt1uknmh93kb6afqq51kqf43kjm3rama8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i64o31cdh2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0b743ljgbiqk4ajnhlj0e2khmm7ptehu26dadi8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i64o31cdh2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbkgfnnpkon13pb92db4rqef8g179gk3h3d2gri8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i64o31cdh2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3nhk6j3vhomqoq8pa6vj3ud7udhl65idls0utko_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i64o31cdh2bs)
---

625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Office of U.S. Senator Raphael Warnock
subject: Happy Thanksgiving, Georgia!
body:
|
---
Happy Thanksgiving, Neighbor! As you prepare to spend time with loved ones and enjoy your family's holiday traditions, I want to send a brief note of gratitude to my fellow Georgians. I am so thankful to be a voice for YOU in the United States Senate and to fight for Georgia every single day. It is the honor of my life to represent you and your family. [WATCH: Senator Reverend Warnock's Thanksgiving Message ](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16792.14409146.6059413.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fwatch%3fv%3dirj47eEFSR0&redir_log=935113820565288) And I am so thankful for having the opportunity to hear from so many of you, from every corner of the state. To date, I've responded to 570,000 questions and opinions from Georgians who've contacted my office--and I look forward to continuing to hear from Georgians about the issues that are important to you. As Georgians and as Americans, we have so much to be thankful for, and I'm working hard to ensure all Georgians can continue to grow and thrive. Have a happy Thanksgiving, Georgia! Keep the faith, and keep looking up.
U.S. Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock

| This is official correspondence from the Office of Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock. If you have any questions, please contact our office [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16792.14409146.6059413.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fcontact-form%2f&redir_log=51402161759365).
If you need help with a federal agency, please click [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16792.14409146.6059413.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fcontact-form%2f%3fpath%3dhelp&redir_log=904232600857435).

PRIVACY POLICY: Your e-mail address will not be shared with anyone else or sold in any way.
TO UNSUBSCRIBE, PLEASE CLICK [HERE](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16792.14409146.6059413.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fnewsletter-signup%2funsubscribe%2f&redir_log=564209011866492).

subject: A simple request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1gehdp9mfhd0u983uadj842b1luno63d3ub04t8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i64p33c3h2bs)

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqkg2ghsts5rd7tgt3gsmkojsep3jj213o82e9b8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i64p33c3h2bs)**_

[**CHIP IN $5 ->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziej6e4p6qcerejmn6bps9q562ihmgg0korsfme8_)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0ouc0au62b782iloiv3iircpivas7kjdp72ki3o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i64p33c3h2bs)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $5 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl5jka1klifmfe28od3uncildug88ns32ha4ukjo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i64p33c3h2bs)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $5.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zspeer1im03c1uvgj8itqb478od6a0rlporp45c0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i64p33c3h2bs)**

subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zn4n1elhpr06lh82io4v3smdumc4dsempt7suva8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i64p37cdh2bs)

Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.**

Zach didn't attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete's sake.)

Zach didn't break anything, or even hurt anyone's feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.**

But because he's a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden's Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What 's more, he hasn't had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.**

**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach 's disability payments because he'd been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged - not convicted!**

As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Friend, that 's why I've filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.**

If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

**" They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can't happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you."**

That's why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

[Friend, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z259oibvs8qudld0jpqsp8s67j8q8otahab97o80_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i64p37cdh2bs)

I'm using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Friend, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden "Gestapo Police State!" This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zk3a48j98q73274iro4r8teucm8sp6lv0v5hrsc8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i64p37cdh2bs)

name: VP Mike Pence
subject: Have you gotten a copy of my book yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
body:
I'm so privileged to be reaching out to you today with some BIG news!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3jr55no5jnabhjdli27848ikd3avb482b45tlg0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i6co76cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqrdcr3ehh72dhmm9on6c72cupjcd33ejhn3crj6erb4d3lmdq62cbiemqbcd776v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj664qbacb0ephmcdj2mdijfc5lclp2bs)

| |
---
| | | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfihiv5psad4jf9p66bfagosf6p4q6qhg065nfto_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i6co76cth2bs)
---

I'm so privileged to be reaching out to you today with some BIG news!

I've set aside a FREE signed copy of my new book just for you. Here's the situation:

My new book - "So Help Me God" \- will give you an exclusive look into my life in public service and all the incredible figures that helped me live it, from my Irish immigrant grandfather to my combat veteran father and my unstoppable 90 years young mother. Each played a role in helping me achieve my American dream.

I know it's hard to believe, but I used to be a Democrat! We all make mistakes... One man drew me to the Republican movement through moments with a force I was never able to shake: Ronald Reagan. He reminded me of my lifelong love for the Constitution of the United States, and how conservative values are at the core of the American way of life.

He shaped my path, one that led to lessons in my early days that I carried with me all the way to the White House.

I can't wait to share this journey with you.

That's why I asked my team to reserve a signed copy of my book for you!

All you have to do is chip in $62 or more today to support my work to Advance American Freedom, and I'll send you a signed copy.

It's a win-win situation: you get a signed copy of the book and also help us get back to the policies that worked so well during the Trump-Pence Administration!

---
| | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8sdpql9vvjm188ic2c5u8vq05ald23103eafo4g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i6co76cth2bs)
---

I look forward to signing a book for you soon!

In Faith & Freedom,
Mike Pence
48th Vice President of The United States

---
|
---
| Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
---
801 Pennsylvania Ave Ste 930
Washington, DC 20004

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7587%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=zOilj7%2fUUsQ2eJRMJI6CzQ&sysid=1)
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77263%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l29RqwyqoWzmGsAm6G%2bcPQ&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77264%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HYYhLnfOcN8bJd%2fTU2NAeg&sysid=1) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77275%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jKbHSIk4Pd8zUa6ywkHeuA&sysid=1)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77276%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5urdHtWryrxUiqsOmI96Aw&sysid=1)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77277%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PWvjsoNKhfql5oY5SuzREQ&sysid=1)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77278%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jVCLZNt1VWekiWHWIGGpYg&sysid=1)
---

It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to you?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943067:6CXcACGNJ:m:1:3373497171:BA13B261266836B95DFB28243F00F4B8:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943067:6CXcACGNJ:m:1:3373497171:BA13B261266836B95DFB28243F00F4B8:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943067:6CXcACGNJ:m:1:3373497171:BA13B261266836B95DFB28243F00F4B8:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943067:6CXcACGNJ:m:1:3373497171:BA13B261266836B95DFB28243F00F4B8:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator

However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election. When you read this, I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words. I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory. We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America. I'm asking you to dig deep. Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th. I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track. Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days. I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity. From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. Thank you, Marco Rubio United States Senator | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but {{unsubscribeUrl}}. name: VP Mike Pence
subject: Have you gotten a copy of my book yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
body:
I’m so privileged to be reaching out to you today with some BIG news!

| |
---
| | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb8as0cq3aieaftaf7uo05vlnoei0rerah80e4ng_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i6aor2cph2bs)
---

I'm so privileged to be reaching out to you today with some BIG news!

I've set aside a FREE signed copy of my new book just for you. Here's the situation:

My new book - "So Help Me God" \- will give you an exclusive look into my life in public service and all the incredible figures that helped me live it, from my Irish immigrant grandfather to my combat veteran father and my unstoppable 90 years young mother. Each played a role in helping me achieve my American dream.

I know it's hard to believe, but I used to be a Democrat! We all make mistakes... One man drew me to the Republican movement through moments with a force I was never able to shake: Ronald Reagan. He reminded me of my lifelong love for the Constitution of the United States, and how conservative values are at the core of the American way of life.

He shaped my path, one that led to lessons in my early days that I carried with me all the way to the White House.

I can't wait to share this journey with you.

That's why I asked my team to reserve a signed copy of my book for you!

All you have to do is chip in $62 or more today to support my work to Advance American Freedom, and I'll send you a signed copy.

It's a win-win situation: you get a signed copy of the book and also help us get back to the policies that worked so well during the Trump-Pence Administration!

---
| | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdf24ha7gopov66r5i68fqrs4tp776fa657h3co0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9i6aor2cph2bs)
---

I look forward to signing a book for you soon!

In Faith & Freedom,
Mike Pence
48th Vice President of The United States

---
|
---
| Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
---

Washington, DC 20004

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: Our work doesn’t stop here.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
We must do everything we can to defend the freedom to vote — our democracy depends on it.
Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54993694/380326185/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20221123_f_f_vetf_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDNkNmY2YS00MjZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VrNFlk02qsqh50nh8wIFaKj0fQHUuOF3xKTVMccqm2g=&emci=b3726d5e-3c6b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=303d6f6a-426b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1037277)

| | Hey, Sometimes, the biggest accomplishments are things that _don’t_ happen. And this year, your support helped make it possible for Fair Fight Action, our state and national coalition partners, elected officials, and election administrators to ensure that the vast majority of threatened election subversion, voter intimidation, and political violence did not succeed in the midterm elections. In 2020 and 2022, Fair Fight Action invested significant resources into pro-voting partners on the ground in key states across the country to lead Voter Empowerment Task Forces (VETFs). A key aspect of our VETFs is a commitment to partnership — after identifying changemakers and voting rights leaders within each state, we provided them with seed funding, network support, substantive resources, and ongoing strategic expertise to make sure they had what they needed to protect voting rights in their respective communities. But anti-voter extremists won’t stop trying to restrict access to the ballot — so we won’t stop our pro-voter work either. We’ll keep working until every voter can make their voice heard, and every single vote is counted in elections at all levels. clean_body: We must do everything we can to defend the freedom to vote — our democracy depends on it. Fair Fight | | | Hey, Sometimes, the biggest accomplishments are things that don’t happen. And this year, your support helped make it possible for Fair Fight Action, our state and national coalition partners, elected officials, and election administrators to ensure that the vast majority of threatened election subversion, voter intimidation, and political violence did not succeed in the midterm elections. In 2020 and 2022, Fair Fight Action invested significant resources into pro-voting partners on the ground in key states across the country to lead Voter Empowerment Task Forces (VETFs). A key aspect of our VETFs is a commitment to partnership — after identifying changemakers and voting rights leaders within each state, we provided them with seed funding, network support, substantive resources, and ongoing strategic expertise to make sure they had what they needed to protect voting rights in their respective communities. But anti-voter extremists won’t stop trying to restrict access to the ballot — so we won’t stop our pro-voter work either. We’ll keep working until every voter can make their voice heard, and every single vote is counted in elections at all levels. = | = Each state faced its own unique challenges in the fight against voter intimidation. Whether it was in Arizona, Michigan, or Pennsylvania, our Voter Empowerment Task Forces worked hand-in-hand with on-the-ground partners and officials to prevent, mitigate, and bring to light every possible anticipated challenge before it could materialize. A contribution to Fair Fight Action today helps to sustain programs like the brand-new statewide nonpartisan observer program in New Hampshire, supports legal challenges to voter intimidation in Texas, and helps to ensure that voters in states like Georgia can make their voices heard in this year’s Runoff Election. We must do everything we can to defend the freedom to vote — our democracy depends on it. = Thank you for everything, The Fair Fight Action Team = | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-430 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2022 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. The IRS had singled out groups with conservative-sounding terms such as “patriot” and “Tea Party” in their titles when applying for tax-exempt status. clean_body: Background on Garland appointment of special prosecutor for Trump [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [] Special Counsel Investigating Trump Was Key Figure In IRS Targeting Scandal [] Source: Daily Caller [] Jack Smith, the special counsel appointed by Attorney General Merrick Garland to investigate former president Donald Trump’s possession of classified information, was a key figure in theIRS’s infamous targeting of conservative non-profits, according to a 2014 report by Republicans on the House Oversight Committee. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [=] 2014-04-16 JW Obtains IRS Documents Showing Lerner in Contact With DOJ about Potential Prosecution of Tax-Exempt Groups [=] Source: Judicial Watch [=] Internal IRS documents reveal that former IRS official Lois Lerner communicated with the Department of Justice about whether it was possible to criminally prosecute certain tax-exempt entities. The IRS had singled out groups with conservative-sounding terms such as “patriot” and “Tea Party” in their titles when applying for tax-exempt status. [13x13x1] [=] READ MORE [=] [180x150x2] [] 2022-10-11 Smoking Guns: IRS Scandal is Back [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton: "As these documents, which took forever to get out, show, they knew at that time that they had no lawful basis for what they were doing. This was all part of a democrat/Obama operation." [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [==] 2015-07-07 Documents Reveal DOJ, IRS, and FBI Plan to Seek Criminal Charges of Obama Opponents [==] Source: Judicial Watch [==] The House Oversight Committee followed up on Judicial Watch disclosures with hearings and interviews of Richard Pilger, Director, Elections Crimes Branch at DOJ, and his boss, DOJ Public Integrity Chief Jack Smith. Besides confirming the DOJ’s 2013 communications with Lerner, Pilger admitted to the committee that DOJ officials met with Lerner in October 2010. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm counting on you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
**Peter: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.**** **

My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:

[Please, Peter, will you chip in $5 or more right now to split between me and Letitia James so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54995676/380334330/-819377630?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk921-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzcxMjhmMi00NzZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XWkCfOEzJlf2TSY23mtaQ1XQW6B8DXSk14ixK6TUaiE=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54995679/380334333/-819377630?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk921-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzcxMjhmMi00NzZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XWkCfOEzJlf2TSY23mtaQ1XQW6B8DXSk14ixK6TUaiE=)
I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress.

**They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like _you_ with me to win – now more than ever.**** **

**[So please, Peter, I'm personally asking: Will you split $5 or more between me and Letitia James to become one of the 25,000 donors we need to kickstart our runoff campaign, defeat Herschel Walker, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54995680/380334336/-819377630?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk921-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzcxMjhmMi00NzZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XWkCfOEzJlf2TSY23mtaQ1XQW6B8DXSk14ixK6TUaiE=)**

Thank you,
Reverend Warnock

But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it. My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: I’m sorry, but it’s not over
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943115:6EtOmCGON:m:1:3372944669:5BE75063ED27F8B00A5E4886102AE502:r)

It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to you?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943115:6EtOmCGON:m:1:3372944669:5BE75063ED27F8B00A5E4886102AE502:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943115:6EtOmCGON:m:1:3372944669:5BE75063ED27F8B00A5E4886102AE502:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943115:6EtOmCGON:m:1:3372944669:5BE75063ED27F8B00A5E4886102AE502:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943115:6EtOmCGON:m:1:3372944669:5BE75063ED27F8B00A5E4886102AE502:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943115:6EtOmCGON:m:1:3372944669:5BE75063ED27F8B00A5E4886102AE502:r)

**7 million.**

**$20,000.**

CHIP IN $7 TO SIGN NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35454?t=6&akid=5448%2E878179%2ErhZrKz) | [DONATE $7 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35454?t=7&akid=5448%2E878179%2ErhZrKz)
---
**To: Rep. Jamie Raskin**
**From: A strong Democrat** Dear Congressman Raskin,

I can’t thank you enough for your hard work over the years and on the January 6 Committee to condemn far-right extremism in our country.

Thanks to the evidence you’ve revealed, we’re one step closer to finally holding Trump and his MAGA traitors accountable for their crimes in the horrific January 6 insurrection.

**I know it isn’t easy standing up to vicious GOP attacks, but your bravery and leadership is _exactly_ what our nation needs right now.** [**So today, I’m signing this letter and making a donation to VPP to thank you for your heroic efforts and to keep electing incredible leaders like you. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35454?t=8&akid=5448%2E878179%2ErhZrKz) | [DONATE $7 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35454?t=9&akid=5448%2E878179%2ErhZrKz)

Sincerely,

A strong Democrat

name: Cindy Cerquitella
subject: I have a secret. Promise not to tell 🙏
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941347:6N2yYCGNW:m:1:3371220873:8EFE3D3F49372F2A87A95D2AF3DF3139:r)

Hello Peter,

I have a secret to tell you -- just make sure to keep it from the radical Left.

Here it is: **America 's Future has spies inside their organizations. **

And we have people working behind enemy lines in companies like CNN, Google, and TikTok.

My name is Cindy Cerquitella, executive director at America's Future (AF). AF helps young professionals to become effective, lifelong advocates who inspire others to embrace freedom.

You see, America's Future members are young, liberty-minded professionals working to build a freer culture in America.

**And they need your support, Peter.** That's why I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters before the end of the week.

[_**Can you support a student today by chipping in just $25, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941347:6N2yYCGNW:m:1:3371220873:8EFE3D3F49372F2A87A95D2AF3DF3139:r)

Many popular conservative and libertarian writers you hear about today were often AF members when they were younger. But that's not all.

**AF members may live across the country and work in different sectors, but they all have one goal in mind: continuing the fight for liberty.**

AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming.

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce.

**America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists. **

We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs.

Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term.

[_**Support a young professional today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941347:6N2yYCGNW:m:1:3371220873:8EFE3D3F49372F2A87A95D2AF3DF3139:r)

By building up lifelong advocates, supporting young leaders, and building robust communities that believe in freedom, America's Future can turn the tide where it matters most.

These brave liberty activists who work behind enemy lines all started at the same point as our new members. But thanks to generous supporters like you, they have moved into leadership positions where they can make a change.

Peter, can you invest in the future of America by supporting an AF member? **Click below to send your gift and help us reach our goal.**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941348:6N2yYCGNW:m:1:3371220873:8EFE3D3F49372F2A87A95D2AF3DF3139:r)

[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941350:6N2yYCGNW:m:1:3371220873:8EFE3D3F49372F2A87A95D2AF3DF3139:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941351:6N2yYCGNW:m:1:3371220873:8EFE3D3F49372F2A87A95D2AF3DF3139:r)

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941353:6N2yYCGNW:m:1:3371220873:8EFE3D3F49372F2A87A95D2AF3DF3139:r)

AF members may live across the country and work in different sectors, but they all have one goal in mind: continuing the fight for liberty. AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming. While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce. America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists. We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs. Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term. By building up lifelong advocates, supporting young leaders, and building robust communities that believe in freedom, America's Future can turn the tide where it matters most. These brave liberty activists who work behind enemy lines all started at the same point as our new members. But thanks to generous supporters like you, they have moved into leadership positions where they can make a change. Peter, can you invest in the future of America by supporting an AF member? Click below to send your gift and help us reach our goal. Thank you, Cindy Cerquitella Executive Director America's Future Since 1995, America's Future has been the premier nationwide network of liberty-minded young leaders, providing unique opportunities to learn the ideas of liberty and develop the skills necessary to articulate them. | | **We can't have good government without good people.** Our democracy gives the power to the people, and Americans across the country made their voices heard, rejecting extremism and embracing decency. But, the fight is far from over. We will have many more challenges to overcome. **I'd like to draw your attention to a close race in Georgia. Senator Raphael Warnock is a principled leader running for reelection, and his race is very close.** **As you may already know, this race is headed to a runoff on December 6.** **[Today I am asking you to split a donation between Senator Warnock and myself and help fuel the fights to come. Can you donate now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54999574/380350283/-134211853?refcode=2022-11-23-warnock&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8cde22ad-516b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2RlMjJhZC01MTZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0W4eZvXpd6GOW8NgC2obhItK4AwAR3ouHer29L3ETk0=)** [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54999575/380350284/-134211853?refcode=2022-11-23-warnock&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8cde22ad-516b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2RlMjJhZC01MTZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0W4eZvXpd6GOW8NgC2obhItK4AwAR3ouHer29L3ETk0=) **Senator Warnock and I have many shared values, including our commitment to service and our rejection of corporate special interests.** He is a passionate advocate for **reducing health care and prescription drug costs** by fighting back against Big Pharma and for the American people. He believes in ethical stewardship of our environment for future generations and is **fighting for clean energy**. Warnock is **all in for his community** and will work across the aisle for their benefit. _Warnock's right-wing opponent, Herschel Walker, could not be more different._ Not only is Walker endorsed by GOP extremists. He doesn't care to learn or understand the critical issues facing his community, and he's been caught in numerous scandals and lies throughout his campaign. Over and over, Walker has shown a breathtaking disregard for telling folks the truth. **We must elect good people to continue the fight for a government that works for all.** Right now, that means doing everything we can to reelect Senator Raphael Warnock. **[Can you split a contribution between Senator Warnock and myself today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54999576/380350285/-134211853?refcode=2022-11-23-warnock&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8cde22ad-516b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2RlMjJhZC01MTZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0W4eZvXpd6GOW8NgC2obhItK4AwAR3ouHer29L3ETk0=)** clean_body: | | | | We can't have good government without good people. Our democracy gives the power to the people, and Americans across the country made their voices heard, rejecting extremism and embracing decency. But, the fight is far from over. We will have many more challenges to overcome. I'd like to draw your attention to a close race in Georgia. Senator Raphael Warnock is a principled leader running for reelection, and his race is very close. As you may already know, this race is headed to a runoff on December 6. = = Senator Warnock and I have many shared values, including our commitment to service and our rejection of corporate special interests. He is a passionate advocate for reducing health care and prescription drug costs by fighting back against Big Pharma and for the American people. He believes in ethical stewardship of our environment for future generations and is fighting for clean energy. Warnock is all in for his community and will work across the aisle for their benefit. Warnock's right-wing opponent, Herschel Walker, could not be more different. Not only is Walker endorsed by GOP extremists. He doesn't care to learn or understand the critical issues facing his community, and he's been caught in numerous scandals and lies throughout his campaign. Over and over, Walker has shown a breathtaking disregard for telling folks the truth. We must elect good people to continue the fight for a government that works for all. Right now, that means doing everything we can to reelect Senator Raphael Warnock. = Together, we've overcome so many challenges, and I am confident we will emerge victorious over the ones to come. Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdcer3cgi4fpdkdmv3uviooviv85vdtklplhp03o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9h64o77c3h2bs)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $5 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmulljkur0g6ags3rduvk2jbo2d1mmahsg8o8j5o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9h64o77c3h2bs)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $5.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z05tbimqpm6h7gp2nmf3a15gebaei4f8uhv79j2o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9h64o77c3h2bs)**

I'm releasing a new book about my time as President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State.

name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA RELEASES GENERAL ELECTION ANALYSIS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
| | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, NOVEMBER 23
GREATER GEORGIA RELEASES GENERAL ELECTION ANALYSIS
(ATLANTA) - Today, Greater Georgia released an analysis of the 2022 midterm general election, the highest-turnout midterm general election in Georgia history. With more than 3.96 million votes cast, the election saw increases in participation from almost every demographic group - including significant turnout by newly registered voters and disenfranchised voters who were alienated by doubts about election integrity in 2020.
"With every election since the passage of SB 202, Georgia voters have broken turnout records at the ballot box and proven what we've said all along: that Georgia's new election integrity laws make it easy to vote and hard to cheat," said Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. "Not only did every Georgian see few issues at the polls and quick results on Election night; we also saw incredible participation from newly registered voters and disenfranchised voters. Through the December 6th runoff election, Greater Georgia will continue working to bring these citizens back out - and to make sure that every voter knows that their vote will count, and their voice will be heard."
See Greater Georgia analysis for the 2022 midterm general election below:
Total Turnout In total, 3.96 million voters cast their ballots in this year's general election, setting a new midterm turnout record and narrowly beating the previous 2018 midterm general record by about 15,000 votes.
Early In-Person Voting Almost 2.3 million voters voted early in-person in this year's midterm general, representing a 20% increase over 2018.
Early-in person voting became the favored vote method this year in Georgia, representing 57% of the votes cast. In 2018, early-in person voting represented 48% of the vote.
Absentee Voting About 250,000 voters voted absentee in this year's midterm general, representing a 12% increase over 2018.
Absentee voting continued to be the smallest share of votes cast, representing only 6% of the total vote share. In 2018, it similarly represented 6% of the vote.
Election Day Voting Over 1.4 million Georgians cast their ballots in-person on Election Day this year, representing a 21% decrease over 2018.
Election Day votes represented about 36% of the total vote share for this election, down from 2018 when Election Day votes comprised 46% of the vote.
Disenfranchised Voters Of the 339,000 conservative voters who voted in the November 2020 general election but did not vote in the January 2021 runoff election, 142,219, or about 42%, came back out to vote in this year's midterm general.
First Time Voters 94,346 voters were first-time voters. Of those, about 40,000, or 42%, are projected to be conservative voters.
Voters by Gender The majority of voters this year were women, although they became a slightly smaller percentage of the vote share compared to 2018.
In this year's midterm general, 55% of voters were female and 45% were male, compared to 2018 when 56% of voters were female and 44% were male. The number of women voters increased by 1% and men by 4%.
Voters by Race Each demographic group participated at roughly the same rates in 2022 as they did in 2018, and the majority of voters continue to be White. The notable exception to this is Black voters, who came out in smaller numbers compared to 2018.
In 2022, White voters were 65% of the vote, Black were 28%, Hispanic were 2.7%, Asian were 2.6%, and "Other" voters were 1.9%. In 2018, White voters were 65% of the vote, Black were 29%, Hispanic were 2.6%, Asian were 2.3%, and "Other" were 1.4%. The number of White voters increased by 3%, Black decreased by 2%, Hispanic increased by 4%, and Asian increased by 17%.

name: VP Mike Pence
subject: I want to tell you a story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great America Committee
body:
| |
---
| | | _**A Memoir of Faith and Public Service**_

I want to share my personal story with you.

I've been fortunate to do some amazing things in my life, and I want to tell the story. That's why I wrote my new book - "So Help Me God."

_**[The book is grounded in hope through the ups and downs of life.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61942860:6F6ybCGIN:m:1:3317145305:145A01D38A7A3CE88D66A607DE504225:r "The book is grounded in hope through
the ups and downs of life.")**_

The book covers my time in radio and television, serving in Congress on 9/11 and during the War on Terror, serving as Governor of Indiana through a time of opportunity and challenge, and serving as Vice President during a tumultuous time for our country.

For me, it's always been about clinging to my faith. He knows the plans He has for us. The plans to prosper us, not to harm us.

It's grounded in the belief that whatever life throws at us, if we lean on Him, and if we hold firm to our family, ideals, and convictions, that we will see our way through.
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61942860:6F6ybCGIN:m:1:3317145305:145A01D38A7A3CE88D66A607DE504225:r)
---
**_[Now I want YOU to read the story for yourself, so I've set aside a signed copy of my new book just for you!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61942860:6F6ybCGIN:m:1:3317145305:145A01D38A7A3CE88D66A607DE504225:r "Now I want
YOU to read the story for yourself, so I’ve set aside a signed copy of my new book just for you!")_**

If you chip in $62 or more to help support principled conservatives across the country, then I'll send you a SIGNED copy of my new book.

It's a win-win situation! You get to help us elect more conservative leaders while also getting a signed copy of my book.

Don't wait! There are only a limited number of books, so act fast!
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61942860:6F6ybCGIN:m:1:3317145305:145A01D38A7A3CE88D66A607DE504225:r)
---
_Vice President Mike Pence_

clean_body: | | | | | A Memoir of Faith and Public Service I want to share my personal story with you. I've been fortunate to do some amazing things in my life, and I want to tell the story. That's why I wrote my new book - "So Help Me God." "The book is grounded in hope through the ups and downs of life." The book covers my time in radio and television, serving in Congress on 9/11 and during the War on Terror, serving as Governor of Indiana through a time of opportunity and challenge, and serving as Vice President during a tumultuous time for our country. For me, it's always been about clinging to my faith. He knows the plans He has for us. The plans to prosper us, not to harm us. It's grounded in the belief that whatever life throws at us, if we lean on Him, and if we hold firm to our family, ideals, and convictions, that we will see our way through. | | "Now I want YOU to read the story for yourself, so I’ve set aside a signed copy of my new book just for you!" If you chip in $62 or more to help support principled conservatives across the country, then I'll send you a SIGNED copy of my new book. It's a win-win situation! You get to help us elect more conservative leaders while also getting a signed copy of my book. Don't wait! There are only a limited number of books, so act fast! | | Vice President Mike Pence | | Paid for by Great America Committee PO Box 58825 Nashville, TN 37205 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 1, 2022. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Early voting starts Saturday: Raphael Warnock’s campaign needs your support to get their message out on television, on the radio, and online, as well as to keep contacting voters on the phone and at the door.
body:
Warnock knows how to win
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2c9a43ab-1687-4e3b-a566-fff8ddceb530/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_If there is anyone who knows how to win a race in Georgia, it is Senator Raphael Warnock. It may be hard to believe, but he's won 3 statewide elections in Georgia in just 2 years!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T328ae066-aa44-41c3-8555-b66b4504acec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_The special election in November of 2020, the runoff January 5th, 2021 and November 8th. Now we know if he has the resources, he'll do it again on December 6th, when he takes on Herschel Walker, whose latest speech debated whether vampires or werewolves would win in a fight (I wish I were kidding. I am not. I guess he cherished "The Twilight Saga")._**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Raphael Warnock for Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc7f4fa0c-d8b4-42d5-a6cb-f37a0a4fd333/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_Still, Senator Warnock has been falling behind in fundraising every day, and a Republican campaign group just announced another $14 million to run ads against him._** **We must do all we can to help him make up the ground. Or instead of Georgia's Senator being a scholar who bestrides a pulpit once occupied by Martin Luther King, Jr., it may become someone who's brain is occupied by werewolf vs vampire battles.** Raphael Warnock’s campaign needs your support to get their message out on television, on the radio, and online, as well as to keep contacting voters on the phone and at the door. **[Can you please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Senator Raphael Warnock, so he can make up his fundraising shortfall today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td347f0bd-7e2c-4dcf-adc3-0b6bc4cdc157/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thank you, Blue Amp Action Community!**
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Re-elect Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb09be141-a785-4dbf-bfec-041f57fc23f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. America needs you.

Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are on the brink of building a **_51-seat majority_** in the Senate.

**Republicans just officially won the House majority.**

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=908d932662da4d1ebfbcf8c2ddc75e12&_e=HCaO974jEjxORek3-Ycm_j9oTlYb5sJ9IjJjxzNup16aRT09VzDxyaOj1wA1y0JTCaNc7_5kR9dArrva1_uupDJPRkOh0IwQABBZNNzApj1TrO_byosspTF71I1UMWZ2axxOpEzOtQqaayni0cl_C3dHAYgaz68N1y6NfUyH2rbZuD_CytcbAHNJThok2MGjukc3NNcp-AWGp9hYzPL-e4O36kvqIufnMITsDbmhBFZFL_vlnoJtVj4T3j44ErHDMNnxoz5eosJw_7NrY8uXga-f-naD8rT6U9ekkj6q9s7poT_dWT3PQ5K1xDR6XNxp)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):
* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=908d932662da4d1ebfbcf8c2ddc75e12&_e=HCaO974jEjxORek3-Ycm_j9oTlYb5sJ9IjJjxzNup16aRT09VzDxyaOj1wA1y0JTCaNc7_5kR9dArrva1_uupDJPRkOh0IwQABBZNNzApj1TrO_byosspTF71I1UMWZ2axxOpEzOtQqaayni0cl_C3dHAYgaz68N1y6NfUyH2rbvYL65VrrC2Q5ge9lPsUW3K8Kx5K0GnhJtKwSAlTOgfIj6vUqnFNxgjp5E1FRqhXXOreaRxquVKA1XlBysQffnOm12PMD_6-BI4dSCIlkKDkvUfpyII_jkfTlJH0CU1qp4tMKC2_LrfShsge2tPpO0)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=908d932662da4d1ebfbcf8c2ddc75e12&_e=HCaO974jEjxORek3-Ycm_j9oTlYb5sJ9IjJjxzNup16aRT09VzDxyaOj1wA1y0JTCaNc7_5kR9dArrva1_uupDJPRkOh0IwQABBZNNzApj1TrO_byosspTF71I1UMWZ2axxOpEzOtQqaayni0cl_C3dHAYgaz68N1y6NfUyH2raprZ8tdWvSU6wUI5R3BR68s7f6ItQaCbF5Vbn9O6Jt62mp4nk6hhQs1WL8GFzWDeRgEqfoPrEPhKyxr0lLlBrFfUjy9FmtTTnGg1TZBFkbyIFINAhOK37iXI5olX4LiabXlszBecA4LlUeMJ3VMdgg)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=908d932662da4d1ebfbcf8c2ddc75e12&_e=HCaO974jEjxORek3-Ycm_j9oTlYb5sJ9IjJjxzNup16aRT09VzDxyaOj1wA1y0JTCaNc7_5kR9dArrva1_uupDJPRkOh0IwQABBZNNzApj1TrO_byosspTF71I1UMWZ2axxOpEzOtQqaayni0cl_C3dHAYgaz68N1y6NfUyH2rY6IG-4VP4zMl33ngElMUAcX0VeNhPs8c_qkuaj_kmn7FfiqOtKsNUjb89SFEjcS7WIzciLTO6CJMoSP_LCi0CMQblftNEtCZ2GNX4RSYEAQU5jNCVnZ1WperhGEits80QU6pj7XozgEpzWFYshZVyq)

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Thanksgiving is a time for reflection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
The holiday season is almost upon us.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55006708/380356284/-1502561798?refcode=EM_C_221123Thanksgiving_N_SB_90DO_NG_3_N_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjBhODFiNC01ODZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4B32pK2fI1zn4ws2NstFdaac6rIZkv3hjLE-2056lCI=&emci=c43a723f-916a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=060a81b4-586b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=23746811) Peter, I am so thankful for you.

As we head into Thanksgiving, I wanted to take some time to reach out to my supporters who have had my back from the start. I don’t take it for granted the position you’ve helped put me in, and every single day I work hard to ensure your faith in me is rewarded with progress. I am so grateful for the supportive community that we have built right here in Ohio, and I wouldn’t trade it for anything in the world.

I hope that you have a peaceful and relaxing Thanksgiving, Peter. After helping Ohio Democrats successfully win every House swing district, and holding off the GOP’s red wave, we’ve earned it.

So, Peter, as we head into Thanksgiving, I invite you to reflect with me on how thankful we are to be surrounded by loved ones and generous souls as the holiday season begins. I’m always working to give back to those who support me, and when I return to Congress, the fight for our continued progress continues.

Forever thankful,

Shontel Brown Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress
PO Box 221232
Beachwood, OH 44122
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/SB_jCLuMXEGKMEGQua2C0A2?unsubscribedata=b%2BzLnqk5L3RH5R%2BSDbEfJBeOzfdwCVJY%2FKk6Iqn8tXm77p%2BI8R1k1qHxLd%2F82E4Bb53k85ZmjjQAx3jn9Fp3PqmXITok6av3NmngVF%2B3uDRW%2Fvu5B25BJsHBDCKxiJGHiLPWHqfjEPfh9aP6RtA6%2BUkPfVrzxS2S1EQdpCKcBzV6pQjprHpfj4IdLyHQoHX7VxC4JvwY22f%2BsXblFOQdanRvHZ4RtKvyKRuiFNo52uijFD%2FksFUVwnv4OntnfTuIE70vZ0LIoDjHjL1KM5YOQjNfNlNdndaVYwh7Ugl0kEYCSRNzQSGnU3ws6a99QYyCtpTojD4d876pXLJR7PFrtwrPIAfkv%2FBBRtMKi8AgLMIXMwu18q7C8umKEn0PpTTkeKX747j4HqPM8r86kdSvd1b2z84KTQm1pyAm65%2FxfVD%2BoXWPeBYxxJBaFTNE%2FMS7).
