name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
| | | Dear Peter,[**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946545:6Dg-uCGNj:m:1:3345639852:46F17BD033ACD65CDA19EE5471CB6720:r) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail.Over what?Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.**Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space._And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute)._Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI.Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement).And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans.[**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946545:6Dg-uCGNj:m:1:3345639852:46F17BD033ACD65CDA19EE5471CB6720:r) Now, I'll cut right to the chase.Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency.If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**.Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.**That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY****LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI.His offer was rejected.Why?**Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** "_We can get to you. We can get to your family._ "That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict.And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap.[**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946545:6Dg-uCGNj:m:1:3345639852:46F17BD033ACD65CDA19EE5471CB6720:r)The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, _they 'll multiply._So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946545:6Dg-uCGNj:m:1:3345639852:46F17BD033ACD65CDA19EE5471CB6720:r), before it's too late.For Life,
---
---
Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946545:6Dg-uCGNj:m:1:3345639852:46F17BD033ACD65CDA19EE5471CB6720:r)
---
P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide).[**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946545:6Dg-uCGNj:m:1:3345639852:46F17BD033ACD65CDA19EE5471CB6720:r)
---
| | |
---
[ Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946545:6Dg-uCGNj:m:1:3345639852:46F17BD033ACD65CDA19EE5471CB6720:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946546:6Dg-uCGNj:m:1:3345639852:46F17BD033ACD65CDA19EE5471CB6720:r)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606[privacy policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946547:6Dg-uCGNj:m:1:3345639852:46F17BD033ACD65CDA19EE5471CB6720:r)
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021 [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0178%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=fkX9B3f%2b%2bBtfOVaisqKn4A&sysid=1)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41682%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3dLEIVTFZNk2xXFqOFij0g&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41683%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o4g5geyK6bnIS24Mae9IfQ&sysid=1) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41684%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ojuIwt4EPa16mFT%2bvQiAdg&sysid=1)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged - not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41684%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ojuIwt4EPa16mFT%2bvQiAdg&sysid=1)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41695%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Su4rXqFPEBYZaRSfRtLRBQ&sysid=1)

---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0178%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=fkX9B3f%2b%2bBtfOVaisqKn4A&sysid=1)

But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.) Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words. He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen. But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy. Zach has been held without bail this entire time. What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once. And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged - not convicted! As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA! Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email. If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too. You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger. Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife: “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.” That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court! I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people. I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this. You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th. We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL! 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Dr. Kermit Jones
subject: Thank you, sincerely
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55011243/380360441/-608928999?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTAyYTQ1Yy01YjZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Vr_ek_-TDzhdQfd2_D_njT2h2KEJZcs3fM4NBflBBU=&emci=e31de083-ec6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=ee02a45c-5b6b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=16675641)
---
I have conceded in my bid to be the next Congressperson representing the people of California’s Third Congressional District. At this pivotal moment, I want to say thank you. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. To the 1,000 volunteers across 10 counties who have knocked over 160,000 doors – thank you. To the 15,000 individuals who contributed to our campaign – thank you. This was a grassroots effort, and I couldn’t be more proud of the coalition we built, of Republicans, Independents and Democrats alike. We were all unified by a vision for our future that’s bigger than party politics. I also want to thank my family, my wife and my two boys, who all sacrificed a lot over the last 15 months. I’m really excited to spend the next couple of days with my family and friends, thanking supporters and going back to taking care of members of the community as a physician. You all know I’m no stranger to hard work. I grew up on a farm and started working when I was eight years old. My parents really valued education, and taught me discipline and the values of family and community. And I know you each are no stranger to hard work. We always knew this was going to be an uphill battle, and while the fight will continue, this race has unfortunately ended in a loss for our campaign. Tomorrow, nevertheless, we will find new ways to create change in our community. This campaign started because I could no longer sit on the sidelines at a time when we need leaders who will put partisanship aside and step up and serve this community. Every day since I made that decision to run for Congress – I’ve seen why partisan politics are hurting our country. From the gas pump to the grocery store, our working families are hurting. Our families and businesses are doing everything they can to get ahead, but we’re facing an uphill climb. And that hill keeps getting steeper and steeper because politicians are more focused on serving their party and their ideology rather than on serving the people. As you all know by this point, after 9/11 I joined the Navy and served in Iraq with the Marines. When you’re in a combat zone you don’t spend your time worrying about what your differences are, you work together to finish the mission and keep each other safe. That’s what this campaign was about and that’s why I’m so proud each of you were on my team, in my corner and spreading this message. This is not the victory we were hoping for, I know. But I am eternally grateful to each and every one of you. We’re going to keep fighting for the kind of representation we deserve. Thank you! — Dr. Kermit Jones
---

It's time for some honest talk, Fellow American.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $10, $25, $35, or even $500 to you?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=15132277292d4ad39a6d199481ce70d4&_e=_Ynwm6nhEYYc_4Ag61_Esp9GNyFtejQB2HI7w6co0H5ihCqBhYsCAx9zaq2KNq72p3ZTdJl9bqHLWWrveYObgdtKFXCpFEgfTgtF5mLa9n4d359B7dVCD5A7lME6HYLcksZ522ClkibecJzuyKlGwzySZyAzMBxIdNhrASKkgL_AAUVlLfYWdA1Adx-KADoYCTw654JhLxgIkKjonyyJj-mOboWQzprGE1JCZKXxateiI5M7EjmsGvwLjqkJ99QkMXt82qhNsPujm9OfgJjGN3KgwuvHKeZPrvyKy4W0lN_bWQfSLteVAAvGzAp2NktJ78-zXi6ibzLT1P5zE7tzSU_Pf_f0q5u5GXORb2lsTA3af_sz-gB6hk6mWiY5jIo4kPyN1I6v9mvPmLd85_SJlR6eKsmcmlIKi2B2mNA5DZiqfY9r0A8NZLbLRFXzq3_s)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 14 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=15132277292d4ad39a6d199481ce70d4&_e=_Ynwm6nhEYYc_4Ag61_Esp9GNyFtejQB2HI7w6co0H5ihCqBhYsCAx9zaq2KNq72p3ZTdJl9bqHLWWrveYObgdtKFXCpFEgfTgtF5mLa9n4d359B7dVCD5A7lME6HYLcksZ522ClkibecJzuyKlGwzySZyAzMBxIdNhrASKkgL_AAUVlLfYWdA1Adx-KADoYCTw654JhLxgIkKjonyyJj-mOboWQzprGE1JCZKXxateiI5M7EjmsGvwLjqkJ99QkMXt82qhNsPujm9OfgJjGN3KgwuvHKeZPrvyKy4W0lN-n-OzEmrqbS4ompgVlAbdS0naDEm_hJXMjvQwjyr9mcQn2vez8KgVSVEWwQrFN_SnJVNES5mgp1sXanzhM-QzGApqkUP_0wygnteLFo1dVrom7N1fhFgeq3exytTQElBYWH-DuUhzViwUBnjgGxR1U)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Fellow American.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=15132277292d4ad39a6d199481ce70d4&_e=_Ynwm6nhEYYc_4Ag61_Esp9GNyFtejQB2HI7w6co0H5ihCqBhYsCAx9zaq2KNq72p3ZTdJl9bqHLWWrveYObgdtKFXCpFEgfTgtF5mLa9n4d359B7dVCD5A7lME6HYLcksZ522ClkibecJzuyKlGwzySZyAzMBxIdNhrASKkgL_AAUVlLfYWdA1Adx-KADoYCTw654JhLxgIkKjonyyJj-mOboWQzprGE1JCZKXxateiI5M7EjmsGvwLjqkJ99QkMXt82qhNsPujm9OfgJjGN3KgwuvHKeZPrvyKy4W0lN_5jSesPsYk6dPGHj-FGge7e8DskCTcG_SF3cQpeeirQdOHRoSmHvOszKqK2ihRsbJxMxmkmUQKm7drd5YOXURW7iBh5RPtpy17L0bBpxaV3S1-Rsn8PyvjKzPCkZsV6KAxpbYVvFlO-IJPWWVJERnh)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

clean_body: I’m asking you to dig deep. Every other Senate race has now been decided, so it’s going to come down to Georgia. | It's time for some honest talk, Fellow American. I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election. When you read this, I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words. I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory. We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America. I'm asking you to dig deep. Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th. I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track. Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 14 days. I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity. From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. Thank you, Marco Rubio United States Senator | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q_Wqgm0jYGRAZNc-sjyDwapxY8dAShpSa0ttW9T7RVsLp0e7MD4cNA4DOJ4I6SZ8pzoAQuI5GU7lPzNe18LGnkbDWdXvTxuV1AU-bJ5UU5InV4FRi_0NxPFORIiONZEA9ADL7B5wNqcss53zfh2QtNN8TbPOwQ8bnFBeAdJ6Ma8R_LQLIaVE8536w2UJ6skYICYAud05utj5fTKbjUyvHt1WCZ_yhlRjzc88R-knqhrAw/3re/aXwgB3qlTrGgCDXvEDiC1g/h0/tmo8hZO_1MOWCKelYplkjp7Ko-GKw0GjBCfOU8YFu08)
Peter, This Thanksgiving, we are grateful for you. We are so lucky to have had your support in the year since we’ve launched this project, and as we gear up for the major fight ahead. With your help, we’ve helped educate Arizona voters about Kyrsten Sinema’s obstruction and laid the groundwork for a strong primary challenge against her. Because of your support, we’re building a movement that will replace her with a real Democratic Senator that Arizona deserves – one who puts their constituents’ interests above corporate interests and one who prioritizes our fundamental rights above political machinations. We’re also thankful for all the work you did this year to Save the Senate. With your help, three out of our six endorsed candidates – all of whom are ready to reform the filibuster – won their races, and Senator Raphael Warnock is poised to become the fourth following the Georgia run-offs. If he wins his race, Kyrsten Sinema will become much less powerful in the Democratic caucus. Your support played a huge role in electing REAL Democrats this year, and we couldn’t be more grateful to have you on our side heading into what will be a tough 2024 cycle. Soon, we will have some big announcements about the future of this campaign, and we can’t wait to share them with you. In the meantime, we hope you have a wonderful holiday with your friends, family, and loved ones–you’ve earned it. Thanks again for all your support and Happy Thanksgiving! -Your friends at Primary Sinema and Save the Senate [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSaBM8RnL7zC5hCd1G4NCzbIayuVtwgVwvQDCHOeq_5BEC0g6Tv9foVakloYnDylm95XPhbFJw_fPmbe5khwYDt3CPBjc-8YWPNwEJLx8XALw91_oLWESCfhBETkp4XPhkNrYlZBqE6Yvtvvb1KChfpHUFUKwoNcavRuG57T61Gi2mW6QwBhuA7T8E0ccYkWMSLsci-Kw7jSue9ZTKHn2vc-g0kE51KhlB-4K4e7HfSr6s-_RS5JdeE4GVXtlXD0G5dGSSl_FhVo0-cU7WDWt4Vm2LnD9pYWsYn-zFuAN0--5frE7bL8qAAJWG-yA8tZOk/3re/aXwgB3qlTrGgCDXvEDiC1g/h1/oqfToBxqMmySIbcRN8-2lEv8xEydZHCbU2cnmM-Qs3s) | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Together we have accomplished so much to be thankful for
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55013587/380361728/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzBmMWVlNC01YzZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3SuI5wNzfR5yevAID71_jrn7VuHqVcWjtWM7TF-Ap08=&emci=7c417d45-ca6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=7c0f1ee4-5c6b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=9818364)
---

| | **As I reflect on all that I am thankful for, what rises to the top of the list is this grassroots movement** : a team of hard-working folks who want to see a better America stepping up to create change. I am grateful for the**hundreds of volunteers** who knocked on doors and called and texted voters for me and Democratic candidates across Oregon. I am grateful for the **thousands of people who donated** what they could this election cycle. Every dollar went to reaching out and spreading our progressive message. And I am grateful to **all of the Oregon voters** who participated in our democratic process and mailed or dropped off their ballots earlier this month. **Because of your hard work, we elected Tina Kotek as Oregon's next governor.** She cares deeply about Oregon and will protect reproductive rights, compassionately address the housing crisis, and ensure Oregon remains a leader in the fight against the climate crisis. **We helped elect Andrea Salinas and Val Hoyle to the U.S. House.** More women are now in the Oregon delegation than ever before. These two progressive leaders are ready to fight to improve the lives of all Oregonians. With a narrow Republican majority, they'll face some challenges, but there is no question they're up to the fight. Finally, I owe a debt of gratitude to this grassroots movement for helping to reelect me to the U.S. Senate. I will continue to fight for working families and advance our progressive priorities. **Together we have accomplished so much to be thankful for this year. And I'm confident our movement will continue to grow and create more positive change for Oregonians and all Americans**. Happy Thanksgiving, _Ron_ |
---|---|---

---

We've been emailing a lot about the Georgia Runoff Election to re-elect Rev. Warnock and defeat Trump puppet Herschel Walker.
We’re sorry if you’re feeling overwhelmed. Because it’s a lot. We know that.
But we’re just 13 SHORT DAYS from Election Day.
And Warnock is being drowned in the airwaves by Trump and McConnell’s Dark Money PACs. That’s why we are counting on donations from our digital grassroots team.
The harsh reality is: Warnock had a slim lead in the 2022 election: – just 35,000 votes ahead. But polls are showing his runoff is in a DEAD-HEAT. If he’s elected, we’ll ELIMINATE Joe Manchin’s power-hold on the Senate. So we’re giving this everything we have. We MUST raise $10,000 for his campaign to fight back and get voters to the polls. But our deadline is coming up fast! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-nov22-warnock?refcode=EM_FR_112322_B1_WARNOCK_30AC&amount=5]

name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: Is this really the outcome you want?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I’m asking you to dig deep. Every other Senate race has now been decided, so it’s going to come down to Georgia. |
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8a2fb1cf27a740419c6f950ee8a121d0&_e=HMuDV7EB1h7J1v9KY7IYeCdin3xFSB0-a4sSskpiGxcB-MF06BRE1n2wxvgWeHNxKKzmkSRTyo_Vp5d4SQX4bBniv5qeC90AhGIMhyXsggkcx6N56OZulzHuWhFRe0p_7VQR6jIZ9Bv0Im1Tq-wnhceZtnbAIvrpiL6g3WnvUdc24StgNOjSIooa1NkZBOS9Glsi2ndnsnlpMFBpaE7eb3eBXoSGDFG0qt9AGEQVAdqNWm-0IEnI4gNrbgDLDO98bUkF5AePVKiOkHYu708lA2MFFUxf_ZGpDw1epTIFUiOm2qxzC0tgmklIktjNF-iNL0cfaYJjGlBFwNmf5nRw07wg9HGyRRFwhR3yhPiLvwSJioOLjJZwLZ7i_lWuM7MgN5_N4BrnrSTrPqDVQlnaHI6VF_tdeIZQV5sCcV194Eu-lsIT0hhTzKKWZTE84SqC)

It's time for some honest talk, Fellow American.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $10, $25, $35, or even $500 to you?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8a2fb1cf27a740419c6f950ee8a121d0&_e=HMuDV7EB1h7J1v9KY7IYeCdin3xFSB0-a4sSskpiGxcB-MF06BRE1n2wxvgWeHNxKKzmkSRTyo_Vp5d4SQX4bBniv5qeC90AhGIMhyXsggkcx6N56OZulzHuWhFRe0p_7VQR6jIZ9Bv0Im1Tq-wnhceZtnbAIvrpiL6g3WnvUdc24StgNOjSIooa1NkZBOS9Glsi2ndnsnlpMFBpaE7eb3eBXoSGDFG0qt9AGEQVAdqNWm-0IEnI4gNrbgDLDO98bUkF5AePVKiOkHYu708lA2MFFUxf_ZGpDw1epTIFUiM-UgB5KlO00eWF4CRSTo-V3wOZ7zIxMbqrigR6loTRcl6ohZmws-CT3ccYp7T1JWCiDX6PJEhNRZ8zeSk02sJmds7JRZ9C1KQ1XwkQ2UWOeXvBQKHPkzQtI2R3UMuARlxH8YwFpALUxFu7353q2Eu-)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 14 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8a2fb1cf27a740419c6f950ee8a121d0&_e=HMuDV7EB1h7J1v9KY7IYeCdin3xFSB0-a4sSskpiGxcB-MF06BRE1n2wxvgWeHNxKKzmkSRTyo_Vp5d4SQX4bBniv5qeC90AhGIMhyXsggkcx6N56OZulzHuWhFRe0p_7VQR6jIZ9Bv0Im1Tq-wnhceZtnbAIvrpiL6g3WnvUdc24StgNOjSIooa1NkZBOS9Glsi2ndnsnlpMFBpaE7eb3eBXoSGDFG0qt9AGEQVAdqNWm-0IEnI4gNrbgDLDO98bUkF5AePVKiOkHYu708lA2MFFUxf_ZGpDw1epTIFUiOCX89LPamr3VO2_xQGFNbkNIVuAd0D9OdTyRKMs7o8LPe_4p4XcM6vy25F3lXIOR-XHkvgzEYUOiso_lNTjveoZj9rUyBhEu1_IhTd5TMWhb4BotI9EqA66JarLMuongZoNz38nxL48odvS7JTMWoE)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Fellow American.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8a2fb1cf27a740419c6f950ee8a121d0&_e=HMuDV7EB1h7J1v9KY7IYeCdin3xFSB0-a4sSskpiGxcB-MF06BRE1n2wxvgWeHNxKKzmkSRTyo_Vp5d4SQX4bBniv5qeC90AhGIMhyXsggkcx6N56OZulzHuWhFRe0p_7VQR6jIZ9Bv0Im1Tq-wnhceZtnbAIvrpiL6g3WnvUdc24StgNOjSIooa1NkZBOS9Glsi2ndnsnlpMFBpaE7eb3eBXoSGDFG0qt9AGEQVAdqNWm-0IEnI4gNrbgDLDO98bUkF5AePVKiOkHYu708lA2MFFUxf_ZGpDw1epTIFUiNC6EIDaigWYsKBqtfGXw1TDQUZZ47d7y7eDOV9s9BAUwSwd6BWV7bnHIQDtqrz0yoyh7Iy-0jcHxTL040JNK_TfXrtwNnoiU7vWsdnVqji04XJ98PZjKoHYVR7BfZp9RZ6SZWhIM8gNUUxfgV977WF)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8a2fb1cf27a740419c6f950ee8a121d0&_e=HMuDV7EB1h7J1v9KY7IYeCdin3xFSB0-a4sSskpiGxcB-MF06BRE1n2wxvgWeHNxKKzmkSRTyo_Vp5d4SQX4bBniv5qeC90AhGIMhyXsggkcx6N56OZulzHuWhFRe0p_7VQR6jIZ9Bv0Im1Tq-wnhceZtnbAIvrpiL6g3WnvUdc24StgNOjSIooa1NkZBOS9Glsi2ndnsnlpMFBpaE7eb3eBXoSGDFG0qt9AGEQVAdqNWm-0IEnI4gNrbgDLDO98bUkF5AePVKiOkHYu708lA2MFFUxf_ZGpDw1epTIFUiNZyIXIes45Gr-yu204ttwNjY3_SS4bzoUT2mPtHZpmkl00i2JKAgFP8L_mjpX2sKBWhsyniUbPScSDr-eAEvYpOJyIg4og3w11hEaKt_nxv66NloetqnmLDGbl7sE-YBG_Wn0SK03b9y6ade-FQwXr)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio

clean_body: I’m asking you to dig deep. Every other Senate race has now been decided, so it’s going to come down to Georgia. | It's time for some honest talk, Fellow American. I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election. When you read this, I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words. I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory. We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America. I'm asking you to dig deep. Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th. I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. - Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track. Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 14 days. I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity. From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. Thank you, Marco Rubio United States Senator | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Susan Wild
subject: I’m thankful for this team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I hope your day is filled with loved ones, good food, and spreading gratitude.

| Peter,

Like many of you, I’ll be spending tomorrow thinking about what I’m grateful for – and this year especially, my list is long!

I am thankful for my family, who give me so much joy, and who sustain me through the tough times.

I am thankful for the community here in Pennsylvania’s 7th district, from Lehighton to Easton and everywhere in between.

I am thankful to have had this team’s support in the toughest election of my career, and I am honored to have earned your trust to continue representing our community in Congress.

I hope your day is filled with loved ones, good food, and spreading gratitude.

Endlessly thankful,
Susan
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
why it’s a bad idea
|
---

---
I’ll keep this quick, friend. I know folks have a tendency to tune out after a big election. But here’s why that’s a bad idea:
* The 2022 elections aren’t even over (Raphael Warnock’s runoff election is on December 6)
* What happens in the next few months could determine whether Donald Trump – or someone like Ron DeSantis – is the GOP frontrunner in 2024
* And 2023 will bring more elections, including the _critical_ **state supreme court election in Wisconsin.**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54984752/380290628/-540275122?amount=30&refcode=20221122.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4ZGRlYjJkLTM3NmItZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=amdbt-vKb7JEw-7Hvch4Izv9G0cFnpsn53kxLryyRL4=)**
---
Let’s recap: Wisconsin just reelected a Democratic governor, Tony Evers, by 3.5 points. However, due to extreme gerrymandering, Republicans will control 67% of seats in the state Senate and 64% in state Assembly next year. Outrageous!

BUT: According to _Esquire_ , “The best chance that Wisconsin has to [undo its gerrymanders] comes next April, when an election **could bring a Democratic majority to the state supreme court.** ” So you can see why it’s so important that states like Wisconsin elect fair-minded justices!

The NDRC is committed to helping elect officials who will defend fair maps and a strong democracy, but we can’t do it without you. **Please don’t tune out, friend.[_Chip in now to help us do our work!_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54984753/380290629/-540275122?amount=30&refcode=20221122.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4ZGRlYjJkLTM3NmItZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=amdbt-vKb7JEw-7Hvch4Izv9G0cFnpsn53kxLryyRL4=)**

clean_body: why it’s a bad idea | | = I’ll keep this quick, friend. I know folks have a tendency to tune out after a big election. But here’s why that’s a bad idea: The 2022 elections aren’t even over (Raphael Warnock’s runoff election is on December 6) What happens in the next few months could determine whether Donald Trump – or someone like Ron DeSantis – is the GOP frontrunner in 2024 And 2023 will bring more elections, including the critical state supreme court election in Wisconsin. = Let’s recap: Wisconsin just reelected a Democratic governor, Tony Evers, by 3.5 points. However, due to extreme gerrymandering, Republicans will control 67% of seats in the state Senate and 64% in state Assembly next year. Outrageous! BUT: According to Esquire , “The best chance that Wisconsin has to [undo its gerrymanders] comes next April, when an election could bring a Democratic majority to the state supreme court. ” So you can see why it’s so important that states like Wisconsin elect fair-minded justices! The NDRC is committed to helping elect officials who will defend fair maps and a strong democracy, but we can’t do it without you. Please don’t tune out, friend.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks, Tara = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to you?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943199:6hZDlCGqN:m:1:3371220873:F218D724907BA0B14A0390FEA20C3A94:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943199:6hZDlCGqN:m:1:3371220873:F218D724907BA0B14A0390FEA20C3A94:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943199:6hZDlCGqN:m:1:3371220873:F218D724907BA0B14A0390FEA20C3A94:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943199:6hZDlCGqN:m:1:3371220873:F218D724907BA0B14A0390FEA20C3A94:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zouodhmebpdgehaq59f4ptl5lm7n83mj125q8ag0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9j60o36clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u9g64olke5ob2dbgcuqbdcr5cuq67crkc5h61c34ckqb3dplm8ojcshj6cqj8c37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfcjhcpqe5cr0cur66phhm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z96stnerbh70h8l4tr1qbfkk438hbs77rv209768_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9j60o36clh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zopldr2t45lbehucpaj6i0mp7pgl5bqst0eaphm0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9j60o36clh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbv0ll6k06vgl8ri40jsgm356ujoaj8ljur0mvto_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9j60o36clh2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zud6ibgp22dhtj6pjiksctfgibr2q81139nt8m6g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9j60o36clh2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0bm3s9k4javs1c7ckaua0cvc6uc9mlndonhjvu8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9j60o36clh2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3jjkgqmhrffp46hn9dbof5afdjmf1neplujqfv0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s9j60o36clh2bs)

name: Your America
subject: Join the exclusive C.S. Lewis study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6486%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=C03NQOmfAKBjMbDXqPYACw&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83426%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f%2bqbN7N75C4208DPSsfztw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis’s writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here’s a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_“Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking.” - Tammy from Georgia_

_“The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately.” - Bob from Colorado_

_“It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now.” - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” for FREE -starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83427%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NJHlh%2bk7QBBTMH7fT0erCQ&sysid=1)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis’s timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: I’m humbly asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | It’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:** **[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and the DSCC to keep Georgia blue and fight for every Senate seat?](https://go.dscc.org/go/5319?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20221123-RevWarnock-WarnockPositive-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20221123-RevWarnock-WarnockPositive-Pros-sl1&akid=8875%2E9716520%2E2JqEsr)**

GOP donors are flooding our race with over $122 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going _all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help.**

**[Please, will you split a donation of $5 or more now between me and the DSCC so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/5319?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20221123-RevWarnock-WarnockPositive-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20221123-RevWarnock-WarnockPositive-Pros-sl1&akid=8875%2E9716520%2E2JqEsr)**

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
And we're defending him in court!

| | | Peter, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947648:JM6g2CGMN:m:1:3331703221:6D98B9888586B29596AAD0731F1E78E0:r) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in - by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947648:JM6g2CGMN:m:1:3331703221:6D98B9888586B29596AAD0731F1E78E0:r) Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. **[Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947648:JM6g2CGMN:m:1:3331703221:6D98B9888586B29596AAD0731F1E78E0:r) ** I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. clean_body: And we're defending him in court! | | | Peter, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming. Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our team is representing him in court. Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act... and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family. We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dW5q4sQf1O-6PIIt9r-0djgx-Ev2tmvBR6lB-JucC-kXPComDeluxMHbzug5-yNLXK4VreFbaiidyQSrwfJwFebHdXopzw_fnb4-aOK6-UdHmXb8ynO2N4iYi4mbwQXxsRyjWEWYKnC9Q8_cKmNstu73ZUacTlwBCyDK0YOtAG0WbO_nh-w25FCvUOICBuJUsXfhpKPRBZTNDSf3tmLOnzDr3htf9Brh5cyvHAq3uZvhHBp4SzAedOOmK4ZrSIIdZMHeAmdttsqwkQz5ZH6uxsP8Le-rM2Vlr1_jq-xZvJWv5hgVGknlm5I9bPKQRQx7f8JwAMAWnyPklFPl_UDMHtXHzAKHaxHu2VoSDEJ8GQc=&c=YuOukU0aU6BaJz-FNuVXPjeCpglWbcEkvoGlPG061IBaop23vtfdJg==&ch=30euFU0Oi38ayulIoteYS0ut7XppB52rGnbwaU2CcfiY39WZ0oBfDQ==)

|
Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
Tara and I wish you a Happy Thanksgiving filled with joy and gratitude. I am truly grateful to have supporters like you who put your faith in me to represent our values in Congress. I won't let you down.
This week, I joined Leader McCarthy and other Republicans at our southern border in El Paso, where I sent a message to Mexican cartel leaders that their time is up come January 3rd.
As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your campaign brief:
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| MY MESSAGE TO THE CARTELS
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dW5q4sQf1O-6PIIt9r-0djgx-Ev2tmvBR6lB-JucC-kXPComDeluxMHbzug5-yNL3Ua6MPGFUSlX5e9nMySzGqPJX8Bfe5kS-ytEt2HdB-OuXYT8VmSu2XkvEpmz9i9cIjS8uf5C4v5X73HBfE_P6_qqzM4rOMNiguCOzrmvrjtnP5mbiAO_aSCVix9HCysoFWqWScEmf8HgoF9bSlqQTr5VBDKx6e6j&c=YuOukU0aU6BaJz-FNuVXPjeCpglWbcEkvoGlPG061IBaop23vtfdJg==&ch=30euFU0Oi38ayulIoteYS0ut7XppB52rGnbwaU2CcfiY39WZ0oBfDQ==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dW5q4sQf1O-6PIIt9r-0djgx-Ev2tmvBR6lB-JucC-kXPComDeluxMHbzug5-yNL3Ua6MPGFUSlX5e9nMySzGqPJX8Bfe5kS-ytEt2HdB-OuXYT8VmSu2XkvEpmz9i9cIjS8uf5C4v5X73HBfE_P6_qqzM4rOMNiguCOzrmvrjtnP5mbiAO_aSCVix9HCysoFWqWScEmf8HgoF9bSlqQTr5VBDKx6e6j&c=YuOukU0aU6BaJz-FNuVXPjeCpglWbcEkvoGlPG061IBaop23vtfdJg==&ch=30euFU0Oi38ayulIoteYS0ut7XppB52rGnbwaU2CcfiY39WZ0oBfDQ==)
---
| |
---
| On Tuesday, I joined Leader McCarthy and other Republicans for a tour of our southern border in El Paso. Across the river from us were camps of immigrants just waiting for the right moment to cross illegally into the United States. There have been over 4 million illegal crossings since Biden took office, and yet this administration doesn't care. They have allowed our border to fall under the control of the Mexican drug cartels, some of the most capable, best equipped, best funded and most ruthless and dangerous organizations in the world.
This is not just an immigration crisis. This is a national security crisis. These cartels flood our country with deadly fentanyl that kills nearly 80,000 Americans a year. This is a war and the Biden Administration is doing nothing about it.
During a [press conference](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dW5q4sQf1O-6PIIt9r-0djgx-Ev2tmvBR6lB-JucC-kXPComDeluxMHbzug5-yNLmln4c_gSdXloTHvElVjPD7jCF1Dkb8oroU_5mS0eGxb6aqRc5CMg8GdXT62bfT7cS_mPsVgjaiFO66Sb8uwH2FtmHhfBM-yh&c=YuOukU0aU6BaJz-FNuVXPjeCpglWbcEkvoGlPG061IBaop23vtfdJg==&ch=30euFU0Oi38ayulIoteYS0ut7XppB52rGnbwaU2CcfiY39WZ0oBfDQ==) at the border, I spoke this message in Spanish to the cartel leaders:
To the cartels: Ismael Mario Zambada Garcia, Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes, Juan Pablo Ledezma, and others. Your vacation is over. Now you will be prosecuted. We're coming for your money, we're coming for your mansions, we're coming for your liberty. We are not going to ignore your crimes against our country and against our citizens. Starting now, you will not be able to hide and now your reign of terror is over.
These cartels don't fear us now. But they will soon.
---
| |
---
| | |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. Tara and I wish you a Happy Thanksgiving filled with joy and gratitude. I am truly grateful to have supporters like you who put your faith in me to represent our values in Congress. I won't let you down. This week, I joined Leader McCarthy and other Republicans at our southern border in El Paso, where I sent a message to Mexican cartel leaders that their time is up come January 3rd. As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your campaign brief: | | | | | | | | MY MESSAGE TO THE CARTELS | | | == | == | | | On Tuesday, I joined Leader McCarthy and other Republicans for a tour of our southern border in El Paso. Across the river from us were camps of immigrants just waiting for the right moment to cross illegally into the United States. There have been over 4 million illegal crossings since Biden took office, and yet this administration doesn't care. They have allowed our border to fall under the control of the Mexican drug cartels, some of the most capable, best equipped, best funded and most ruthless and dangerous organizations in the world. This is not just an immigration crisis. This is a national security crisis. These cartels flood our country with deadly fentanyl that kills nearly 80,000 Americans a year. This is a war and the Biden Administration is doing nothing about it. During a == at the border, I spoke this message in Spanish to the cartel leaders: To the cartels: Ismael Mario Zambada Garcia, Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes, Juan Pablo Ledezma, and others. Your vacation is over. Now you will be prosecuted. We're coming for your money, we're coming for your mansions, we're coming for your liberty. We are not going to ignore your crimes against our country and against our citizens. Starting now, you will not be able to hide and now your reign of terror is over. These cartels don't fear us now. But they will soon. | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | Recommended Reads | THOMAS SOWELL: == WSJ: == That's it for this week's (brief) campaign brief. name: Vernon Robinson
subject: Don't let Herschel Walker Twist in the Wind
body:
|
Peter \-- I'm hoping that you are not going to let Herschel Walker twist in the wind. I've heard all kinds of crazy stuff. "The Republic is gone so why bother." or "Trump announced so Walker's done for." "The Democrats are spending lots of money. We can't compete." And my personal favorite, "I don't live in Georgia. They have donors down there. They should write a check." Well, I hope you're not deluded to that extent. And if the Dem could steal the Senate race, they would have stolen the Governor's race in Georgia which they did not. Senators outside of your state affect you. The Libertarian candidate took over ninety thousand votes, over two times the margin between Walker and the communist. I have spent a good chunk of my adult life trying to elect black Republicans and get black voters to elect Republicans of any ethnic background. If we let Herschel twist in the wind, it will be very hard to get black Republicans to run for office because "remember Herschel Walker" will be the refrain. "If they let him twist in the wind why should I run to have the same thing happen to me." I need your donation for as much as you are able to give today. You might ask, why shouldn't you give directly to the campaign? Well, because his consultants are like all the other consultants who make money producing expensive TV ads and buying expensive TV ad time instead of buying urban contemporary radio to reach half of the black electorate each week in that market with an unfiltered message. Only urban contemporary radio can drive Warnock under 90% of the black vote. If he gets less than 90% he will lose. You know we did that for Tillis (NC) in 2014, Hawley (MO) and Blackburn (TN) in 2018 and Vance (OH) and Budd (NC) this year. We were instrumental in keeping Warnock under 50% of the total vote. `Please give $0 ``or whatever you can.` | [](https://www.blackamericansmaga.org/donate?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=twist&n=1 "Please donate Today") [Please donate Today](https://www.blackamericansmaga.org/donate?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=twist&n=1)
---
`Remember you can give an unlimited amount as either an American citizen or corporation.`
Thank you for stepping up before and thank you in advance for helping do the hard work of freedom with your donation today.
Vernon Robinson, Co-Founder Black Americans Making America First (formally known as Black Americans to re-elect the President)
PS. Help get our hard hitting ads up for another week asking black voters for their support by forwarding this email to your friends and asking them to match your contribution.
[](https://www.blackamericansmaga.org/donate?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=twist&n=2 "Please donate Now") [Please donate Now](https://www.blackamericansmaga.org/donate?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=twist&n=2)
---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: This is the most important detail
body:
| | |
---
I can’t thank you enough for everything you have done this year (and in past years) to save the United States from those who want to fundamentally transform and destroy our beloved country. **And, as a grassroots organization, your input matters more than anything else. We can’t chart the right course for 2023 without your feedback today.** After the 2020 election, the grassroots told us to focus primarily on election integrity, and that is what we did. The good news is there were many advances made this year on that front, but as we saw in the election that just passed, there is still so much to be done. That is why I need to hear from you – to know where you want us to focus as an organization and kind of work you think still needs to be done on election integrity in 2023, so that together, we can prepare for 2024. You can complete the survey by clicking this link:**[https://tpp.me/eisurvey](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._Mcp_zziJZ99SI3jGH_xyw)** Again, I am so deeply grateful for you and for the value your knowledge, wisdom, and ideas bring to our movement. I’m sure that without you, we would have already lost the fight. Thank you for sharing your thoughts and time. In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin P.S. It would be helpful if you could submit your survey responses no later than Sunday, November 27th, so we can begin reviewing responses.
---
| | [COMPLETE MY SURVEY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-HMTMyjAqVqYGonGqqt_0g)

name: Raphael Warnock (via URD)
subject: I'm counting on you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
| | | Peter: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.** My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. clean_body: | | | Peter: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it. My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. That’s why I have to ask: I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress. They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like youwith me to win – now more than ever. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: Thank you, Reverend Warnock United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

name: Cindy Cerquitella
subject: I have a secret. Promise not to tell
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941371:6-piECGN6:m:1:3369487795:08C60AB3CD4151DDEB43534FD28A1314:r)

Hello Peter,

I have a secret to tell you -- just make sure to keep it from the radical Left.

Here it is: **America 's Future has spies inside their organizations. **

And we have people working behind enemy lines in companies like CNN, Google, and TikTok.

My name is Cindy Cerquitella, executive director at America's Future (AF). AF helps young professionals to become effective, lifelong advocates who inspire others to embrace freedom.

You see, America's Future members are young, liberty-minded professionals working to build a freer culture in America.

**And they need your support, Peter.** That's why I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters before the end of the week.

[_**Can you support a student today by chipping in just $25, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941371:6-piECGN6:m:1:3369487795:08C60AB3CD4151DDEB43534FD28A1314:r)

Many popular conservative and libertarian writers you hear about today were often AF members when they were younger. But that's not all.

**AF members may live across the country and work in different sectors, but they all have one goal in mind: continuing the fight for liberty.**

AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming.

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce.

**America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists. **

We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs.

Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term.

[_**Support a young professional today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941371:6-piECGN6:m:1:3369487795:08C60AB3CD4151DDEB43534FD28A1314:r)

By building up lifelong advocates, supporting young leaders, and building robust communities that believe in freedom, America's Future can turn the tide where it matters most.

These brave liberty activists who work behind enemy lines all started at the same point as our new members. But thanks to generous supporters like you, they have moved into leadership positions where they can make a change.

Peter, can you invest in the future of America by supporting an AF member? **Click below to send your gift and help us reach our goal.**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941372:6-piECGN6:m:1:3369487795:08C60AB3CD4151DDEB43534FD28A1314:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941373:6-piECGN6:m:1:3369487795:08C60AB3CD4151DDEB43534FD28A1314:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941374:6-piECGN6:m:1:3369487795:08C60AB3CD4151DDEB43534FD28A1314:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941375:6-piECGN6:m:1:3369487795:08C60AB3CD4151DDEB43534FD28A1314:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941376:6-piECGN6:m:1:3369487795:08C60AB3CD4151DDEB43534FD28A1314:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941377:6-piECGN6:m:1:3369487795:08C60AB3CD4151DDEB43534FD28A1314:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941378:6-piECGN6:m:1:3369487795:08C60AB3CD4151DDEB43534FD28A1314:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941371:6-piECGN6:m:1:3369487795:08C60AB3CD4151DDEB43534FD28A1314:r)

Thank you,

Cindy Cerquitella
Executive Director
America's Future

Since 1995, America's Future has been the premier nationwide network of liberty-minded young leaders, providing unique opportunities to learn the ideas of liberty and develop the skills necessary to articulate them.
