Friend, I'll be quick:
**With the runoff officially underway, national Republicans are blanketing the airwaves with attack ads to defeat me, elect Herschel Walker, and flip this Senate seat red.**
The good news is that we're fighting back with TV ads of our own. But at this critical moment, we're falling short of what we need to keep them on the air, reach critical voters, and win this race.
We simply cannot afford to be at a disadvantage in this runoff, so I'm counting on you to help keep our TV ads live and power our campaign to victory:

**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I'm grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we're in a runoff election against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win.

Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That's why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

name: Joe Cunningham
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina
body:
| Friends —

This won’t be a long message, but a short one: Thank you!

I wanted to wish everyone a happy Thanksgiving and remind everyone there is much to be thankful for. However, we can be both thankful for what we have, yet motivated to pursue what we deserve. And change the things we believe are wrong. Those feelings are not mutually exclusive — we can have both.

If you’re reading this, you’ve likely been supportive of our message of bridging the partisan divide and building upon what we have in common rather than what’s dividing us. Thank you for fighting alongside me to bring out the best of what this country offers.

From my family to yours, have a great Thanksgiving and may we all remember the reason for the holiday while recognizing we can still be hungry for more — even after that second plate :).

Thankful,

Joe

clean_body: | Friends — This won’t be a long message, but a short one: Thank you! I wanted to wish everyone a happy Thanksgiving and remind everyone there is much to be thankful for. However, we can be both thankful for what we have, yet motivated to pursue what we deserve. And change the things we believe are wrong. Those feelings are not mutually exclusive — we can have both. If you’re reading this, you’ve likely been supportive of our message of bridging the partisan divide and building upon what we have in common rather than what’s dividing us. Thank you for fighting alongside me to bring out the best of what this country offers. From my family to yours, have a great Thanksgiving and may we all remember the reason for the holiday while recognizing we can still be hungry for more — even after that second plate :). Thankful, Joe | | If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from our team, Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina Joe Cunningham PO Box 21012 Charleston, SC 29413 United States **

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Georgia is the second most expensive state to vote in. It costs .98 cents for each person to vote. President Biden won this swing state in 2020 by only 12,670 votes--out of just under 500,000 votes cast. … It's simple. $5 gets us 5 votes to the polls. Can you help at this vital time?
body:
Voting starts Saturday
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta41f7ca4-ec4f-40b6-b225-526cb92eaf0c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_$5. $10. $25. These are the kinds of donations that could make the difference between a Senator Warnock and a Senator (gulp...) Herschel Walker._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87beefe2-c9bd-45ad-9bba-ecdea6eae0f6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Sadly, we were not able to end Lauren Boebert's political career this time due to only 554 votes. 554. Alternatively, our great ally Senator Catherine Cortez Masto held her seat, winning the entire state of Nevada by only 9,007 votes. In 2020, the GOP won a U.S. House seat in Iowa by only 6 votes. Yes, you read that right._** **_Georgia, according to Democracy Docket, is the second most expensive state to vote in. It costs .98 cents for each person to vote. This is in a close swing state that President Biden won in 2020 by only 12,670 votes--out of just under 500,000 votes cast.__ _** **_It's simple. $5 gets us 5 votes to the polls in this razor-thin swing state. $10 can get 10 votes. And so on. This is it, our last election this cycle. It is so important to again reject Trump, McConnell, gain momentum and add a vote on each Senate committee so we get crucial bills on women's rights, climate, gay rights, gun safety and so much more onto the Senate floor._ **
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Get out the vote in Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10ea2a11-fd03-4e3f-ba87-3e2dafce4b1a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_In only three days--this Saturday--early voting in Georgia begins. Can we, the Blue Amp Action community, once again show our strength and be a difference maker? _** [**_Can you give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to get Georgia Democrats to the polls to strengthen The Peach State and America?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f7bf685-5657-45af-91fd-81ef64c7ed73/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
**We're. So. Close. Thank you all, once again, for your determination to protect democracy.**
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Re-elect Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te4e9054f-916e-4ec5-95c0-d73afcf43bd4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/warnock-costofvotesingeorgia4-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T93d666f7-c44a-4586-8a0d-c9ad7f20c975/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=90559573-37f0-4817-bd23-7b5f86dd9519&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=90559573-37f0-4817-bd23-7b5f86dd9519&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: This isn’t over
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947696:6i-zoCGVN:m:1:3331703221:1F9E7EADD33257A3521448B1E7CD9234:r)

It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947696:6i-zoCGVN:m:1:3331703221:1F9E7EADD33257A3521448B1E7CD9234:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947696:6i-zoCGVN:m:1:3331703221:1F9E7EADD33257A3521448B1E7CD9234:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947696:6i-zoCGVN:m:1:3331703221:1F9E7EADD33257A3521448B1E7CD9234:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947696:6i-zoCGVN:m:1:3331703221:1F9E7EADD33257A3521448B1E7CD9234:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947696:6i-zoCGVN:m:1:3331703221:1F9E7EADD33257A3521448B1E7CD9234:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947697:6i-zoCGVN:m:1:3331703221:1F9E7EADD33257A3521448B1E7CD9234:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947698:6i-zoCGVN:m:1:3331703221:1F9E7EADD33257A3521448B1E7CD9234:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947699:6i-zoCGVN:m:1:3331703221:1F9E7EADD33257A3521448B1E7CD9234:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947700:6i-zoCGVN:m:1:3331703221:1F9E7EADD33257A3521448B1E7CD9234:r)

However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election. When you read this, I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words. I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory. We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America. I'm asking you to dig deep. Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th. I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track. Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days. I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity. From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. Thank you, Marco Rubio United States Senator | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 9, 2022. name: Dan Goldman
subject: Happy Thanksgiving.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York
body:
Dan Goldman for New York [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94087/images/dsg_logo.png]
Peter,

This Thanksgiving, I have so much to be thankful for.

I’m thankful for my family, who has shown incredible patience and support throughout this journey.

I’m thankful for the voters of New York’s 10th Congressional District, for entrusting me with the privilege of representing them in Congress.

And I'm especially grateful for you, Peter.

Whether you have been with us since Day One or just joined us recently, I’m so grateful to have your support.

By supporting me, you have demonstrated a true commitment to our democracy and the rule of law. Together we will strive to build a stronger, fairer, and more equitable future for New Yorkers and proud patriots around the country.

Our work is just beginning but I’m thankful to have you by my side.

Wishing you and your family a safe and healthy Thanksgiving,

Dan
Dan Goldman for New York
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008
United States
dangoldmanforny.com [https://www.dangoldmanforny.com/] | info@dangoldmanforny.com [info@dangoldmanforny.com]

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Help feed families in need this holiday season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Thanksgiving is just one day away and there’s so much to be thankful for this year. But this is also a critical time for local food banks in communities across Illinois. Food banks have played an essential role in supporting families throughout the COVID-19 pandemic.
Now it’s time for us to step up and offer support back. I have selected six different food banks serving different parts of our state that need our support to help feed families in need this holiday season.
**[Will you step up and pitch in $5 now to help feed Illinois families in need this holiday season?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55017712/380379052/-308447507?refcode=dd_em_221123_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzlhMTFiOS02ZjZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OdaZCPuF68JkZ3uhiepi0FP6Y3SL0uK0NmRPUY1aPI=)**
Your donation will be split among the Greater Chicago Food Depository, Midwest Food Bank, Operation Food Search, Northeast Community Fund, the Central Illinois Food Bank, and the Northern Illinois Food Bank.
This holiday season, put politics aside and step up to do something for families in need. Our neighbors need support now more than ever.
**[Split a donation to help families in need across the state. Contribute $5 or any amount now to support Illinois food banks this Thanksgiving.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55017713/380379053/-308447507?refcode=dd_em_221123_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzlhMTFiOS02ZjZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OdaZCPuF68JkZ3uhiepi0FP6Y3SL0uK0NmRPUY1aPI=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Wishing you a joyful Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter,

I wish you a happy and safe Thanksgiving.

Serving the people of the district where I was born, grew up and raised my family is the greatest honor of my life and I am grateful for your support and friendship. I hope that you’re surrounded with the love of your friends and family during this festive season.

Happy Thanksgiving to you and your family,

Mike

November 23, 2022 Dear Friends, We are so very thankful for each of you, your gifts, talents, and the ways that you helped to forge our team into a movement like Pennsylvania has never seen before. We are blessed! Each of you poured so much into the campaign this year; we bonded and grew together. We shared so many wonderful memories as we walked side by side to garner over 2.2 million votes!! Outperforming every Republican Gubernatorial candidate over the past 60 years! Beyond this, we showed that unity (on a large scale) is possible and that lies from the left did not stop us. But Truth continues to be truth, no matter what the media says. So, here we are at Thanksgiving! Psalm 100:4 tells us to “enter His gates with thanksgiving and his courts with praise.” There is power in being grateful and giving thanks! Please take time to be with your family and friends over the coming weeks. Take time to reset and pray about how you can continue to be a part of the walk as free people movement. We couldn’t have gotten this far without you and look forward to reconnecting and continuing this GREAT ADVENTURE! There is great hope this Thanksgiving! Grateful, Doug & Rebbie

name: Maggie Toulouse Oliver
subject: Grateful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie_
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55017990/380380796/-532505380?refcode=EM_C_221123TG_H_MTO_180DO_4_N_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGQxMjhkOS03MTZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aAH-EpLnIDYMGgEmPnONVi7qDMC3qG8jkr5eQyVwUXg=)
I want to wish you and yours a Happy Thanksgiving.

Tomorrow is a day to enjoy some family time, great food, and maybe a little football. But most of all, it is a day to give thanks.

I am so grateful for my wonderful family, dedicated team, and uplifting community. And, of course, I am so grateful for you. With your help and so many others, I get to keep our elections transparent, accessible, and secure as New Mexico’s Secretary of State.

Hope you enjoy your holiday and some much-needed rest. Today and always, I am so grateful to have earned the trust and support of so many folks across our state. After we rest, we will resume our fight to protect elections together, but today I wanted to stop and say thank you.

With gratitude,

Maggie

_Friends of Maggie
PO Box 473
Albuquerque, NM 87103
United States_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Josh=20Quill?=
subject: Democrats are STILL launching an assault on parents
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Quill for Virginia_
body:
When Terry McAuliffe said that parents shouldn’t tell schools what they teach, we said no. You’d think they would have learned their lesson ... | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f862a3d83826/today-im-announcing-my-campaign-15061121?e=8787be5d90)
---
| | | [ ](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=913d6b32f7&e=8787be5d90)
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=f5b8e1bc54&e=8787be5d90 "Donate")
---
| | | ,

For two years now, parents have been sounding the alarm about what’s happening in our schools.

School administrators have prioritized an agenda of woke ideology over high educational standards. It’s hurting our children’s ability to succeed, and it’s putting their safety at risk.

Worse, Virginia Democrats like Elizabeth Guzman want to go a step further and take away parent’s rights to raise their children outside the classroom. [Guzman’s bill would subject parents to criminal charges for “misgendering” their children.](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=35c2b8576d&e=8787be5d90)

In 2021, when Terry McAuliffe said that parents shouldn’t be able to tell schools what they teach, we stood up and said no.

You’d think they would have learned their lesson after we elected Governor Youngkin last year...

...but Democrats are STILL launching an assault on parents and our children.

We stopped them last year when we elected Governor Youngkin. Now I need you to stand up and fight with me to stop them again.

I’m running for the House of Delegates because we **have **to save our schools and fight for our children.

I’m not willing to let woke Democrats tell me how to raise my children. I’m not willing to let them use the school system to push their left-wing agenda.

It’s time to raise standards in our schools, incentivize our children to learn, get rid of woke ideology, and ensure that parents are the final say on their children’s educations.

In Richmond, I will shut down the crazy ideas that Democrat legislators are trying to push on our schools and our parents...

...but I need _your_ help to do it.

[Can I count on you to contribute just $10, $25, 50, $100 or as much as you are able today to help me go to Richmond and put an end to the radical left’s anti-education and anti-parent agenda?](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=18222a678e&e=8787be5d90)
---
| [Contribute $10](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=07f1d40fab&e=8787be5d90 "Contribute $10")
---
| [Contribute $25](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=e87bae2b21&e=8787be5d90 "Contribute $25")
---
| [Contribute $50](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=592e858f69&e=8787be5d90 "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=57fea80188&e=8787be5d90 "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute any amount](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=668404c5c8&e=8787be5d90 "Contribute any amount")
---
| I’m running for the House of Delegates to ensure that our children receive the education they deserve – but I can’t do it without your help. Together we can put an end to the woke agenda of the radical left and ensure that our kids grow up with the same opportunity that we did.

Thank you,
---
|
---
| Josh Quill
---
|
---
Republican Candidate
Virginia House of Delegates
District 21

[www.QuillforVirginia.com](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=db0e74154a&e=8787be5d90)

name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: I’m counting on you, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| In a moment, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. But first, let me explain why your support is so critical — and what could happen without it.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1384%2E5257348%2EChJY7K)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.8S9T3W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221123_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1384%2E5257348%2EChJY7K)
Derek: In a moment, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical — and what could happen without it.**
My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn’t born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.’s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator.
Now, I’m running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:**
**[Please, Derek, will you chip in $10 or more right now to split between me and Adam Schiff so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.8S9T3W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221123_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1384%2E5257348%2EChJY7K)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Raphael Warnock and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.xHzBB4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221123_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=6&akid=1384%2E5257348%2EChJY7K)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.Pekub1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221123_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=7&akid=1384%2E5257348%2EChJY7K)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.yqvkFX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221123_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=8&akid=1384%2E5257348%2EChJY7K)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.lSmETc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221123_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=9&akid=1384%2E5257348%2EChJY7K)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.kanJGq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221123_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=10&akid=1384%2E5257348%2EChJY7K)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.KIdsjB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221123_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=11&akid=1384%2E5257348%2EChJY7K)
---
I’ll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda — from voting rights to reproductive freedoms — is on the line in this race. That’s why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress.
**They’ve already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there’s a lot more money where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like _you_ with me to win — now more than ever.**
**[So please, Derek, I’m personally asking: Will you split $10 or more between me and Adam Schiff to become one of the 25,000 donors we need to kickstart our runoff campaign, defeat Herschel Walker, and keep Georgia blue?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.8S9T3W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221123_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=12&akid=1384%2E5257348%2EChJY7K)**
Thank you,
Reverend Warnock
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1384%2E5257348%2EChJY7K) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1384%2E5257348%2EChJY7K)**

name: Kari Lake
subject: Arizona
body:
Keep the fight going

| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946357:681XVCGNG:m:1:3371220873:6126A7947A5B52838BEC391EEDA82F8E:r)

body:

body:
Top Republican election official announced a proposal to weaken public accountability at the polls.
|

**[FUND DEMOCRACY PROTECTION WORK »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55018302/380381677/-904200159?refcode=20221123_AOTL_F_laroseoh_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0ZDEyOGQ5LTcxNmItZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0H4Duv8iGAjISUYn8506ugHBHbFxxMfInh4JCYWsASg=)**
Republicans in Ohio are testing how far they can erode democracy.

Ohio Republicans recently announced a proposal to require that citizen-led ballot initiatives gain a supermajority of 60% of the vote to pass, instead of the current simple majority. This is a blatant attempt to weaken public accountability at the polls.

The attack on democracy isn’t surprising -- it takes aim at the very tool that Ohioans used to reform redistricting a few years ago. But it is deeply concerning.

**[We need to hold elected officials accountable when they try to change the rules in their favor. Donate to All On The Line to help us empower voters.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55018303/380381680/-904200159?refcode=20221123_AOTL_F_laroseoh_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0ZDEyOGQ5LTcxNmItZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0H4Duv8iGAjISUYn8506ugHBHbFxxMfInh4JCYWsASg=)**

This announcement from Secretary of State LaRose and State Representative Stewart -- coming days after a similar ballot initiative was defeated by voters in Arkansas -- seems to indicate a new conservative strategy against citizen-led reforms efforts. We cannot let them continue to push this strategy across the country.

Republicans in Ohio took advantage of a loophole in accountability when they forced Ohio voters to use gerrymandered maps in the midterm election. Now they are expanding their attacks on voting rights and finding new ways to disempower voters. If this proposed change on ballot initiatives goes into effect, voters will face a much harder task in passing redistricting reforms that fix the accountability loophole.

**[We cannot let attacks like this go unchecked. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Before you log off…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hi Peter,

We know there’s a holiday tomorrow so we’ll keep this short. We were on
track to reach our fundraising goal for the month but over the last few
days, we started seeing a bit of a slowdown.

As an organization that is going up against the entire political
establishment, we rely heavily on contributions made in response to emails
just like this one.

This isn’t the email we had planned to send you today, but it’s crucial
that we get a big influx in contributions before the long weekend because
we know it will be a slower period for fundraising.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121606?refcode=em20221123-26210&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26210%2E1203867%2El4gOC0 ]Peter, will
you make a $3 contribution to fuel our work to take on the
Democratic establishment and help us recruit more progressive fighters
like AOC, Cori Bush and Summer Lee? Our work happens 365 days a year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121606?refcode=em20221123-26210&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26210%2E1203867%2El4gOC0 ]Contribute $3

Thank you so much for being with us. Whether you can afford to contribute
today or not — we’re thankful for your support and dedication to working
for a brighter future for all of us.

In solidarity,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=26210%2E1203867%2El4gOC0 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=26210%2E1203867%2El4gOC0 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221123-26210-footer&t=1023&refcode2=26210_1203867_l4gOC0&akid=26210%2E1203867%2El4gOC0

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=26210%2E1203867%2El4gOC0

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Hi Peter, We know there’s a holiday tomorrow so we’ll keep this short. We were on track to reach our fundraising goal for the month but over the last few days, we started seeing a bit of a slowdown. As an organization that is going up against the entire political establishment, we rely heavily on contributions made in response to emails just like this one. This isn’t the email we had planned to send you today, but it’s crucial that we get a big influx in contributions before the long weekend because we know it will be a slower period for fundraising. [ ]Peter, will you make a $3 contribution to fuel our work to take on the Democratic establishment and help us recruit more progressive fighters like AOC, Cori Bush and Summer Lee? Our work happens 365 days a year. [ ]Contribute $3 Thank you so much for being with us. Whether you can afford to contribute today or not — we’re thankful for your support and dedication to working for a brighter future for all of us. In solidarity, Team JD Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
| | | Dear Peter,[**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946500:6BGTGCGZN:m:1:3253819041:5BCFB7303454A85F114FA7C0EA614C0A:r) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail.Over what?Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.**Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space._And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute)._Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI.Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement).And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans.[**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946500:6BGTGCGZN:m:1:3253819041:5BCFB7303454A85F114FA7C0EA614C0A:r) Now, I'll cut right to the chase.Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency.If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**.Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.**That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY****LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI.His offer was rejected.Why?**Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** "_We can get to you. We can get to your family._ "That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict.And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap.[**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946500:6BGTGCGZN:m:1:3253819041:5BCFB7303454A85F114FA7C0EA614C0A:r)The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, _they 'll multiply._So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946500:6BGTGCGZN:m:1:3253819041:5BCFB7303454A85F114FA7C0EA614C0A:r), before it's too late.For Life,
---
---
Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946500:6BGTGCGZN:m:1:3253819041:5BCFB7303454A85F114FA7C0EA614C0A:r)
---
P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide).[**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946500:6BGTGCGZN:m:1:3253819041:5BCFB7303454A85F114FA7C0EA614C0A:r)
---
| | |
---
[ Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946500:6BGTGCGZN:m:1:3253819041:5BCFB7303454A85F114FA7C0EA614C0A:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946501:6BGTGCGZN:m:1:3253819041:5BCFB7303454A85F114FA7C0EA614C0A:r)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606[privacy policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946502:6BGTGCGZN:m:1:3253819041:5BCFB7303454A85F114FA7C0EA614C0A:r)
---

---

The GOP wants to take our country backward, restrict abortion rights, and more. I’m running to continue delivering for Georgia’s families. | |
---
I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again: Herschel Walker is not fit to represent the people of Georgia. The people of this state deserve better than a man who lies about his record and his values. **That’s why I need you, Derek. Grassroots donations helped my campaign win our runoff last year, and they’ll make all the difference this year, too. Contributions of $10 will ensure that we can hit our daily and weekly goals before next month’s runoff. Can you split a donation between my campaign and the DNC to make that happen and elect Democrats nationwide in the years to come?**

clean_body: The GOP wants to take our country backward, restrict abortion rights, and more. I’m running to continue delivering for Georgia’s families. | | I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again: Herschel Walker is not fit to represent the people of Georgia. The people of this state deserve better than a man who lies about his record and his values. That’s why I need you, Derek. Grassroots donations helped my campaign win our runoff last year, and they’ll make all the difference this year, too. Contributions of $10 will ensure that we can hit our daily and weekly goals before next month’s runoff. Can you split a donation between my campaign and the DNC to make that happen and elect Democrats nationwide in the years to come? I’m going to level with you: beating Herschel Walker and the Republican establishment here in Georgia will be tough. But we won in 2020 and delivered a Democratic Senate that passed consequential and historic legislation. We can win again. But it’s going to take everyone , Derek. The GOP wants to take our country backward, restrict abortion rights, and more. I’m running to continue delivering for Georgia’s families. I’m running for every community across this great state. Thank you for all you do. Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. subject: Thank You!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
Jeff Warner Is Thankful For You! | | | |
---
|
# **Newsletter-November 23 Vol. 2, #38**
---
| | |
##
23 November 22

Happy Thanksgiving!

I am so grateful, honored, and humbled by the outpouring of support over the last 20 months as I ran for the US Congress (MD4). It has been a profound experience.

Although the outcome is not what we had hoped for, the results were still surprisingly divided along party lines. That is true for many of the key races in Maryland.

This race was never about me. It has always been about serving and supporting the people of MD4 and about prioritizing our community above politics. People above Party. We did not set out to make history, but with your support our campaign is the second highest Republican fundraising campaign in MD4 since 1987. We were also the first MD4 Republican campaign since 1975 to use mass media and run a strong grassroots campaign. I personally met nearly 32,000 people on streets, sidewalks, front doorsteps or traffic lights. Our team made 58,739 calls, sent over 2.25 million texts to 188,663 voters and placed signs throughout the District.

Through this, I saw the level of pain and misery that so many in MD4 have accepted as their only option. To many folks, what I heard and saw is unimaginable. It occurs right here in a Congressional District that is a stone's throw away from the White House and a district where the leaders of the Democrat Party openly enrich themselves, while our neighbors' suffering deepens. My heart is deeply moved and troubled by the direction of our District, State and Nation. We must organize and mobilize even more!

Please keep in mind, this is not the end. This is another new beginning. We are looking forward to partnering with other like-minded people, who love God and Country, to make a difference in MD4. From my heart to yours, Thank you...and stay tuned for more! God Bless!

Jeff Warner

Don't miss some of the amazing stories on social media @RepJeffWarner.

The campaign is still accepting donations as we prayerfully consider our next steps.
[**Donate Here**](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=b181caa15d&e=12a37459a2)

I know it would mean the world to him to know his most dedicated supporters are wishing him love on his special day. ** = I know this election season was nuts, but if we don’t start fundraising now, we’ll risk losing this seat to Bo Hines, now that he’s filed to run again in 2024. = Thanks for your help. Hopefully we can pull off quite the surprise! – Caroline Wiley Nickel is a State Senator, and Congressman-Elect for #NC13. Support Wiley with a monthly donation today. = Follow Wiley Online: ** Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress Wiley Nickel for Congress PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. _

body:

Peter,

**This is it.**

_**This is when we dig deep.**_

We're in overtime. The crowd is cheering, and the lights are bright.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946503:62lwICGNf:m:1:3317145305:89687BFAE792F12EF9E2E87443C162F9:r)
I have asked for a lot of you over the last few months, **[but can you dig a little deeper right now and invest $25 or more in our Senate campaign to help us win in overtime?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946503:62lwICGNf:m:1:3317145305:89687BFAE792F12EF9E2E87443C162F9:r)**

_**I can't remember ever losing an overtime game in my football career, and I certainly don't intend to start now.**_ I'm asking for your support today so that I can be the 50th Senate vote against the disastrous Biden-Schumer-Warnock agenda.

Georgia deserves better. America deserves better.

It's time to pull out this win in overtime.

Thanks,

Herschel

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Sponsor 10 yard signs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 13 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948833:6p7HICGNp:m:1:3331703221:DD3CDFA31F48923F4F548722A8E9A94A:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948833:6p7HICGNp:m:1:3331703221:DD3CDFA31F48923F4F548722A8E9A94A:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948833:6p7HICGNp:m:1:3331703221:DD3CDFA31F48923F4F548722A8E9A94A:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948833:6p7HICGNp:m:1:3331703221:DD3CDFA31F48923F4F548722A8E9A94A:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948833:6p7HICGNp:m:1:3331703221:DD3CDFA31F48923F4F548722A8E9A94A:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948833:6p7HICGNp:m:1:3331703221:DD3CDFA31F48923F4F548722A8E9A94A:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948833:6p7HICGNp:m:1:3331703221:DD3CDFA31F48923F4F548722A8E9A94A:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948833:6p7HICGNp:m:1:3331703221:DD3CDFA31F48923F4F548722A8E9A94A:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948834:6p7HICGNp:m:1:3331703221:DD3CDFA31F48923F4F548722A8E9A94A:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948835:6p7HICGNp:m:1:3331703221:DD3CDFA31F48923F4F548722A8E9A94A:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948836:6p7HICGNp:m:1:3331703221:DD3CDFA31F48923F4F548722A8E9A94A:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948837:6p7HICGNp:m:1:3331703221:DD3CDFA31F48923F4F548722A8E9A94A:r)

subject: It's time to give thanks
body:
This year we're thankful for... | | | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yA3tVaxbrjmEeQD3IRPUq_fn2toJ9AnieUrwShRJCcxSdwuuS6nKv4fLaRBqMSdN6opmNzdDY-hp0g0DfIXlWaMHP_DpQ6nBCtpQ5EgSJlN93lFGyCz1LsVOvJFmjjEYMcjV-SYMF6mknI8iO4y61whGmFb_sghpnVrdme1PpDpzv-GaxbEB6AOjjnCHWWi4AQbAchLOsQ3aRhYEOYtjQ84RJjq6anH82S6iiWl3Ib_8HtGrZeVe4V0glpHSiaGtkScxTk83uyYSDld3kXzIAFHhOzDZKfwp5VQlW4dAhsYtAnr-Fl8WIudeZAHUBlwxE2iX6Ijq96OmEF8-scXXYFKsc3MNLpmXmTiwLoqXyQJg/3re/9O69L9luSNqXqF68ITY-Tw/h0/bF9NBw5I3B8lWMAFGQMZBUk5H0Jt_FwKWtVbrCM76eA)

Derek-
It's that time of year again that we come together to celebrate what we are thankful for. And this year we are thankful for...**you.**

Because of the generosity from supporters like you, look at all we have been able to accomplish together:

🦃 Democrats held onto the Senate and flipped the Pennsylvania Senate Seat
🦃 Youth Turnout was the 2nd highest it's been in over 30 years
🦃 63% of young people voted for Democrats, higher than any other age group
🦃 We elected 3 Democratic Governors in formerly Republican states
🦃 We stopped the Red Wave
[CLICK HERE TO GIVE THANKS TO YOUNG VOTERS](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zpZyQFJmwsJ5PhvcCRPt5e_D8sxfbOqQ73HurmRHm7XiPFV8mDHs0B3JDPeyvNn5lhPGkA2pa11dfOYD_OC3-mZqsuye2DRyYVPzUJH5WBPIISK9U4d3TpljeW8XMzudz4sjxG0W-QWiCm7-LZJYdVe6rbxA2PVGYrWMCXb3CfFA7HCW9Y5yZ7SSr7G5UU2JrFdzFBWZy88misZWr71QM379A6l9YZpJzKzdrZo7C9DxhCMhFikx2mtz2VIJ7MDy6SXrhkjHHqjq5FzWMF2D-EeGnrCGSc8X0KUxivb3qHo6J52mSMmY0ZIv04EyoR8dlD50_QnCQf8K6dPjTbtfn-DetAa_mTyBsL0pu8lfx3PQ/3re/9O69L9luSNqXqF68ITY-Tw/h1/lznZDhi3JHiZULmvF8HkXj-PU2_zl-c_X67J8VHPmN4)
We could not have done this without you and the great support of out donors over this last election cycle. And we hate to come to you again to ask, but we have still more work to do! We got word that Georgia is moving to a run off and now our eyes turn to December 6. We want to send as many people as possible to help win this election for Senator Warnock.
[Can you give $5, $25, or $50 right now to help Young Democrats get down to Georgia and knock doors? We are going to go all out for this run off. It could decide the fate of the Senate and the balance of Congress. We need your help and your continued support to help us get there. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: This time, it was a Walmart in Chesapeake
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
This morning, we woke up with heavy hearts to the news of yet another tragedy caused by gun violence—this time at a Walmart in Chesapeake, Virginia. Last night, an employee opened fire in the store and took the lives of six innocent people, and at least four others were injured.
I know that this news may be particularly difficult today as we are still processing the tragedy that occurred in Colorado Springs this past weekend. I am reeling right along with you.
My heart breaks for those who lost their lives, their loved ones, and for all those who may be traumatized from this horrific event.
Nobody should have to fear for their lives while completing last minute holiday shopping, or while they are on the job. But unfortunately, this senseless violence we are seeing out of Chesapeake is not an isolated incident.
Time and time again, we have seen mass shootings in what should be safe spaces in our communities. We do not have to accept these horrific acts of violence as routine. It’s unacceptable and infuriating that mass shootings like these continue to happen in our country on a regular basis.
Yesterday it was a Walmart, but tomorrow can be different. We can have a better future for our country—a future free from gun violence—and I will not rest until our elected officials do whatever it takes to keep our communities safe.
\- Gabby Giffords

* * *
**Giffords PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. A contribution to Giffords PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov22.2v05GQ&refcode=em221123-1-15&t=1&akid=2782%2E3935704%2E8Rr8JU)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=2782%2E3935704%2E8Rr8JU) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lavern=20Spicer?=
subject: Thanksgiving is almost here
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=fa115e85e6&e=fdefed58de)
---
Hello PeterMany of you know me from my Congressional run in 2022 where I ran as a Republican in Miami.During my campaign I often told the stories of the food bank that I run here in Miami - where we feed, clothe and help those who need a helping hands.We serve thousands of families each week and have been doing it for twenty plus years. At this food bank, we don’t only serve canned foods and leftovers - we go out of our way to give the people a sense of dignity and some good things to eat!
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=3e51856384&e=fdefed58de)
Well, at Thanksgiving time we are the lifeline for so many families. It means that our resources are stretched thin and we need all the help that we can get.Curley’s is a non-profit organization and with the high prices of food this year, it’s been extremely hard to keep up with the quality we’re used to. We’re not a canned food type of food bank - we do our best to give our people high quality food.With Thanksgiving two days away, we need your help. Can you donate today?
| [DONATE TO CURLEY’S HOUSE TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2fa1ce0f2a&e=fdefed58de)
---
Whatever you can give will be greatly appreciated, because times are extremely hard out here. They even say we’re going to have a Thanksgiving turkey shortage so you know those prices are about to skyrocket, too!**And just so you know, whatever that you donate to Curley’s House is tax-deductible as we are a non-profit organization. So please, give generously as possible.****You will be helping us feed families right here in America - not some distant foreign land. We need help HERE in America right on OUR streets!****Please pitch in anything you can with your generous spirit of giving today!**
| [DONATE TO CURLEY’S HOUSE TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=72eb85e072&e=fdefed58de)
---
With love and gratitude,Lavern SpicerFounder of Curley’s House

name: =?utf-8?B?4pqg77iPIEdBIFJ1bm9mZiBVcGRhdGUgKHZpYSBVVFMp?=
subject: Warnock Warning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
It’s never been more important that we have all hands on deck

| **Peter** — _it just keeps getting worse._

**_WE TOLD YOU:_** Democrats like Raphael Warnock are our last line of defense against MAGA extremism seeping into our Senate and destroying everything we care about.

body:
Time to move on.| | | Do you feel the same about this, friend? _Three elections..._ Former President Trump has managed to drag the Republican Party down for three consecutive elections with his divisive, extreme, and toxic rhetoric. What should have been a huge red wave and referendum on President Biden's terrible economy in the Nov 8 election, turned out to be a retaliation on the former President. Donald Trump's hand-picked, election-denying candidates managed to lose winnable races in every swing state. Common sense conservative candidates who focused on what really mattered to the people made their mark and won in New Hampshire, Iowa, Nevada, Nebraska, and many other states. The exhausted majority want **STRONG** and stable leadership – not extremists peddling conspiracy theories.

clean_body: Time to move on.| | | Do you feel the same about this, friend? Three elections... Former President Trump has managed to drag the Republican Party down for three consecutive elections with his divisive, extreme, and toxic rhetoric. What should have been a huge red wave and referendum on President Biden's terrible economy in the Nov 8 election, turned out to be a retaliation on the former President. Donald Trump's hand-picked, election-denying candidates managed to lose winnable races in every swing state. Common sense conservative candidates who focused on what really mattered to the people made their mark and won in New Hampshire, Iowa, Nevada, Nebraska, and many other states. The exhausted majority want STRONG and stable leadership – not extremists peddling conspiracy theories. Today, I am asking you to join me and tens of thousands of Americans who are looking for a better path forward. Last week's results give us a chance to reset and rebuild. Thank you for helping unite America with us,Larry Hogan Governor of Maryland | | | | Don't Miss This Event! | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | | | | | |

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
---
As we look forward to celebrating Thanksgiving tomorrow, take some time to reflect on all of the things we have to be grateful for. ** ** We hope you have a meaningful and relaxing Thanksgiving, filled with loved ones, laughter, rich conversation, and delicious food. ** ** Happy Thanksgiving!** ** My very best,
---
---
Nikki Haley

body:
| Peter, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:** [**Will you split $10 or more right now between me and Mark Takano to keep Georgia blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55019238/380386580/-643909435?amount=10&refcode=MTFC_20221123_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTJkYzUzYS03YTZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G3hsJlS0h9U5DltPid9xxhS65z9iGf1QsdyNDO3VOSI=)

name: Cindy Cerquitella
subject: I have a secret. Promise not to tell
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941459:JpsFwCGNn:m:1:3360412034:968B7BC755F5C7101ED392F2A3404422:r)

Hello Peter,

I have a secret to tell you -- just make sure to keep it from the radical Left.

Here it is: **America 's Future has spies inside their organizations. **

And we have people working behind enemy lines in companies like CNN, Google, and TikTok.

My name is Cindy Cerquitella, executive director at America's Future (AF). AF helps young professionals to become effective, lifelong advocates who inspire others to embrace freedom.

You see, America's Future members are young, liberty-minded professionals working to build a freer culture in America.

**And they need your support, Peter.** That's why I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters before the end of the week.

[_**Can you support a student today by chipping in just $25, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941459:JpsFwCGNn:m:1:3360412034:968B7BC755F5C7101ED392F2A3404422:r)

Many popular conservative and libertarian writers you hear about today were often AF members when they were younger. But that's not all.

**AF members may live across the country and work in different sectors, but they all have one goal in mind: continuing the fight for liberty.**

AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming.

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce.

**America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists. **

We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs.

Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term.

[_**Support a young professional today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941459:JpsFwCGNn:m:1:3360412034:968B7BC755F5C7101ED392F2A3404422:r)

By building up lifelong advocates, supporting young leaders, and building robust communities that believe in freedom, America's Future can turn the tide where it matters most.

These brave liberty activists who work behind enemy lines all started at the same point as our new members. But thanks to generous supporters like you, they have moved into leadership positions where they can make a change.

Peter, can you invest in the future of America by supporting an AF member? **Click below to send your gift and help us reach our goal.**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941460:JpsFwCGNn:m:1:3360412034:968B7BC755F5C7101ED392F2A3404422:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941461:JpsFwCGNn:m:1:3360412034:968B7BC755F5C7101ED392F2A3404422:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941462:JpsFwCGNn:m:1:3360412034:968B7BC755F5C7101ED392F2A3404422:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941463:JpsFwCGNn:m:1:3360412034:968B7BC755F5C7101ED392F2A3404422:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941464:JpsFwCGNn:m:1:3360412034:968B7BC755F5C7101ED392F2A3404422:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941465:JpsFwCGNn:m:1:3360412034:968B7BC755F5C7101ED392F2A3404422:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941466:JpsFwCGNn:m:1:3360412034:968B7BC755F5C7101ED392F2A3404422:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941459:JpsFwCGNn:m:1:3360412034:968B7BC755F5C7101ED392F2A3404422:r)

Thank you,

Cindy Cerquitella
Executive Director
America's Future

Since 1995, America's Future has been the premier nationwide network of liberty-minded young leaders, providing unique opportunities to learn the ideas of liberty and develop the skills necessary to articulate them.

name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: Asking from the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943262:6COSwCGN9:m:1:3369487795:B0195DB925EC15ECCA440BD4FB0A4EFD:r)

It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to you?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943262:6COSwCGN9:m:1:3369487795:B0195DB925EC15ECCA440BD4FB0A4EFD:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943262:6COSwCGN9:m:1:3369487795:B0195DB925EC15ECCA440BD4FB0A4EFD:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943262:6COSwCGN9:m:1:3369487795:B0195DB925EC15ECCA440BD4FB0A4EFD:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943262:6COSwCGN9:m:1:3369487795:B0195DB925EC15ECCA440BD4FB0A4EFD:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943262:6COSwCGN9:m:1:3369487795:B0195DB925EC15ECCA440BD4FB0A4EFD:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943263:6COSwCGN9:m:1:3369487795:B0195DB925EC15ECCA440BD4FB0A4EFD:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943264:6COSwCGN9:m:1:3369487795:B0195DB925EC15ECCA440BD4FB0A4EFD:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943265:6COSwCGN9:m:1:3369487795:B0195DB925EC15ECCA440BD4FB0A4EFD:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943266:6COSwCGN9:m:1:3369487795:B0195DB925EC15ECCA440BD4FB0A4EFD:r)

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
| | | Dear Peter,[**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946646:JqsOwCGNT:m:1:3373497171:33BF47371629B606CDEA745155FDBA33:r) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail.Over what?Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.**Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space._And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute)._Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI.Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement).And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans.[**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946646:JqsOwCGNT:m:1:3373497171:33BF47371629B606CDEA745155FDBA33:r) Now, I'll cut right to the chase.Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency.If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**.Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.**That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY****LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI.His offer was rejected.Why?**Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** "_We can get to you. We can get to your family._ "That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict.And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap.[**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946646:JqsOwCGNT:m:1:3373497171:33BF47371629B606CDEA745155FDBA33:r)The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, _they 'll multiply._So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946646:JqsOwCGNT:m:1:3373497171:33BF47371629B606CDEA745155FDBA33:r), before it's too late.For Life,
---
---
Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946646:JqsOwCGNT:m:1:3373497171:33BF47371629B606CDEA745155FDBA33:r)
---
P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide).[**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946646:JqsOwCGNT:m:1:3373497171:33BF47371629B606CDEA745155FDBA33:r)
---
| | |
---
[ Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946646:JqsOwCGNT:m:1:3373497171:33BF47371629B606CDEA745155FDBA33:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946647:JqsOwCGNT:m:1:3373497171:33BF47371629B606CDEA745155FDBA33:r)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606[privacy policy](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946648:JqsOwCGNT:m:1:3373497171:33BF47371629B606CDEA745155FDBA33:r)

From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, they 'll multiply.So please hurry. , before it's too late.For Life, Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide). | | | (C) Thomas More Society | 309 W. name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: Asking from the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947888:JEnuvCGNk:m:1:3346849603:26276250B0FED795ABE5A026495CA569:r)

It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to you?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947888:JEnuvCGNk:m:1:3346849603:26276250B0FED795ABE5A026495CA569:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947888:JEnuvCGNk:m:1:3346849603:26276250B0FED795ABE5A026495CA569:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947888:JEnuvCGNk:m:1:3346849603:26276250B0FED795ABE5A026495CA569:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947888:JEnuvCGNk:m:1:3346849603:26276250B0FED795ABE5A026495CA569:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator
