name: Herschel Walker
subject: sponosor ten yard signs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 13 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948963:6l-vvCGhN:m:1:3331421248:33481F9FF559DDA1BB4407B5998D9986:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948963:6l-vvCGhN:m:1:3331421248:33481F9FF559DDA1BB4407B5998D9986:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948963:6l-vvCGhN:m:1:3331421248:33481F9FF559DDA1BB4407B5998D9986:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948963:6l-vvCGhN:m:1:3331421248:33481F9FF559DDA1BB4407B5998D9986:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948963:6l-vvCGhN:m:1:3331421248:33481F9FF559DDA1BB4407B5998D9986:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948963:6l-vvCGhN:m:1:3331421248:33481F9FF559DDA1BB4407B5998D9986:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948963:6l-vvCGhN:m:1:3331421248:33481F9FF559DDA1BB4407B5998D9986:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948963:6l-vvCGhN:m:1:3331421248:33481F9FF559DDA1BB4407B5998D9986:r)

name: Team AOC
subject: Republicans are taking student debt relief to the courts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Special interests and the GOP are fighting back against us.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221123-3645-header&t=1&akid=3645%2E2526796%2EgmV4w9)
Important update: **President Biden announced yesterday that the student loan repayment pause will be extended another 6 months, until June 30th of 2023** , instead of the original expiration slated for the end of 2022.1
While it's wonderful to hear that payments will be on pause for several more months, make no mistake, **we are not out of the woods on the larger fight against student debt**. The extension was granted in part so that the Supreme Court can hear Republican legal challenges to Biden’s federal student debt relief, which granted each person up to $20,000 in student loan relief.
The relief plan has faced several legal setbacks at the hands of the GOP, who want to tie this up in court as much as possible to derail its implementation. A federal appeals court in St. Louis is considering a lawsuit by six different red states challenging the plan. And just a few weeks ago, a Trump-appointed U.S. judge in Texas issued a new block to the plan, claiming it usurps Congress’ power to make laws.2 Republicans have made themselves clear: loan holders shouldn’t receive relief.
The repayment pause has been a massive relief to student loan holders across this country, but if Republicans succeed in challenging Biden’s federal debt forgiveness plan, millions will _still_ be left to claw their way out of lifelong debt from impossibly high predatory loans.
[Can you chip in $3 now to help us fight Republican special interests who are trying to stop student debt forgiveness?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221123-1.roP5VV&refcode=em20221123-3645-P_FND_ANO_STD&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3645%2E2526796%2EgmV4w9)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221123-1.roP5VV&refcode=em20221123-3645-P_FND_ANO_STD&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3645%2E2526796%2EgmV4w9)**
As Alexandria said, “It was YOUR pushing, YOUR pressure, YOUR organizing that got them to this point. It is up to us, and to you, to decide if we are going to stop here, or if we are going to keep pushing."
Affordable education is a human right, and we will not let the GOP tell us otherwise.
In solidarity,
Team AOC
1 - [NPR
](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15231?t=22&akid=3645%2E2526796%2EgmV4w9)2 - [Fortune](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15232?t=23&akid=3645%2E2526796%2EgmV4w9)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221123-1?refcode=em20221123-3645-P_FND_ANO_STD&t=24&refcode2=3645_2526796_gmV4w9&akid=3645%2E2526796%2EgmV4w9)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221123-3645-P_FND_ANO_STD&t=25&akid=3645%2E2526796%2EgmV4w9)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=3645%2E2526796%2EgmV4w9) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=3645%2E2526796%2EgmV4w9) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=3645%2E2526796%2EgmV4w9)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

body:

Peter,
We told you about our significant decline in fundraising yesterday. For the sake of continued transparency, we’re reaching out because we really need to pick up speed.
We’re simply not closing our fundraising gap quickly enough, meaning we have to pursue every avenue possible. Emails like these to our most engaged supporters — that’s you! — really do make a difference for us.
We did the math and if we get just about 550 donations in, we should be back on track. **So we made a personalized link below just for you to contribute — can you donate $27 or more right now?**

clean_body: | | | | Election integrity litigation moves forward Hi Friend, You just can't make this up: Here we are weeks after November 8th, Thanksgiving is around the corner, and never in American history have so many elections taken this long to determine a winner. Join us for this episode of The Good Fight as Marc takes a deep dive into how the appearance of impropriety disenfranchises you, the voter. Election integrity lawsuits abound and are being coordinated with Battleground Oregon! Join The Good Fight as we continue the struggle. help us spread the word about. Follow and share the links below with your friends and family. Listen to the Good Fight podcast on: | | | | | | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM_ The Good Fight P.O. Box 95, Bend, OR 97709

subject: We need to hear from you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | |
---
**BREAKING: America’s standing abroad is SOARING thanks to President Biden’s leadership!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/10971?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221123-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroadRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221123-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroadRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8861%2E9716520%2E5Sm5gz)
**Now, we need to know where you stand:****Do you approve of President Biden?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/10971?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221123-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroadRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221123-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroadRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8861%2E9716520%2E5Sm5gz)

| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/10971?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221123-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroadRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221123-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroadRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8861%2E9716520%2E5Sm5gz)
---

Team, **President Biden is showing the world what real leadership looks like** ‐‐ _and the world is taking notice._

A Gallup poll shows that after **_years_** of Trump undermining America's allies abroad, our country's standing in the world is SOARING again!

But while President Biden works to secure our nation and democracy, **Republicans are still attacking and obstructing his agenda at every turn.**

We need to show President Biden that Democrats are standing with him during this pivotal moment -- _but we’re still missing 87 responses from Pennsylvania!_

**Please, lock in your response before midnight:**

**Do you approve of President Biden?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/10971?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221123-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroadRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221123-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroadRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8861%2E9716520%2E5Sm5gz)

subject: new territory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend: Our battleground race just shifted into new territory, and I urgently need folks like you by my side to keep up the fight. **Here's why:**

• FIRST, right-wing super PACs flooded tens of millions of dollars into Georgia to help my opponent, Herschel Walker, win.

• BUT THEN, our people-powered movement fought back against this unprecedented spending and forced our race into a runoff election.

• **NOW, we need all hands on deck to pull ahead and keep Georgia blue. We're looking for 538 more folks to give before our crucial 11:59 p.m. deadline, but time is running out, and we're falling short.**

**So much is at stake. We got to this point without taking a cent from corporate PACs, and I'm determined to continue this fight the grassroots way. That's why I'm counting on you to pitch in whatever you can at this critical moment.**

[Please, will you rush a donation of $10 or more right now to split between me and Voter Protection Project so we can defeat Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35485?t=6&akid=5449%2E878179%2E1xSd4X) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Raphael Warnock and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35486?t=7&akid=5449%2E878179%2E1xSd4X)

Let's go win this.

– Rev. Warnock
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5449%2E878179%2E1xSd4X). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5449%2E878179%2E1xSd4X).**

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
And we're defending him in court!

| | | Peter, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947735:6H52-CGNf:m:1:3331703221:A0A7D310DDC60DFC0076DC6EB07C0896:r) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in - by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947735:6H52-CGNf:m:1:3331703221:A0A7D310DDC60DFC0076DC6EB07C0896:r) Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. **[Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947735:6H52-CGNf:m:1:3331703221:A0A7D310DDC60DFC0076DC6EB07C0896:r) ** I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947735:6H52-CGNf:m:1:3331703221:A0A7D310DDC60DFC0076DC6EB07C0896:r)
I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947735:6H52-CGNf:m:1:3331703221:A0A7D310DDC60DFC0076DC6EB07C0896:r)
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. [**Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of Mark Houck with a tax-deductible donation today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947735:6H52-CGNf:m:1:3331703221:A0A7D310DDC60DFC0076DC6EB07C0896:r)

clean_body: And we're defending him in court! | | | Peter, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming. Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our team is representing him in court. Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act... and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family. We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone. Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. | | | (C) Thomas More Society | 309 W. (Because you’re a valued supporter of Freedom Watch, I had to rush you this urgent update about my client, Jesus Rivera. Please bear with me if you’ve seen some of this information before...it will be shocking to new supporters.)

On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

He didn’t protest (when I first heard his story, I thought he did).

Jesus didn’t attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud.
**
Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn’t receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden’s Gestapo DOJ and its FBI!

**What’s more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison.
**
Let me tell you, I’ve locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly.

She’s a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She’s the absolute worst judge I’ve appeared before in 45 years.

And now she’s throwing a true patriot and innocent man to the wolves.

**Friend, I’ve filed a critically important class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera – and on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who is getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
I’m suing everyone responsible for this outrage: the lead agents, each agent who searched Jesus’ home, even FBI Director Christopher Wray.

The shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can’t be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can push around a peaceful, church-going Marine veteran for simply recording the events at the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.
**
That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

clean_body: On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. | | | | | | | | Hi Friend, (Because you’re a valued supporter of Freedom Watch, I had to rush you this urgent update about my client, Jesus Rivera. Please bear with me if you’ve seen some of this information before...it will be shocking to new supporters.) On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He didn’t protest (when I first heard his story, I thought he did). Jesus didn’t attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day. But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud. Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building. His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn’t receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home. Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden’s Gestapo DOJ and its FBI! What’s more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison. Let me tell you, I’ve locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly. She’s a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She’s the absolute worst judge I’ve appeared before in 45 years. And now she’s throwing a true patriot and innocent man to the wolves. Friend, I’ve filed a critically important class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera – and on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who is getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email. I’m suing everyone responsible for this outrage: the lead agents, each agent who searched Jesus’ home, even FBI Director Christopher Wray. The shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can’t be allowed to go on. If the FBI can push around a peaceful, church-going Marine veteran for simply recording the events at the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too. That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court. I’m using two powerful class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Friend, you can read more about my urgent class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera and all January 6 peaceful protesters by just and selecting the view button. After, simply scroll down to read the legal document.

| Team,
Tracy and I want to wish you and your loved ones a Happy Thanksgiving! As Americans, we certainly have much to be thankful for. To live in a country where our rights come from God is surely the most precious. While celebrating with family and friends, take time to think about what you are thankful for.
We are praying for the families impacted by those killed in Chesapeake, UVA, Colorado, and more. Evil does exist. If you see something, say something, and do something.
Please say a prayer for all our men and women who are serving overseas and away from home this holiday season, defending freedom.
Mental health is a real issue, especially during the holidays, when some people may not be able to be with their families, and or may feel lonely. Please check on a friend who may be in need.
[Click here ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i_3Gshcfd5MC27bGrB3p38hXJLafeM-ho4OqyuE6-JtG1UPU_2x0ANJBCNS6pBFs-BmoE7vG3PFob9jzBAXmJRY89XIEifuEl1m4BsXlyTx0nobzTjQ0M8_8NmVHZ3J4kCVKhcoE8CcHPtCm8KhiEg==&c=p9xPVURM-uRiBDWUHsW60fvFtFHnf8pkwQmf7cJ8KIcdbKfF1iFz4g==&ch=SjDNf4mmBLi_4Oyn8ebztvn2x-VMLykMEPJmW8PEL_ebh5Op4GQQ1Q==)for Governor Youngkin's remarks on the shooting in Chesapeake and the 345th Tax Tribute Ceremony with tribal citizens of the Mattaponi and the Pamunkey Virginia Indian Tribes.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i_3Gshcfd5MC27bGrB3p38hXJLafeM-ho4OqyuE6-JtG1UPU_2x0ANrBjodJygXUHlyeN_ca8HZmbsdN1VplKSSc4fcNunx61mcbMOvZ9pbGCiSXzciOL2fkbSrWgV1hX87ymnNA149Djm73YoL6NWAG7IYnbN9q&c=p9xPVURM-uRiBDWUHsW60fvFtFHnf8pkwQmf7cJ8KIcdbKfF1iFz4g==&ch=SjDNf4mmBLi_4Oyn8ebztvn2x-VMLykMEPJmW8PEL_ebh5Op4GQQ1Q==)
---
| It has been an honor serving you as a Delegate in the General Assembly, where I have stood strong for the 1st Amendment, the 2nd Amendment, and the protection of life.
As the only candidate in the VA State Senate D10 race who has a proven conservative voting record, I am working hard to earn your vote. Take care, please tell a friend, and I look forward to seeing you around the district!
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| God Bless you and God Bless America,

Delegate John McGuire Running for [State Senate D10](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i_3Gshcfd5MC27bGrB3p38hXJLafeM-ho4OqyuE6-JtG1UPU_2x0AGbDit0KOq_gC-Ol0Dlf4IH-iArm9_EDoMRogwybo0WBouPqjOUiM8iYtRF5SVdaEyfwFzvOPr7V0vrXjwcQgx1HSLANBgygbbrWnRDEX9sY9OuRxtsfEivW8ZhpjIkW5QkUuBXU95_I&c=p9xPVURM-uRiBDWUHsW60fvFtFHnf8pkwQmf7cJ8KIcdbKfF1iFz4g==&ch=SjDNf4mmBLi_4Oyn8ebztvn2x-VMLykMEPJmW8PEL_ebh5Op4GQQ1Q==) in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 [Contribute Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i_3Gshcfd5MC27bGrB3p38hXJLafeM-ho4OqyuE6-JtG1UPU_2x0ANrBjodJygXUHlyeN_ca8HZmbsdN1VplKSSc4fcNunx61mcbMOvZ9pbGCiSXzciOL2fkbSrWgV1hX87ymnNA149Djm73YoL6NWAG7IYnbN9q&c=p9xPVURM-uRiBDWUHsW60fvFtFHnf8pkwQmf7cJ8KIcdbKfF1iFz4g==&ch=SjDNf4mmBLi_4Oyn8ebztvn2x-VMLykMEPJmW8PEL_ebh5Op4GQQ1Q==)

Hi, Peter, Rev. Warnock here – I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too.

Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – and now, we’re officially heading to a runoff election.

Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.

**But right now, we’re falling about $15,000 short of our daily fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap before midnight.** The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this.

**In a race this _neck and neck_ , every single grassroots contribution could mean the difference between winning and losing. _[So please, Peter, I'm personally asking: Will you rush $25 or more now – split between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia – to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55005968/380354768/1583625711?refcode=20221123.3_RW_A30&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWZmZDY0NC01ODZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yy2IUNek0R47V9x1FyGj9SGZyVgJmCBIFd8s5qozWko=)_**

clean_body: | | | | = Hi, Peter, Rev. Warnock here – I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too. Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – and now, we’re officially heading to a runoff election. Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue. But right now, we’re falling about $15,000 short of our daily fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap before midnight. The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this. In a race this neck and neck , every single grassroots contribution could mean the difference between winning and losing. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for all your support, Rev. It takes a village – and I’m so thankful for my family and friends for getting me here | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55019765/380389329/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2Q2Yjg5ZC04MjZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NCLKXS_ox02T_91jGieOF3FqNJAYl5NdFn5P80HReC4=&emci=3176945d-9c6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=33d6b89d-826b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=43402272) | Happy Thanksgiving-eve, Peter! Before tomorrow’s festivities kick off, I just wanted to send a quick note of thanks: From the bottom of my heart, I am so thankful for every single person reading this message. You all – my supporters, friends, and fellow Vermonters – helped us make history with your kindness, words of affirmation, votes, volunteer time, and donations. The phrase _“it takes a village”_ has a whole new meaning behind it now. You are the beating heart of this movement, and your support means everything to me. _Thank you. _ And of course, above all, I’m thankful for my family. My parents, my siblings and extended family members. And most of all, my spouse, Elizabeth Wohl, and to our two kids. We’ve always said to each other that running for Congress was a “Family Project” – and it really has been. The three of them have made great sacrifices to get me to this place. _**Team Balint-Wohl: You are always my rock and my refuge. One thousand thank you’s will never be enough.**_ _****_ As you prepare to gather around the Thanksgiving table tomorrow, please know that I am incredibly thankful for you, for the community we’ve built, and for all of the exciting things ahead. Happy Thanksgiving! -Becca Balint
---

clean_body: It takes a village – and I’m so thankful for my family and friends for getting me here | | Happy Thanksgiving-eve, Peter! Before tomorrow’s festivities kick off, I just wanted to send a quick note of thanks: From the bottom of my heart, I am so thankful for every single person reading this message. You all – my supporters, friends, and fellow Vermonters – helped us make history with your kindness, words of affirmation, votes, volunteer time, and donations. The phrase “it takes a village” has a whole new meaning behind it now. You are the beating heart of this movement, and your support means everything to me. Thank you. And of course, above all, I’m thankful for my family. My parents, my siblings and extended family members. And most of all, my spouse, Elizabeth Wohl, and to our two kids. We’ve always said to each other that running for Congress was a “Family Project” – and it really has been. The three of them have made great sacrifices to get me to this place. Team Balint-Wohl: You are always my rock and my refuge. One thousand thank you’s will never be enough. ** As you prepare to gather around the Thanksgiving table tomorrow, please know that I am incredibly thankful for you, for the community we’ve built, and for all of the exciting things ahead. Happy Thanksgiving! -Becca Balint Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's running for Congress to have a greater impact on more Vermonters. name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: Thank you for your support, team.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
| | | Together, we will ensure every Houstonian has the opportunity to thrive in our city. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yAYKskkclNdf6cPfUz18RRFglpi16cLOqp2suqI40Vze0p4rLFGm4vWzPv0iO3x-4MJwkaXWVOLd2hkNrjX4N1ID-fdPwdC03e2SuG7Gs8m90CAQwQfkrf4uix_JGh7I6B4QshY2oxI5WTiUGsC5DgfFLqPZApF85_GQt_vrlwcsolQY0lqBM25_1NP4hJLKnTAHFm6xr9hIKXtQLt2QC3YD68Fbg_ggjs55AZmpqXpcXWZiEVjGfxsciwswpd4YIdG79cVNLLbYGQK6KPgIVypy-MQy62zqwcdK3n8SZXG1ZIfOnM_1XwhGSzSRpnx4dqnUPf9y7ht9zx-EbNrCf8ukq-BE02YRZIeXypBFWwkY_bPMQBWhU5xrqDrsbiuumYXUfGen8g-ZZXF4znEu5gkUlE1dmiwdackBsy6gWQkQ/3re/kMPCeHq6SnmgW3zk8W-NcA/h0/wiu6vJ2RpPDRxPfcbvdJt3kp_xDh3K5ROHw2JpOkn88) | | I want to start out by saying thank you, team.

This past Saturday, I had the pleasure of hosting a Housing & Illegal Dumping Community Block Walk at Acres Homes in Houston. It was incredible to see how many Houstonians are ready to see our local communities safe, clean, and healthy. My team and I were able to get out and talk to neighbors about their experience with illegal dumping and housing issues and what will be the best way to address these challenges moving forward.

For those of you who do not know, communities like Acres Homes have been fighting for justice from these illegal dumping issues for nearly a decade. Watch this video below to see what exactly we are facing when it comes to illegal dumping in Houston: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yAYKskkclNdf6cPfUz18RRFglpi16cLOqp2suqI40Vze0p4rLFGm4vWzPv0iO3x-4MJwkaXWVOLd2hkNrjX4N1ID-fdPwdC03e2SuG7Gs8myHZzeLUN-AktiW60ZsK8uSScCy0o8ZBpTKXKkwjp4lanuFAZfQR0GsSKX8xCTiuwYGo6ohHcj3BEm4HA-sRGOAUDhi9EKnFoX-jPCULjSUODVsLW76da8BKiAni2KM_G9qafFVx4d9Z0pUhGbxNeehRyGkZ2bcri-lDlbjF63-QQKDpSMTBnturcRKbFSC_fCif-CWqVm35pF2og0CXXoPer5ST21iaEt9die15MpKa7vT_9iKnenIK7jJqWzm8pWXwRCZ69YSKxc08cvamDEJy38In15RWem0lVdHLwt3kIDa-c84yuAjDPWDXx9HvVw/3re/kMPCeHq6SnmgW3zk8W-NcA/h1/qAAb3fPEPMCznYfK6Wd9JVNCEuL4yHzh1sva3SjGLag) **No person should have to endure living in these conditions.** Zip codes should not determine whether a resident has access to clean, safe housing and neighborhoods. As Houston’s next mayor, I will make it a priority to deliver for Houston’s most vulnerable communities. This includes ensuring that our residents are not exposed to the dangers of poor health that can result from illegal dumping and unsafe housing.

I cannot thank you enough, team, for your continuous support on these pressing issues. Together we will ensure every Houstonian has the opportunity to thrive in our city.

Together,

Amanda K. Edwards
---

clean_body: | | | Together, we will ensure every Houstonian has the opportunity to thrive in our city. | | I want to start out by saying thank you, team. This past Saturday, I had the pleasure of hosting a Housing & Illegal Dumping Community Block Walk at Acres Homes in Houston. It was incredible to see how many Houstonians are ready to see our local communities safe, clean, and healthy. My team and I were able to get out and talk to neighbors about their experience with illegal dumping and housing issues and what will be the best way to address these challenges moving forward. For those of you who do not know, communities like Acres Homes have been fighting for justice from these illegal dumping issues for nearly a decade. Watch this video below to see what exactly we are facing when it comes to illegal dumping in Houston: No person should have to endure living in these conditions. Zip codes should not determine whether a resident has access to clean, safe housing and neighborhoods. As Houston’s next mayor, I will make it a priority to deliver for Houston’s most vulnerable communities. This includes ensuring that our residents are not exposed to the dangers of poor health that can result from illegal dumping and unsafe housing. I cannot thank you enough, team, for your continuous support on these pressing issues. Together we will ensure every Houstonian has the opportunity to thrive in our city. Together, Amanda K. Edwards Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. To learn more, Political Advertising paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer Amanda Edwards Campaign PO Box 88228 Houston, TX 77288 | | Sent via . name: Cindy Cerquitella
subject: I have a secret. Promise not to tell
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941413:6Em2KCGNn:m:1:3359512271:0ED21BA3D8690CA184E9A55BF4EB0625:r)

Hello Peter,

I have a secret to tell you -- just make sure to keep it from the radical Left.

Here it is: **America 's Future has spies inside their organizations. **

And we have people working behind enemy lines in companies like CNN, Google, and TikTok.

My name is Cindy Cerquitella, executive director at America's Future (AF). AF helps young professionals to become effective, lifelong advocates who inspire others to embrace freedom.

You see, America's Future members are young, liberty-minded professionals working to build a freer culture in America.

**And they need your support, Peter.** That's why I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters before the end of the week.

[_**Can you support a student today by chipping in just $25, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941413:6Em2KCGNn:m:1:3359512271:0ED21BA3D8690CA184E9A55BF4EB0625:r)

Many popular conservative and libertarian writers you hear about today were often AF members when they were younger. But that's not all.

**AF members may live across the country and work in different sectors, but they all have one goal in mind: continuing the fight for liberty.**

AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming.

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce.

**America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists. **

We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs.

Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term.

[_**Support a young professional today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941413:6Em2KCGNn:m:1:3359512271:0ED21BA3D8690CA184E9A55BF4EB0625:r)

By building up lifelong advocates, supporting young leaders, and building robust communities that believe in freedom, America's Future can turn the tide where it matters most.

These brave liberty activists who work behind enemy lines all started at the same point as our new members. But thanks to generous supporters like you, they have moved into leadership positions where they can make a change.

Peter, can you invest in the future of America by supporting an AF member? **Click below to send your gift and help us reach our goal.**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941414:6Em2KCGNn:m:1:3359512271:0ED21BA3D8690CA184E9A55BF4EB0625:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941415:6Em2KCGNn:m:1:3359512271:0ED21BA3D8690CA184E9A55BF4EB0625:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941416:6Em2KCGNn:m:1:3359512271:0ED21BA3D8690CA184E9A55BF4EB0625:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941417:6Em2KCGNn:m:1:3359512271:0ED21BA3D8690CA184E9A55BF4EB0625:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941418:6Em2KCGNn:m:1:3359512271:0ED21BA3D8690CA184E9A55BF4EB0625:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941419:6Em2KCGNn:m:1:3359512271:0ED21BA3D8690CA184E9A55BF4EB0625:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941420:6Em2KCGNn:m:1:3359512271:0ED21BA3D8690CA184E9A55BF4EB0625:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941413:6Em2KCGNn:m:1:3359512271:0ED21BA3D8690CA184E9A55BF4EB0625:r)

Thank you,

Cindy Cerquitella
Executive Director
America's Future

Since 1995, America's Future has been the premier nationwide network of liberty-minded young leaders, providing unique opportunities to learn the ideas of liberty and develop the skills necessary to articulate them.

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
| | | Dear Peter,[**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946643:6PbGKCGzN:m:1:3374012347:608CD463257C860686522427FAB14FBC:r) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail.Over what?Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.**Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space._And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute)._Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI.Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement).And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans.[**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946643:6PbGKCGzN:m:1:3374012347:608CD463257C860686522427FAB14FBC:r) Now, I'll cut right to the chase.Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency.If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**.Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.**That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY****LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI.His offer was rejected.Why?**Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** "_We can get to you. We can get to your family._ "That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict.And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap.[**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946643:6PbGKCGzN:m:1:3374012347:608CD463257C860686522427FAB14FBC:r)The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, _they 'll multiply._So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946643:6PbGKCGzN:m:1:3374012347:608CD463257C860686522427FAB14FBC:r), before it's too late.For Life,
---
---
Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946643:6PbGKCGzN:m:1:3374012347:608CD463257C860686522427FAB14FBC:r)
---
P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide).[**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946643:6PbGKCGzN:m:1:3374012347:608CD463257C860686522427FAB14FBC:r)
---
| | |
---
[ Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946643:6PbGKCGzN:m:1:3374012347:608CD463257C860686522427FAB14FBC:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946644:6PbGKCGzN:m:1:3374012347:608CD463257C860686522427FAB14FBC:r)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606[privacy policy](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946645:6PbGKCGzN:m:1:3374012347:608CD463257C860686522427FAB14FBC:r)
---

From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, they 'll multiply.So please hurry. , before it's too late.For Life, Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide). | | | (C) Thomas More Society | 309 W. name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: This isn’t over
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947396:6Q2cKCGNG:m:1:3253819041:9D5C771B63034424889C5E0B51111CAE:r)

It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947396:6Q2cKCGNG:m:1:3253819041:9D5C771B63034424889C5E0B51111CAE:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947396:6Q2cKCGNG:m:1:3253819041:9D5C771B63034424889C5E0B51111CAE:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947396:6Q2cKCGNG:m:1:3253819041:9D5C771B63034424889C5E0B51111CAE:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947396:6Q2cKCGNG:m:1:3253819041:9D5C771B63034424889C5E0B51111CAE:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947396:6Q2cKCGNG:m:1:3253819041:9D5C771B63034424889C5E0B51111CAE:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947397:6Q2cKCGNG:m:1:3253819041:9D5C771B63034424889C5E0B51111CAE:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947398:6Q2cKCGNG:m:1:3253819041:9D5C771B63034424889C5E0B51111CAE:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947399:6Q2cKCGNG:m:1:3253819041:9D5C771B63034424889C5E0B51111CAE:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947400:6Q2cKCGNG:m:1:3253819041:9D5C771B63034424889C5E0B51111CAE:r)

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
| | | Dear Peter,[**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946583:6yQFKCGNY:m:1:3360412034:005EEC47352FA6B1547525106D747437:r) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail.Over what?Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.**Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space._And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute)._Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI.Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement).And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans.[**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946583:6yQFKCGNY:m:1:3360412034:005EEC47352FA6B1547525106D747437:r) Now, I'll cut right to the chase.Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency.If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**.Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.**That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY****LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI.His offer was rejected.Why?**Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** "_We can get to you. We can get to your family._ "That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict.And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap.[**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946583:6yQFKCGNY:m:1:3360412034:005EEC47352FA6B1547525106D747437:r)The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, _they 'll multiply._So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946583:6yQFKCGNY:m:1:3360412034:005EEC47352FA6B1547525106D747437:r), before it's too late.For Life,
---
---
Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946583:6yQFKCGNY:m:1:3360412034:005EEC47352FA6B1547525106D747437:r)
---
P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide).[**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946583:6yQFKCGNY:m:1:3360412034:005EEC47352FA6B1547525106D747437:r)
---
| | |
---
[ Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946583:6yQFKCGNY:m:1:3360412034:005EEC47352FA6B1547525106D747437:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946584:6yQFKCGNY:m:1:3360412034:005EEC47352FA6B1547525106D747437:r)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606[privacy policy](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946585:6yQFKCGNY:m:1:3360412034:005EEC47352FA6B1547525106D747437:r)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: My infamous turkey vindaloo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
Happy Thanksgiving, everyone! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55020002/380390073/-1043101526?refcode=AU_MFB_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20221123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjllMjU5Yy04MzZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=87wATsCM7QzoGlzHiWI9bAFrvl3uxVMECZpKg2D9DvE=) Hi everyone, After a busy year meeting voters across Colorado and getting things done in Washington, I’m truly grateful to be spending a quiet Thanksgiving with Susan and my girls. I’ve been in charge of the Bennet family turkey for years, and if you’re in need of a new twist on Thanksgiving dinner tomorrow, I encourage you to [try my infamous turkey vindaloo recipe](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55020003/380390074/65551145?refcode=AU_MFB_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20221123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjllMjU5Yy04MzZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=87wATsCM7QzoGlzHiWI9bAFrvl3uxVMECZpKg2D9DvE=&emci=a842996c-4f6b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=1f9e259c-836b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1295540): | |
---|---
It has become a Bennet-family tradition that I prepare this twist on Madhur Jaffrey’s chicken vindaloo every Thanksgiving, and on the years I get it right (never guaranteed), it is fall-off-the-bone good.
You’ve already entrusted me to fight for your family in Washington; you won’t be disappointed if you entrust me with your Thanksgiving dinner, too!
All joking aside — My family and I can’t thank you enough for all that you’ve done this past year. **Whether you volunteered to talk with voters, chipped in a few hard-earned dollars, or entrusted me with your vote, thank you for standing with me. I am eternally grateful for the chance to be your voice in Washington.**
And however you prepare your turkey or tofurkey tomorrow, I wish you a delicious meal and a joyful day with people you love.
Happy Thanksgiving,
Michael

clean_body: Happy Thanksgiving, everyone! | = Hi everyone, After a busy year meeting voters across Colorado and getting things done in Washington, I’m truly grateful to be spending a quiet Thanksgiving with Susan and my girls. I’ve been in charge of the Bennet family turkey for years, and if you’re in need of a new twist on Thanksgiving dinner tomorrow, I encourage you to : | | ---|--- It has become a Bennet-family tradition that I prepare this twist on Madhur Jaffrey’s chicken vindaloo every Thanksgiving, and on the years I get it right (never guaranteed), it is fall-off-the-bone good. You’ve already entrusted me to fight for your family in Washington; you won’t be disappointed if you entrust me with your Thanksgiving dinner, too! All joking aside — My family and I can’t thank you enough for all that you’ve done this past year. Whether you volunteered to talk with voters, chipped in a few hard-earned dollars, or entrusted me with your vote, thank you for standing with me. I am eternally grateful for the chance to be your voice in Washington. And however you prepare your turkey or tofurkey tomorrow, I wish you a delicious meal and a joyful day with people you love. Happy Thanksgiving, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Jason's storytelling with Paperhand Puppet Intervention for Truthsgiving 2022
---
MEKU, _We at 7 Directions of Service would like to thank you all for the relational trust that was necessary to have an open and honest dialogue at Truthsgiving 2022. It is from these spaces of understanding that Solidarity is achieved and can then be sewn back into the fabric of humanity. We look forward to further cooperation with our community in many future endeavors of service and responsibility. We are extremely grateful for all who came and because of you we were able to retire from the day with hearts filled and hopes of a healing to come._ Have you had a chance to reflect on your experience yet? If not, start by giving yourself 15 minutes to contemplate, journal, draw before the day is over: What was Truthsgiving like for you? What moved you? How will you weave Truthsgiving into your gatherings this year? We’d love to receive your reflections at [7directionsofservice@gmail.com](mailto:7directionsofservice@gmail.com) **Dive into our Truthsgiving resources:**

clean_body: Check out the event recording, digital booklet and a blog post on creating new traditions | | | Jason's storytelling with Paperhand Puppet Intervention for Truthsgiving 2022 MEKU, We at 7 Directions of Service would like to thank you all for the relational trust that was necessary to have an open and honest dialogue at Truthsgiving 2022. It is from these spaces of understanding that Solidarity is achieved and can then be sewn back into the fabric of humanity. We look forward to further cooperation with our community in many future endeavors of service and responsibility. We are extremely grateful for all who came and because of you we were able to retire from the day with hearts filled and hopes of a healing to come. Have you had a chance to reflect on your experience yet? If not, start by giving yourself 15 minutes to contemplate, journal, draw before the day is over: What was Truthsgiving like for you? What moved you? How will you weave Truthsgiving into your gatherings this year? We’d love to receive your reflections at mailto:7directionsofservice@gmail.com Dive into our Truthsgiving resources: Watch and share the Facebook Live Recording . We get started at the 12 min mark. Print out the Truthsgiving Booklet (also attached), and enjoy it as a Digital Booklet . Order Ms. Ramona Big Eagle’s book ! Here are some tips for designing new traditions:** 1. Start with the Integration and Resources page in your Truthsgiving 2022 Booklet 2. Listen again to Jason’s on “Why Truthsgiving?” (15 min mark) 3. Design in Community - reach out and team up with other like-minded folks, whether from your gathering or not, to share and collaborate on new Truthsgiving traditions. Our non-Native and white organizer Kasey shares her family’s new tradition in this . May it be a source of fuel and inspiration. | See you at our next event! | Bila:huk, 7 Directions of Service | | | Sent via . name: Josh Shapiro, Governor-Elect
subject: Happy (early) Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Count your blessings and enjoy the day tomorrow.

Derek, from my family to yours: Happy Thanksgiving! I feel lucky to have so many things to be grateful for this year. I’m grateful for the thousands of people from each of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties and every one of our country’s 50 states who believed in this campaign. I couldn’t be more grateful for your support and more grateful to serve as Pennsylvania’s next Governor. I’m grateful for the men and women of organized labor, who were always there for me — as well as the many Republicans across this Commonwealth, many of whom told me they voted for a Democrat for the first time. And of course, I’m immensely grateful for the love of my life since the ninth grade, Lori Shapiro. Lori has blessed me with her love and we have been blessed with four amazing children. Sophia, Jonah, Max, and Reuben. My family means so much to me, and I feel grateful every day to be surrounded by them. There’s so much more I’m grateful for this year, but I’ll leave you with this: Count your blessings and enjoy the day tomorrow. Happy Thanksgiving, Josh Shapiro
_Governor-Elect of Pennsylvania_ __ __ __ __ __ __

name: Katie Porter
subject: Consider supporting this incredible organization
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
PILAglobal provides education to under-resourced communities.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15494%2E3422442%2ElfvZbS)
Derek,
**This holiday season, I have a goal of raising $10,000 for PILAglobal, an organization doing meaningful work to provide high quality education to under-resourced communities around the world through “Nests.”** These Nests are culturally responsive, play-based early education programs for young children and families. In collaboration with partner organizations, PILAglobal establishes schools and parenting programs in **refugee camps, migrant shelters, and communities experiencing extreme poverty.**
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13979?t=2&akid=15494%2E3422442%2ElfvZbS)**
**I visited one of these Nests in the summer of 2021 when I went to the U.S.-Mexico border in Tijuana** to listen and learn from the people there. As a mom, I was especially moved by the parents I saw there, who are seeking a better life for their families, but couldn’t answer the questions their kids have: _When will we be home? Are we safe here? Will I go to school?_ Many of these families live this way for years.
In the midst of these conditions, PILAglobal is doing incredible work to offer kids a chance to learn and play in a safe, peaceful, and engaging environment.
**The Canyon Nest in Tijuana serves 300 children a day,** offering them a space for joy, learning and healing. They’ve recently expanded, and your contribution will help them continue to serve children and families.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13979?t=3&akid=15494%2E3422442%2ElfvZbS)
_Kids at the Canyon Nest in Tijuana._
On my trips to the border, it was made clear that our country has serious work to do to fix our immigration and asylum system. I’ll keep fighting for better oversight, and for real solutions to the problems within our immigration system.
I’m thankful for the people at PILAglobal who are doing this life-changing work. And thank you, Derek, for supporting this excellent organization and the brave families they serve. **[Your donation will truly make a difference in the life of a child.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13979?t=4&akid=15494%2E3422442%2ElfvZbS)**
Katie Porter
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

It's time for some honest talk, Fellow American.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $10, $25, $35, or even $500 to you?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6baac9c4a0184699960b1bafab127a5d&_e=P44mZoikEKM6Bnyqy9-wgBWth6M6u2u3pXTt8Z39VCawFWHGfh_RwcFVD7RT_HHTNHxJ_xgj4sJNxlydPBRx0Y6OdLg-z2v9IRUkOjNMuBjhrNPoMusUC9cELCg9ZNbqicApueNbS49zuW6RFqEcUzaevVTAHJKC8BQRgKlf0RpWaWpFw_v1A3BfXnVCEf3pjQFmF_8Vk6zAAbeNayJPhWJLRbfiKPzHbsIgiRwDt62JyC6LHtMx1sMST4AiS4qxnJLLMCGTVBMtzpE0N-r6dFgSsOXAlUBAN5F6oWvXIFgh4VlzZKIvtVfVPc8lr9XGMs2wNiwze2fV5jRiL9PCzG00JiOObSXs0QmIvQIzg-AvaNrEbu3vKK-OKT7cma9YvguRNhYO-uB5jU3ijYNgNwVbmhoEl9PXZVlZGgfcSp49jbLJ9L9KFdKpYrjj67yYpOu3WvFHbnIQAzbZ5bQFtA%3D%3D)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 14 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6baac9c4a0184699960b1bafab127a5d&_e=P44mZoikEKM6Bnyqy9-wgBWth6M6u2u3pXTt8Z39VCawFWHGfh_RwcFVD7RT_HHTNHxJ_xgj4sJNxlydPBRx0Y6OdLg-z2v9IRUkOjNMuBjhrNPoMusUC9cELCg9ZNbqicApueNbS49zuW6RFqEcUzaevVTAHJKC8BQRgKlf0RpWaWpFw_v1A3BfXnVCEf3pjQFmF_8Vk6zAAbeNayJPhWJLRbfiKPzHbsIgiRwDt62JyC6LHtMx1sMST4AiS4qxnJLLMCGTVBMtzpE0N-r6dFgSsOXAlUBAN5F6oWvXIFh3GrEbgSSmrM6sS6VWS8O1UZHcgju4kKsgbD5MucpwBti6Nqg4nxTNsCWgQTsXrx2sg3oXWTadqFBFc49RYuC959xvs7Vamqx7Pie3SXA457BjxLbiGcAvBtzRxxhDog-_H7-VvIbV2_YB97pL53ObtfXn36IHTnU48jduDs3Xmw%3D%3D)

name: Salud Carbajal
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/9-sBy21svrZgk17tJvRnUMTYLuIue3o0oS1vgjjF-Pk=/HmMGsKxBOmNmY5tfX_lGRdadcE1yiMCk_Sy8aPF4edc=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
As our nation prepares to enjoy a day of giving thanks, I would like to take a moment to acknowledge my gratitude as well.
First and foremost, I am thankful for my strong and loving family, including my wife Gina, my children Natasha and Michael, and grandchildren Roman and Gianna.
I am also grateful to you, and for your generous support throughout this last election cycle. I am thankful to have the opportunity to continue represent you in our nation's capital, and I look forward to making progress on the many issues that are important to you and our nation as a whole.
I hope you, your family, and your loved ones have a wonderful holiday. Best wishes for a Happy Thanksgiving!
Sincerely,
Salud Carbajal

Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
