body:
It’s time for true, conservative leadership in Congress. No Compromises!

[](http://go.sparkpostmail2.com/f/a/UODxTL4fFdsLQy6s8SlRow~~/AATyWAA~/RgRlYPDXP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWR0cmF4aW9ubWVkaWEuY29tL2JyZWFkL2luZGV4LnBocC9jYW1wYWlnbnMvZ2g4NzI3a3JqaGI1MC90cmFjay11cmwvd2E5MjV6bXowNzJhOC82MWU1NGQwMjJhYmQ3YmJjMTEyYTE5MjZlZjg3ZDE4NDBkYzA0ZTQ2VwNzcGNCCmNz12t-Y958gMhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Headline") Peter, There’s no way to sugarcoat it – the Red Wave turned into a Red Fizzle. What should have been a commanding majority in the House is looking to be a majority by the slimmest of margins. Pundits will argue why it happened. But I refuse to engage in the blame game. **I’m only here to say THINGS. MUST. CHANGE!** **[It’s time for true, conservative leadership in Congress. No Compromises. That’s what I’m fighting for. And that’s why I need your help to keep up the fight with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.](http://go.sparkpostmail2.com/f/a/sKXhNeSFy-v6uq3z-X-Tww~~/AATyWAA~/RgRlYPDXP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWR0cmF4aW9ubWVkaWEuY29tL2JyZWFkL2luZGV4LnBocC9jYW1wYWlnbnMvZ2g4NzI3a3JqaGI1MC90cmFjay11cmwvd2E5MjV6bXowNzJhOC9iMjljOTY4OGNhZDM0YjQyMGRmMjc1YjQ0ZDI1Njk1Yzc2Y2YzNmRmVwNzcGNCCmNz12t-Y958gMhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "It’s time for true, conservative leadership in Congress. And that’s why I need your help to keep up the fight with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.")** Now more than ever we MUST fight to stop Biden and his Leftist minions from completely destroying this country with their Marxist agenda.
* That’s why I’m fighting to secure our border.
* That’s why I’m fighting to investigate Hunter’s Laptop.
* That’s why I’m fighting to impeach Homeland Security Secretary Mayorkas!
* That’s why I’m fighting to end the left’s socialist spending programs!

**[Do you stand with me? If so, help me continue to promote our Conservative Values with your $50, $100, or $250 donation today!](http://go.sparkpostmail2.com/f/a/n8c2I_UPagTpDSw7xmcYdg~~/AATyWAA~/RgRlYPDXP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWR0cmF4aW9ubWVkaWEuY29tL2JyZWFkL2luZGV4LnBocC9jYW1wYWlnbnMvZ2g4NzI3a3JqaGI1MC90cmFjay11cmwvd2E5MjV6bXowNzJhOC8xZmNmYTI5MTY0MGFhOGE2ZjJiOTk5YWJmYTI5ZDNmNThkN2M3ODM2VwNzcGNCCmNz12t-Y958gMhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Do you stand with me? I flatly reject that notion! We must be clear and concise in our conservative principles and **DO. WHAT. WE. SAID. WE. WOULD. DO!** Let me assure you – I will hold my colleagues accountable to the principles we stand on. No more tax increases. Stop the unnecessary spending. And get inflation back under control! clean_body: It’s time for true, conservative leadership in Congress. No Compromises! "Headline" Peter, There’s no way to sugarcoat it – the Red Wave turned into a Red Fizzle. What should have been a commanding majority in the House is looking to be a majority by the slimmest of margins. Pundits will argue why it happened. But I refuse to engage in the blame game. I’m only here to say THINGS. MUST. CHANGE! "It’s time for true, conservative leadership in Congress. No Compromises. That’s what I’m fighting for. And that’s why I need your help to keep up the fight with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today." Now more than ever we MUST fight to stop Biden and his Leftist minions from completely destroying this country with their Marxist agenda. That’s why I’m fighting to secure our border. That’s why I’m fighting to investigate Hunter’s Laptop. That’s why I’m fighting to impeach Homeland Security Secretary Mayorkas! That’s why I’m fighting to end the left’s socialist spending programs! "Do you stand with me? If so, help me continue to promote our Conservative Values with your $50, $100, or $250 donation today!" There are going to be those in the GOP caucus who think we must moderate our positions in order to stay in power. I flatly reject that notion! We must be clear and concise in our conservative principles and DO. WHAT. WE. SAID. WE. WOULD. DO! Let me assure you – I will hold my colleagues accountable to the principles we stand on. No more tax increases. Stop the unnecessary spending. And get inflation back under control! However, taking a principled stand may put a target on my back. That’s why it’s vital you show that you stand with me. "Can I count on you to chip in $100, $500, or $1,000 today to show that you want America First values prioritized in Congress?" No matter that we end up with the slimmest of majorities in Congress, we were hired to do a job. And that’s to get America back on track! I’m ready to fight for this country. But it will take your support to make sure I can continue fighting for freedom and prosperity. Help me stand up for America. "Donate today." For our values, Andy Biggs Congressman, Arizona’s 5th District | | "NO COMPROMISES!" | PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS

name: Susie Lee
subject: We’re on the cusp of history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55020712/380395406/-1839819742?refcode=lee_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTA5MjViMy04YjZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNRcZCwny-XZ6aUIyTgnRy7-P9rAzHW5e_gWgBW6zCo=)

| | Folks, I’m writing to you overjoyed. **Congress is on the cusp of sending the Respect for Marriage Act (RFMA) to President Biden's desk.** This act is a huge step forward for LGBTQ+ individuals’ right to marry in our country. The RFMA will also protect interracial marriages in the United States, too. If you’re thinking, “I can’t believe this legislation is needed in 2022” – I agree with you. It’s preposterous that the LGBTQ+ community still undergoes discrimination from far-right bigots who want to create a divided society. But, the simple fact of the matter is that **the RFMA is needed now more than ever.** In his dissenting opinion which overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Clarence Thomas indicated his desire to revisit the Court’s ruling on _Obergefell v. Hodges_ which guarantees same-sex couples the right to marry. I was disgusted when I first heard this. Same-sex marriage has been the law of the land and exists to uphold the founding purpose of our country: to be a place where equality above all else reigns supreme. Now, as the signing of the RFMA is all but certain, **same-sex marriages across the country will finally be recognized by the federal government.** This is a huge step in the right direction but the reality is that there’s still more work to be done to safeguard the rights and protections of LGBTQ+ individuals. I’m ready to get to work to make it happen but we’re now up against a radical GOP House majority which makes the hill we’ll have to climb all the more steep. Can I count on your help to get it done? [**If so, I’m asking you to please chip in as much as you can so I can continue to fight for the LGBTQ+ community in Congress. clean_body: | = | | Folks, I’m writing to you overjoyed. Congress is on the cusp of sending the Respect for Marriage Act (RFMA) to President Biden's desk. This act is a huge step forward for LGBTQ+ individuals’ right to marry in our country. The RFMA will also protect interracial marriages in the United States, too. If you’re thinking, “I can’t believe this legislation is needed in 2022” – I agree with you. It’s preposterous that the LGBTQ+ community still undergoes discrimination from far-right bigots who want to create a divided society. But, the simple fact of the matter is that the RFMA is needed now more than ever. In his dissenting opinion which overturned Roe v. Wade , Clarence Thomas indicated his desire to revisit the Court’s ruling on Obergefell v. Hodges which guarantees same-sex couples the right to marry. I was disgusted when I first heard this. Same-sex marriage has been the law of the land and exists to uphold the founding purpose of our country: to be a place where equality above all else reigns supreme. Now, as the signing of the RFMA is all but certain, same-sex marriages across the country will finally be recognized by the federal government. This is a huge step in the right direction but the reality is that there’s still more work to be done to safeguard the rights and protections of LGBTQ+ individuals. I’m ready to get to work to make it happen but we’re now up against a radical GOP House majority which makes the hill we’ll have to climb all the more steep. Can I count on your help to get it done? = | | | = Let’s keep up the good fight. In solidarity, Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . name: Cindy Cerquitella
subject: I have a secret. Promise not to tell
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941473:J0ishCGNG:m:1:3350876382:CA73D5334875E21701AFAD3F895581BD:r)

Hello Peter,

I have a secret to tell you -- just make sure to keep it from the radical Left.

Here it is: **America 's Future has spies inside their organizations. **

And we have people working behind enemy lines in companies like CNN, Google, and TikTok.

My name is Cindy Cerquitella, executive director at America's Future (AF). AF helps young professionals to become effective, lifelong advocates who inspire others to embrace freedom.

You see, America's Future members are young, liberty-minded professionals working to build a freer culture in America.

**And they need your support, Peter.** That's why I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters before the end of the week.

[_**Can you support a student today by chipping in just $25, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941473:J0ishCGNG:m:1:3350876382:CA73D5334875E21701AFAD3F895581BD:r)

Many popular conservative and libertarian writers you hear about today were often AF members when they were younger. But that's not all.

**AF members may live across the country and work in different sectors, but they all have one goal in mind: continuing the fight for liberty.**

AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming.

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce.

**America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists. **

We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs.

Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term.

[_**Support a young professional today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941473:J0ishCGNG:m:1:3350876382:CA73D5334875E21701AFAD3F895581BD:r)

By building up lifelong advocates, supporting young leaders, and building robust communities that believe in freedom, America's Future can turn the tide where it matters most.

These brave liberty activists who work behind enemy lines all started at the same point as our new members. But thanks to generous supporters like you, they have moved into leadership positions where they can make a change.

Peter, can you invest in the future of America by supporting an AF member? **Click below to send your gift and help us reach our goal.**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941474:J0ishCGNG:m:1:3350876382:CA73D5334875E21701AFAD3F895581BD:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941475:J0ishCGNG:m:1:3350876382:CA73D5334875E21701AFAD3F895581BD:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941476:J0ishCGNG:m:1:3350876382:CA73D5334875E21701AFAD3F895581BD:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941477:J0ishCGNG:m:1:3350876382:CA73D5334875E21701AFAD3F895581BD:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941478:J0ishCGNG:m:1:3350876382:CA73D5334875E21701AFAD3F895581BD:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941479:J0ishCGNG:m:1:3350876382:CA73D5334875E21701AFAD3F895581BD:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941480:J0ishCGNG:m:1:3350876382:CA73D5334875E21701AFAD3F895581BD:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941473:J0ishCGNG:m:1:3350876382:CA73D5334875E21701AFAD3F895581BD:r)

Thank you,

Cindy Cerquitella
Executive Director
America's Future

Since 1995, America's Future has been the premier nationwide network of liberty-minded young leaders, providing unique opportunities to learn the ideas of liberty and develop the skills necessary to articulate them.

It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to you?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943341:JUNYhCG2N:m:1:3360412034:44F26BB62F610DA1C8F2501C366F4816:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943341:JUNYhCG2N:m:1:3360412034:44F26BB62F610DA1C8F2501C366F4816:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943341:JUNYhCG2N:m:1:3360412034:44F26BB62F610DA1C8F2501C366F4816:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943341:JUNYhCG2N:m:1:3360412034:44F26BB62F610DA1C8F2501C366F4816:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator

name: Kelly Hall, Executive Director
subject: Ballot measures are at risk across the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
State legislatures begin their 2023 sessions in less than two months, and we’re anticipating widespread attacks by extremist politicians on ballot measures. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55015587/380367006/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGVmNjcwZC02MjZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=92bZsaSUxQbgLnQp7T-FNy3U_7PcC2OxGSGIi-sZjDo=&emci=9bc87e3c-5d67-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=b8ef670d-626b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=561582) | Hi there, **State legislatures begin their 2023 sessions in less than two months, and we’re anticipating widespread attacks by extremist politicians on ballot measures.** For more than a century, the citizen-driven ballot measure process has been a critical part of our democracy. It has allowed voters to petition and place issues on the ballot and enact them directly into law. Ballot measures force governments to respond to the needs of their citizens. But as sessions begin, we’re anticipating multiple state legislatures will make moves to deny or restrict access for people to the ballot measure process. [**Will you join us in fighting back against their attacks?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55015588/380367009/434238740?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGVmNjcwZC02MjZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=92bZsaSUxQbgLnQp7T-FNy3U_7PcC2OxGSGIi-sZjDo=&emci=9bc87e3c-5d67-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=b8ef670d-626b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=561582) [YES! I’M IN!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55015589/380367010/434238740?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGVmNjcwZC02MjZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=92bZsaSUxQbgLnQp7T-FNy3U_7PcC2OxGSGIi-sZjDo=&emci=9bc87e3c-5d67-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=b8ef670d-626b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=561582) _Since our creation in 2016, we’ve won 31 of the 33 ballot measure campaigns we’ve run across the country._ These measures help provide working people in America with higher wages, expanded healthcare access, reproductive freedom, paid leave, ending predatory payday loans, and police accountability. Our work offers life-changing improvements for millions of Americans in _blue, purple, and red_ states. **But our progress could come to a screeching halt in 2023 if extremist state legislatures have their way.** Extremist politicians know we are winning. They see our work as a direct threat to their entrenched interests. These extremist politicians understand if voters can use ballot measures to bypass legislatures intent on blocking worker-friendly change, they lose. That’s why these extremists try to change the rules in the middle of the game, whether it’s by making it harder to collect signatures, raising the threshold for winning at the ballot box, or asking extremist judges to overturn the outcome. **We launched our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign to prevent these undemocratic attacks.[If you’re with us in the fight to protect the ballot measure process and continue our work toward progress, will you add your name so that we know we have your backing, team?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55015590/380367011/434238740?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGVmNjcwZC02MjZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=92bZsaSUxQbgLnQp7T-FNy3U_7PcC2OxGSGIi-sZjDo=&emci=9bc87e3c-5d67-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=b8ef670d-626b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=561582)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55015591/380367012/434238740?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGVmNjcwZC02MjZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=92bZsaSUxQbgLnQp7T-FNy3U_7PcC2OxGSGIi-sZjDo=&emci=9bc87e3c-5d67-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=b8ef670d-626b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=561582) Thanks for your support, Kelly Hall

| Dear Patriot, While our nation continues to struggle under the current administration, I wanted to say THANK YOU for your continued support. We fight for FREEDOM because we believe in America. With all the craziness that me and my Father put up with every day, it's nice to be able to sit down and get together with family, friends, and loved ones to celebrate what really matters in life. Honestly, we couldn't do it without you. Herschel was outraised 3 to 1 in the general election, and there is every reason to believe that it could happen again if we don't rally behind Herschel immediately. The Democrats are spending tens of millions again to attack my friend, Herschel. We have already seen what their fundraising operation can do, so we must fight back IMMEDIATELY. The stakes are enormous. Herschel will help stop the woke insanity, inflation, crime, and open borders. Raphael Warnock will only be a rubber stamp for the Biden-Schumer agenda. For Freedom, Ted Cruz | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: Illinois Conservatives Must Read!
body:
If we want to start winning again, it’s going to take a new leadership team. Until that happens, Republicans better get used to being in the minority.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/5c3cbcb16aa8/alert-illinois-conservatives-must-read?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Vargas: If Ariz., Ill. GOP Want to See Wins, Leadership Must Change (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/vargas-if-ariz-ill-gop-want-to-see-wins-leadership-must-change.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

By Mark Vargas, Newsmax (https://www.newsmax.com/markvargas/arizona-illinois-gop/2022/11/23/id/1097708/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Following embarrassing losses on election night, both Arizona GOP Chairwoman Kelli Ward and Illinois GOP Chairman Don Tracy are facing calls for their resignations.

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/vargas-if-ariz-ill-gop-want-to-see-wins-leadership-must-change.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In Arizona, Democrat Sen. Mark Kelly defeated Republican Blake Masters by five percentage points. In 2020, Kelly flipped the longtime Republican Senate seat once held by the late GOP Sen. John McCain, who passed away from a brain tumor in 2018.

Democrat Adrian Fontes defeated Trump-backed candidate Mark Finchem by five percentage points in the secretary of state race and Democrat Kelly Hobbs was declared the winner over Republican Kari Lake in the gubernatorial race. ** Lake (https://www.newsweek.com/kari-lake-doubles-down-allegations-botched-election-arizona-1761255?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
has yet to concede the race citing widespread voter fraud, broken machines and long lines.

On Monday, a top elections official in ** Maricopa County (https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/politics-news/maricopa-county-elections-official-moved-undisclosed-location-safety-s-rcna58179?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
was moved to an undisclosed location because of threats to his life following Election Day issues at polling stations.

In Illinois, Democrat Gov. J.B. Prizker easily won reelection, defeating GOP state Sen. Darren Bailey, R, by twelve points. The race was called within minutes of the polls closing despite the backing of a conservative billionaire who poured over ** $50 million (https://abc7chicago.com/jb-pritzker-darren-bailey-illinois-governor-richard-uihlein/12317194/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
into Bailey’s race directly and through a pro Bailey super-PAC.

In the Illinois House and Senate, Democrats maintained their ** super majorities (https://www.wcia.com/news/illinois-democrats-celebrate-keeping-supermajority-in-statehouse/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
— leaving Republicans irrelevant and without a voice in state matters. The losses even forced Republican House Minority leader ** Jim Durkin (https://wgntv.com/news/politics/jim-durkin-to-step-down-as-house-gop-leader/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
and Republican Senate Minority leader ** Dan McConchie (https://news.wttw.com/2022/11/15/after-election-losses-illinois-republicans-pick-new-state-senate-and-house-leaders?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
to resign their leadership positions following the embarrassing losses.

As Capitol News’ ** Peter Hancock (https://capitolnewsillinois.com/NEWS/mccombie-to-take-reins-of-house-gop-caucus?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
noted, Illinois House deputy minority GOP leaders Dan Brady and Tom Demmer, and GOP assistant House minority leader Avery Bourne were defeated in their campaigns for statewide office; GOP assistant minority leader Keith Wheeler was defeated for reelection; and GOP minority conference chairman David Welter was also defeated.

To make matters worse for Illinois House Republicans, GOP minority leader Mark Batinick chose not to run for reelection and GOP assistant minority leader Tim Butler is resigning to take a job in the private sector.

In the Illinois congressional races, it was another bad night for Republicans with Democrats holding onto their seats in districts that were otherwise expected to flip to Republican. Democrat U.S. Reps. Lauren Underwood, Sean Casten and Bill Foster all won reelection.

Karrin Taylor Robson, a prominent Arizona Republican, has publicly called for Ward’s resignation as Arizona GOP chairwoman, ** tweeting (https://twitter.com/Karrin4Arizona/status/1592563002901172224?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1592563002901172224%7Ctwgr%5Eb0a1fe1f9a0cdb265762a778d1657acefd475039%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.newsweek.com%2Farizona-gop-chair-sees-call-resignation-after-huge-losses-democrats-1759887&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, “AZ GOP has spent the last four years losing every major statewide race, and we are currently in the weakest position in Arizona we’ve been in as a party in 50 years. It’s time for Kelli Ward to resign as AZGOP Chair.”

At the publishing of this piece, ** Ward (https://www.newsweek.com/arizona-gop-chair-sees-call-resignation-after-huge-losses-democrats-1759887?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
has yet to respond to calls for her resignation.

In Illinois, this author has called for GOP Chair Tracy to resign, ** writing (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/vargas-its-time-for-il-gop-chairman-don-tracy-to-resign-now.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, “The people of Illinois need to know that the GOP is serious about rebuilding and putting the best team in place to win. If Don Tracy can take credit for victories, then he most certainly can take responsibility for losses. And the losses were many.”

Interestingly, in 2002, Tracy ran in the Illinois primary for the 50th State Senate District as a** Democrat (https://www.elections.il.gov/ElectionOperations/CandidateDetailEO.aspx?CandidateID=R%2fbzwrvri7J3D7vdz10qXA%3d%3d&ElectionID=pq0YmF3ui0Y%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

In 2021, Tracy was named chairman of the Illinois ** Republican (https://www.chicagolawbulletin.com/don-tracy-named-ilgop-head-20210209?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Party.

At the publishing of this piece, Tracy has yet to respond to calls for his resignation.

If Arizona and Illinois Republicans want to start winning again — it’s going to take an entirely new leadership team. Until that happens, Republicans better get used to being in the minority.
Mark Vargas currently hosts a radio show, “Mark My Words with Mark Vargas” on AM 560 The Answer. Follow Mark on Twitter: @markavargas. Read Mark Vargas’ Reports — ** Click Here Now (https://www.newsmax.com/insiders/markvargas/id-664/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e362f57a5b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_23_07_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e362f57a5b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: Wes Moore
subject: Happy Thanksgiving from my family to yours
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55016747/380374252/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_na_20221123thanksgiving_wm_od30da_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODk4NTg3OS02OTZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxjZIMuKmLk9NR3xJx_-KRI1Oyo9kJ3ov-s_hwQtv-M=)
---
Friends, Before we gather with our loved ones tomorrow around the dinner table to celebrate Thanksgiving, I wanted to extend my utmost thanks to you. This Thanksgiving, I am so incredibly grateful for this movement of people working together to create positive change and lift each other up. Our historic and improbable win this November was people-powered from start to finish, and it is the honor of a lifetime to be your Governor-Elect. I am so looking forward to serving you in Annapolis come January. I’m also eternally grateful and thankful for the love of my family, friends, and community. I know we’ll be missing Mama Win and all of our loved ones no longer with us tomorrow, but they’ll be present in our thoughts and in spirit. Happy Thanksgiving from my family to yours! | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55016749/380374253/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_na_20221123thanksgiving_wm_od30da_SLA_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODk4NTg3OS02OTZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxjZIMuKmLk9NR3xJx_-KRI1Oyo9kJ3ov-s_hwQtv-M=)
---
Elevate,
Wes

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor-Elect! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland.

Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Washington=20State=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: WSRP November Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
WSRP November Monthly Update | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=26d33804ca&e=6a281f566d)
---
|
---
| |
## General Election
---
| Candidates across our state campaigned hard and ran excellent campaigns. We are incredibly grateful to each and every person who stepped up, put their name on the ballot, and worked hard every. single. day. to win their elections and push our state in the right direction. While the results on election night across the country did not bring the 'Red Wave' that was expected, we have many things to celebrate - like FIRING NANCY PELOSI and retaking control of the House - we have also seen late ballots trend in our direction and we are still fighting hard to win legislative races that are at razor thin margins.

This year, it is more important than ever to log into [votewa.gov](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=27f5de3b23&e=6a281f566d) and ensure your ballot was received and accepted. If your ballot was challenged, you have only until Monday, November 28th to correct any errors. Your challenged ballot quite literally could make the difference between winning and losing.
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Message from RNC APA Director, Jacqueline Zhang:**_

**Thank you all for partnering with us this past election cycle!** From canvassing and phone banking to coming out to all our events in Issaquah, you were the ones we could rely on to get things moving. It has been an absolute pleasure to work with everyone and I hope we have positively impacted you and your communities. Motivated and eager volunteers were really what allowed us to be effective in reaching voters.

As the holiday season approaches, we invite you to join us as we give back to the community and those who could use a little help. **We will be hosting a food drive out of our office in Issaquah from Nov. 28th to the 30th from 10am-5pm.** Please feel free to stop by anytime within those hours to drop off nonperishable food items.

_**RNC APA Engagement Center - Issaquah**_
1275 12th Ave NW
Issaquah, WA 98027

---
|
---
|
## Field Program Update
---
|
---
---
| This year, we recruited and hired over 155 field staff and activated thousands of volunteers across our state that were passionate about the issues and the candidates in our state and within their districts. **This is THE LARGEST field program the WSRP has ever put together** and we'll need your help to continue building this program out statewide as we turn the corner and start preparing for stratewide races in 2024.

**Through our efforts, we were able to make OVER TWO MILLION voter contacts** \- at the door and over the phone, but we ARE NOT DONE YET. Our teams are actively making calls and knocking on the doors of voters who have had their ballots challenged, especially in districts with razor thin margins, like Legislative District 10.

In addition to curing ballots, our teams are making phone calls into Georgia to secure a BIG VICTORY for Herschel Walker in Georgia's run-off election, which will be held on December 6th.

**Our teams still need your help!** You can help us by volunteering or funding our efforts to both cure ballots here in Washington and make calls into Georgia to earn ballots for Herschel.
---
| [Volunteer for Ballot Curing](http:// "Volunteer for Ballot Curing")
---
| [Contribute to our Ballot Curing efforts](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=01fc65cdb9&e=6a281f566d "Contribute to our Ballot Curing efforts")
---
| [Contribute to help Herschel Walker and the Georgia GOP](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=771f31240a&e=6a281f566d "Contribute to help Herschel Walker and the Georgia GOP")
---
|
---
|
# Now Hiring!
---
| We are now looking to hire a new Poltical Director here at the WSRP! If you are interested, please review the Job Description and apply by filliing out the form!
---
| [Apply Now - WSRP Political Director](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=ecd1f33806&e=6a281f566d "Apply Now - WSRP Political Director")
---
|
---
|
# Upcoming Dinner
---
| Join the Women of Washington at their Annual Holiday dinner at the Meydenbauer center in Bellevue, WA on Wednesday, December 7th from 6PM - 9PM!

This event's Keynote Speaker will be Nigel Farage, an internationally recognized British politician who co-founded and led the UK Independence Party (UKIP) from 2006 to 2016. As the leader of the Brexit party from 2019 to 2021, Mr. Farage accomplished what many said was impossible: he led the fight to withdraw the UK from the European Union.
---
| [Register now!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5bf1d069ee&e=6a281f566d "Register now!")
---
|
---
|

clean_body: WSRP November Monthly Update | | | | | | | | General Election | Candidates across our state campaigned hard and ran excellent campaigns. We are incredibly grateful to each and every person who stepped up, put their name on the ballot, and worked hard every. single. day. to win their elections and push our state in the right direction. While the results on election night across the country did not bring the 'Red Wave' that was expected, we have many things to celebrate - like FIRING NANCY PELOSI and retaking control of the House - we have also seen late ballots trend in our direction and we are still fighting hard to win legislative races that are at razor thin margins. This year, it is more important than ever to log into and ensure your ballot was received and accepted. If your ballot was challenged, you have only until Monday, November 28th to correct any errors. Your challenged ballot quite literally could make the difference between winning and losing. | | | Message from RNC APA Director, Jacqueline Zhang: Thank you all for partnering with us this past election cycle! From canvassing and phone banking to coming out to all our events in Issaquah, you were the ones we could rely on to get things moving. It has been an absolute pleasure to work with everyone and I hope we have positively impacted you and your communities. Motivated and eager volunteers were really what allowed us to be effective in reaching voters. As the holiday season approaches, we invite you to join us as we give back to the community and those who could use a little help. We will be hosting a food drive out of our office in Issaquah from Nov. 28th to the 30th from 10am-5pm. Please feel free to stop by anytime within those hours to drop off nonperishable food items. RNC APA Engagement Center - Issaquah 1275 12th Ave NW Issaquah, WA 98027 | | Field Program Update | | This year, we recruited and hired over 155 field staff and activated thousands of volunteers across our state that were passionate about the issues and the candidates in our state and within their districts. This is THE LARGEST field program the WSRP has ever put together and we'll need your help to continue building this program out statewide as we turn the corner and start preparing for stratewide races in 2024. Through our efforts, we were able to make OVER TWO MILLION voter contacts \- at the door and over the phone, but we ARE NOT DONE YET. Our teams are actively making calls and knocking on the doors of voters who have had their ballots challenged, especially in districts with razor thin margins, like Legislative District 10. In addition to curing ballots, our teams are making phone calls into Georgia to secure a BIG VICTORY for Herschel Walker in Georgia's run-off election, which will be held on December 6th. Our teams still need your help! You can help us by volunteering or funding our efforts to both cure ballots here in Washington and make calls into Georgia to earn ballots for Herschel. | http:// "Volunteer for Ballot Curing" | "Contribute to our Ballot Curing efforts" | "Contribute to help Herschel Walker and the Georgia GOP" | | Now Hiring! | We are now looking to hire a new Poltical Director here at the WSRP! If you are interested, please review the Job Description and apply by filliing out the form! | "Apply Now - WSRP Political Director" | | Upcoming Dinner | Join the Women of Washington at their Annual Holiday dinner at the Meydenbauer center in Bellevue, WA on Wednesday, December 7th from 6PM - 9PM! This event's Keynote Speaker will be Nigel Farage, an internationally recognized British politician who co-founded and led the UK Independence Party (UKIP) from 2006 to 2016. As the leader of the Brexit party from 2019 to 2021, Mr. Farage accomplished what many said was impossible: he led the fight to withdraw the UK from the European Union. | "Register now!" | | In the News: | National Local WAGOP in the news | | Contact: Benjamin Gonzalez Communications Director Washington State Republican Party (425) 460-0570 mailto:ben@wsrp.org | | | Copyright © 2022 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved. Your interest in the Washington State Republican Party, National Republican Committee or Washington state Republican Candidates Our mailing address is: Washington State Republican Party11811 NE 1st St Suite 306Bellevue, WA 98005 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . | | Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party. 11811 NE 1st St, Bellevue, WA 98005. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
| | | Dear Peter,[**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946612:6GVQiCGNI:m:1:3369487795:086278E4DC79E48805235353C9E48472:r) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail.Over what?Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.**Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space._And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute)._Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI.Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement).And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans.[**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946612:6GVQiCGNI:m:1:3369487795:086278E4DC79E48805235353C9E48472:r) Now, I'll cut right to the chase.Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency.If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**.Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.**That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY****LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI.His offer was rejected.Why?**Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** "_We can get to you. We can get to your family._ "That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict.And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap.[**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946612:6GVQiCGNI:m:1:3369487795:086278E4DC79E48805235353C9E48472:r)The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, _they 'll multiply._So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946612:6GVQiCGNI:m:1:3369487795:086278E4DC79E48805235353C9E48472:r), before it's too late.For Life,
---
---
Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946612:6GVQiCGNI:m:1:3369487795:086278E4DC79E48805235353C9E48472:r)
---
P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide).[**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946612:6GVQiCGNI:m:1:3369487795:086278E4DC79E48805235353C9E48472:r)
---
| | |
---
[ Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946612:6GVQiCGNI:m:1:3369487795:086278E4DC79E48805235353C9E48472:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946613:6GVQiCGNI:m:1:3369487795:086278E4DC79E48805235353C9E48472:r)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606[privacy policy](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946614:6GVQiCGNI:m:1:3369487795:086278E4DC79E48805235353C9E48472:r)
---

---

name: Cindy Cerquitella
subject: I have a secret. Promise not to tell
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941514:JOh8iCGEN:m:1:3346849603:8FFF08CA7D3275F7B51A113D475D2131:r)

Hello Peter,

I have a secret to tell you -- just make sure to keep it from the radical Left.

Here it is: **America 's Future has spies inside their organizations. **

And we have people working behind enemy lines in companies like CNN, Google, and TikTok.

My name is Cindy Cerquitella, executive director at America's Future (AF). AF helps young professionals to become effective, lifelong advocates who inspire others to embrace freedom.

You see, America's Future members are young, liberty-minded professionals working to build a freer culture in America.

**And they need your support, Peter.** That's why I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters before the end of the week.

[_**Can you support a student today by chipping in just $25, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941514:JOh8iCGEN:m:1:3346849603:8FFF08CA7D3275F7B51A113D475D2131:r)

Many popular conservative and libertarian writers you hear about today were often AF members when they were younger. But that's not all.

**AF members may live across the country and work in different sectors, but they all have one goal in mind: continuing the fight for liberty.**

AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming.

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce.

**America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists. **

We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs.

Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term.

[_**Support a young professional today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941514:JOh8iCGEN:m:1:3346849603:8FFF08CA7D3275F7B51A113D475D2131:r)

By building up lifelong advocates, supporting young leaders, and building robust communities that believe in freedom, America's Future can turn the tide where it matters most.

These brave liberty activists who work behind enemy lines all started at the same point as our new members. But thanks to generous supporters like you, they have moved into leadership positions where they can make a change.

clean_body: Hello Peter, I have a secret to tell you -- just make sure to keep it from the radical Left. Here it is: America 's Future has spies inside their organizations. And we have people working behind enemy lines in companies like CNN, Google, and TikTok. My name is Cindy Cerquitella, executive director at America's Future (AF). AF helps young professionals to become effective, lifelong advocates who inspire others to embrace freedom. You see, America's Future members are young, liberty-minded professionals working to build a freer culture in America. And they need your support, Peter. That's why I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters before the end of the week. Many popular conservative and libertarian writers you hear about today were often AF members when they were younger. But that's not all. AF members may live across the country and work in different sectors, but they all have one goal in mind: continuing the fight for liberty. AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming. While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce. America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists. We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs. Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term. subject: It’s time to wake up

body:

It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to you?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943306:6DCriCGlN:m:1:3359512271:7E51916200A586141925D43C4530CD11:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943306:6DCriCGlN:m:1:3359512271:7E51916200A586141925D43C4530CD11:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943306:6DCriCGlN:m:1:3359512271:7E51916200A586141925D43C4530CD11:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61943306:6DCriCGlN:m:1:3359512271:7E51916200A586141925D43C4530CD11:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator

subject: Sponsor 10 yard signs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 13 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948808:6dx1iCGNW:m:1:3253819041:798C3AE0200AAD056189517194A9E016:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948808:6dx1iCGNW:m:1:3253819041:798C3AE0200AAD056189517194A9E016:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948808:6dx1iCGNW:m:1:3253819041:798C3AE0200AAD056189517194A9E016:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948808:6dx1iCGNW:m:1:3253819041:798C3AE0200AAD056189517194A9E016:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948808:6dx1iCGNW:m:1:3253819041:798C3AE0200AAD056189517194A9E016:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948808:6dx1iCGNW:m:1:3253819041:798C3AE0200AAD056189517194A9E016:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61948808:6dx1iCGNW:m:1:3253819041:798C3AE0200AAD056189517194A9E016:r)
Herschel Walker

name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: Is this really the outcome you want?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947401:Jze_iCG0N:m:1:3317145305:FDB626CDADB34246902E1BFE77BC2DFC:r)

It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to you?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947401:Jze_iCG0N:m:1:3317145305:FDB626CDADB34246902E1BFE77BC2DFC:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947401:Jze_iCG0N:m:1:3317145305:FDB626CDADB34246902E1BFE77BC2DFC:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947401:Jze_iCG0N:m:1:3317145305:FDB626CDADB34246902E1BFE77BC2DFC:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947401:Jze_iCG0N:m:1:3317145305:FDB626CDADB34246902E1BFE77BC2DFC:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947401:Jze_iCG0N:m:1:3317145305:FDB626CDADB34246902E1BFE77BC2DFC:r)

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.** My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:** **[Please, will you chip in $10 or more right now to split between me and Martin Heinrich’s campaign so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55021241/380421928/80330231?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2IyYmJmNC05ODZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xXs0u2v7_Lko-nLO668VUEWYfnUF40ZjVirD0XaEFus=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55021243/380421930/80330231?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2IyYmJmNC05ODZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xXs0u2v7_Lko-nLO668VUEWYfnUF40ZjVirD0XaEFus=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Raphael Warnock and Martin Heinrich:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55021244/380421932/80330231?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2IyYmJmNC05ODZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xXs0u2v7_Lko-nLO668VUEWYfnUF40ZjVirD0XaEFus=)

I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress.
**They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like _you_ with me to win – now more than ever.**
**[So please, I'm personally asking: Will you split $10 or more between me and Martin Heinrich to become one of the 25,000 donors we need to kickstart our runoff campaign, defeat Herschel Walker, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55021254/380421942/80330231?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2IyYmJmNC05ODZiLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xXs0u2v7_Lko-nLO668VUEWYfnUF40ZjVirD0XaEFus=)**
Thank you,
Reverend Warnock

clean_body: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it. My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. That’s why I have to ask: = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Raphael Warnock and Martin Heinrich: | | = = | = = | = = I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress. They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like you with me to win – now more than ever. = Thank you, Reverend Warnock | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: =?utf-8?Q?Nuestro=20PAC?=
subject: Time is running out!
body:
Once again, Georgia is on the frontline of our fight for the Senate. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nuestropac/time-is-running-out?e=b8f90417f9)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
Once again, Georgia is on the frontline of our fight for the Senate. Unlike the last runoff election, this election is sooner due to Republicans changing the state’s election laws. They have shortened the time between a general election and any runoff to a mere four weeks! The biggest challenge of this election is translating to Latinos that they have to come back so soon to the polls. With early voting quickly beginning and the runoff election being only two weeks away, every moment matters.
We are currently collaborating with local Latino organizations and groups in Georgia because we know how important it is to reach out to our community this election. One of the biggest factors we are primed and ready to address in Georgia is making sure that Latino voters know about the runoff. We will be working on the ground to make sure our people know WHY they need to vote again, WHY the stakes are higher than ever, and WHY Herschel Walker has no intention to help our community. Securing a critical 51-49 majority for Democrats in the Senate will be crucial to delivering to the Latino community. Nuestro PAC is the largest independent Latino-focused super PAC in the country, bringing culturally competent and carefully crafted messaging and support to turn out Latino voters across all key races. Together, we can re-elect Senator Warnock and strengthen our Senate majority. **[Can you please make a contribution - of any amount you can afford - to Nuestro PAC today and help us re-elect Senator Warnock to strengthen our Senate majority?](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=f45e141a45&e=b8f90417f9)** Thank you for chipping in. Let’s do this together! In Solidarity, Nuestro PAC

| | We’ve been telling you for weeks about how important it is that we re-elect Rev. Warnock and hold onto his critical voice in the Senate, and we’re not kidding.

If we didn’t elect Rev. Warnock in 2021, all our progress over the last two years would never have happened. Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson would never have been confirmed to the Supreme Court. We wouldn’t have gotten critical COVID relief, or historic infrastructure investments.

With Rev. Warnock neck and neck with Herschel Walker in the Senate runoff race, we need to do everything we can to send Rev. Warnock BACK to the Senate so he can continue fighting for Georgia.

We’re up against not just Herschel Walker but the entire GOP. They’re pouring in millions of dollars and sending hundreds of staff into Georgia to flip Georgia's Senate seat red – **_and we can’t afford to fall behind._**

**_[So we have to ask because it’s important: will you rush a donation right now to help us re-elect Rev. clean_body: to help re-elect Rev. Warnock! | | | We’ve been telling you for weeks about how important it is that we re-elect Rev. Warnock and hold onto his critical voice in the Senate, and we’re not kidding. If we didn’t elect Rev. Warnock in 2021, all our progress over the last two years would never have happened. Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson would never have been confirmed to the Supreme Court. We wouldn’t have gotten critical COVID relief, or historic infrastructure investments. With Rev. Warnock neck and neck with Herschel Walker in the Senate runoff race, we need to do everything we can to send Rev. Warnock BACK to the Senate so he can continue fighting for Georgia. We’re up against not just Herschel Walker but the entire GOP. It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $10, $25, $35, or even $500 to you?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8069af82e7144fa7925874098265fffe&_e=AIu1aRmWQ4Av7HgcQT5ZZi1fKswoM4fidPYwWuQSqk53DzPvHCbyIL07Wk_Q9S93_V6fGEum0Y6oQJ74cvAb-qPtk4EmGtl3lDkVZUYM4OwJ-xdg3lC-ZiZKgafTvpXoCpwelX6seCos0xa0zS8gj1UAL-A52fs8LiMNPzNuyojTvx3O5HCsTbyfnu6zQwHi9RZEdlbM-1DrOuBnMymUDkncxn36VmYIzQK4gWS2G63yqdYrfI2jO2Sg1341dzuiXqSIZbjmy8aStkaHv2w5zze0diAal4WISe9Uyb3hALxRMbYmLdAzrYk4XYyAIaLuPK82Eg20dL4nIgFPTGa7gWJlAHwY4f_mNycyv6cG9X2w3V3ztl-uNIhxxDoSLPLSNd7vsanIFePY7hT01ghTrRrOC-945uR5ZKFA9_XOP9bm5uk0Y1hqjh9jTjbJ5VYw)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 14 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8069af82e7144fa7925874098265fffe&_e=AIu1aRmWQ4Av7HgcQT5ZZi1fKswoM4fidPYwWuQSqk53DzPvHCbyIL07Wk_Q9S93_V6fGEum0Y6oQJ74cvAb-qPtk4EmGtl3lDkVZUYM4OwJ-xdg3lC-ZiZKgafTvpXoCpwelX6seCos0xa0zS8gj1UAL-A52fs8LiMNPzNuyojTvx3O5HCsTbyfnu6zQwHi9RZEdlbM-1DrOuBnMymUDkncxn36VmYIzQK4gWS2G63yqdYrfI2jO2Sg1341dzuiXqSIZbjmy8aStkaHv2w5zze0diAal4WISe9Uyb3hALzDkRkVmJhhwm_VMlkJZCiTXX6tA53LvxUZaQ0BaUqHbEsRa11-wjU_xm0BmWXwT3cnc3a98PaqeJaL7BYvTlZJ4O1CM9ORH6uCrfFFk3Oa6DlP9sFdyzQmxnjdzCrsSzxp0Y0lwniipdvM4Z1Mk90U)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8069af82e7144fa7925874098265fffe&_e=AIu1aRmWQ4Av7HgcQT5ZZi1fKswoM4fidPYwWuQSqk53DzPvHCbyIL07Wk_Q9S93_V6fGEum0Y6oQJ74cvAb-qPtk4EmGtl3lDkVZUYM4OwJ-xdg3lC-ZiZKgafTvpXoCpwelX6seCos0xa0zS8gj1UAL-A52fs8LiMNPzNuyojTvx3O5HCsTbyfnu6zQwHi9RZEdlbM-1DrOuBnMymUDkncxn36VmYIzQK4gWS2G63yqdYrfI2jO2Sg1341dzuiXqSIZbjmy8aStkaHv2w5zze0diAal4WISe9Uyb3hALwHHguktjIydX-09GbESaSk8nUJZ3cC6ubCg3KFBSzjFZXfqxUHUgZ2Pz4PdS80LUwJjYU43UaA00kbJ58p_DwJW2Wk6Py-AOiDZrBc9dNgRKjhLOKmwGGWKK-q5S6VjnQnBmxz6gRH05mMHrvDJLT9)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

| Peter: Our battleground race just shifted into new territory, and I urgently need folks like you by my side to keep up the fight. Here's why:
* FIRST, right-wing super PACs flooded tens of millions of dollars into Georgia to help my opponent, Herschel Walker, win.
* BUT THEN, our people-powered movement fought back against this unprecedented spending and forced our race into a runoff election.
* **NOW, we need all hands on deck to pull ahead and keep Georgia blue. We're looking for 538 more folks to give before our crucial 11:59 p.m. deadline, but time is running out, and we're falling short.**

clean_body: | Peter: Our battleground race just shifted into new territory, and I urgently need folks like you by my side to keep up the fight. Here's why: FIRST, right-wing super PACs flooded tens of millions of dollars into Georgia to help my opponent, Herschel Walker, win. BUT THEN, our people-powered movement fought back against this unprecedented spending and forced our race into a runoff election. NOW, we need all hands on deck to pull ahead and keep Georgia blue. We're looking for 538 more folks to give before our crucial 11:59 p.m. deadline, but time is running out, and we're falling short. So much is at stake, Peter. We got to this point without taking a cent from corporate PACs, and I'm determined to continue this fight the grassroots way. That's why I'm counting on you to pitch in whatever you can at this critical moment. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Raphael Warnock and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | = = = Let's go win this. – Rev. name: Tina Kotek
subject: Grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Tina for Oregon [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TinaForOregon-Logo-FullColor-white.png]
Peter,

We wanted to share a moment of gratitude with you since the Thanksgiving holiday is upon us.

Aimee and I have been reflecting on the campaign journey, and we are blessed with a deep sense of gratitude. We met so many wonderful people over the course of the last year, and we are grateful to each and every one of you. Not only for your support, but for your efforts every day to build a brighter future for your community.

Because of you, we are more confident than ever that we can take on Oregon’s biggest challenges and make a difference for families and communities across our state.

We’re thankful for you today and always. Have a restful and safe Thanksgiving!

— Tina and Aimee

Tina and Aimee smiling [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/Tina_Aimee_TDay.jpeg]
Tina for Oregon
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
tinafororegon.com [https://www.tinafororegon.com/] | info@tinafororegon.com [info@tinafororegon.com]

name: Cindy Cerquitella
subject: I have a secret. Promise not to tell
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941448:6Sq3WCGeN:m:1:3345639852:C23FF402CCA9569AAF3BF58E2C898A52:r)

Hello Peter,

I have a secret to tell you -- just make sure to keep it from the radical Left.

Here it is: **America 's Future has spies inside their organizations. **

And we have people working behind enemy lines in companies like CNN, Google, and TikTok.

My name is Cindy Cerquitella, executive director at America's Future (AF). AF helps young professionals to become effective, lifelong advocates who inspire others to embrace freedom.

You see, America's Future members are young, liberty-minded professionals working to build a freer culture in America.

**And they need your support, Peter.** That's why I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters before the end of the week.

[_**Can you support a student today by chipping in just $25, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941448:6Sq3WCGeN:m:1:3345639852:C23FF402CCA9569AAF3BF58E2C898A52:r)

Many popular conservative and libertarian writers you hear about today were often AF members when they were younger. But that's not all.

**AF members may live across the country and work in different sectors, but they all have one goal in mind: continuing the fight for liberty.**

AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming.

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce.

**America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists. **

We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs.

Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term.

[_**Support a young professional today >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941448:6Sq3WCGeN:m:1:3345639852:C23FF402CCA9569AAF3BF58E2C898A52:r)

By building up lifelong advocates, supporting young leaders, and building robust communities that believe in freedom, America's Future can turn the tide where it matters most.

These brave liberty activists who work behind enemy lines all started at the same point as our new members. But thanks to generous supporters like you, they have moved into leadership positions where they can make a change.

Peter, can you invest in the future of America by supporting an AF member? **Click below to send your gift and help us reach our goal.**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941449:6Sq3WCGeN:m:1:3345639852:C23FF402CCA9569AAF3BF58E2C898A52:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941450:6Sq3WCGeN:m:1:3345639852:C23FF402CCA9569AAF3BF58E2C898A52:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941451:6Sq3WCGeN:m:1:3345639852:C23FF402CCA9569AAF3BF58E2C898A52:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941452:6Sq3WCGeN:m:1:3345639852:C23FF402CCA9569AAF3BF58E2C898A52:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941453:6Sq3WCGeN:m:1:3345639852:C23FF402CCA9569AAF3BF58E2C898A52:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941454:6Sq3WCGeN:m:1:3345639852:C23FF402CCA9569AAF3BF58E2C898A52:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941455:6Sq3WCGeN:m:1:3345639852:C23FF402CCA9569AAF3BF58E2C898A52:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61941448:6Sq3WCGeN:m:1:3345639852:C23FF402CCA9569AAF3BF58E2C898A52:r)

Thank you,

Cindy Cerquitella
Executive Director
America's Future

Since 1995, America's Future has been the premier nationwide network of liberty-minded young leaders, providing unique opportunities to learn the ideas of liberty and develop the skills necessary to articulate them.
