name: Virginia Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: Virginia
body:
We are gearing up for special elections in key states like Virginia and beyond – here’s what you need to know. | | |
---
| | Election Day has come and gone, but we’re not done yet – we have a special election in Virginia in just a handful of weeks that’s the first of Virginia’s 2023 elections! The results of this special election will help inform our 2023 strategy in Virginia and beyond – so we’re laser-focused on flipping this competitive state Senate seat. [ This Virginia special election is just the first of dozens we’re gearing up for next year. **If we win this, it’ll start 2023 off on the right foot for state Democrats.** So can you help us keep up our Democratic momentum and chip in $7 today to elect state Democrats in Virginia and beyond? >> ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wIq45qgM0LGkgd86qa5aoDp-j1ZFUFhGdBoX3mIVs-OCJMPIwPBF5d2OP8TpNrGCtijED_cAX4UVh9QO-3t1xtjTmxfWrNvabzf7inzuymVJvpGMlpJu43RI2Vd7dI5Cxhf9QWdoG58uN-AQELuUf_lsvAPOdLTQPGTT1Mv6BikUeQ9Kz_kzK5ni3xFta0FL0FvqSNLt3SUNPEnJyVi-R4imvT7suK5sImYYUo9xTaMrbvfySJVdbUIQQwvItfNtUphTM1XFa-no6IKcSgVMnTwWPgblXyZ24BWEt9yXZaNZ8XYpe0P3sp_W64KDE8tfITVsD8nQBKQsFt7zvFlx1o3c8bPea2FPFNAPjdBko8hBMBTKj1_D65iESgafRYHF0/3re/4xEu9iJjTiGt_yzL02KvjQ/h0/gUDjVcD487U8athObTIRasF5ctQS8IqhMz9VMfKe1Y8) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: Greg Landsman
subject: It’s been a whirlwind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
| Friend — It’s been just over 2 weeks since we won our race, defeating longtime extremist Chabot, and to say it has been a whirlwind would be an understatement. I attended the first week of Congressional orientation in D.C, where I learned about how to do great constituent services, pursue a legislative agenda, hired staff, and much more!

I was also interviewed on _Meet The Press_ and _PBS Newshour_ , and even made my first appearance in _The Washington Post_ (well, half of me did). But most importantly, I’ve gotten to know legislators on both sides of the aisle, people who want to fight for their constituents. Like them,**I’m ready to get to work for the people of my district, and for children and families across the country.**

I’m ready to get to work for you, friend. So please don’t hesitate to reach out with questions, concerns, or any suggestions to help you get the most out of your representation.

Thank you,

Greg Landsman
Congressman-elect, OH-01
---
| | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. Box 413, Cincinnati, OH 45201
www.landsmanforcongress.com

clean_body: | Friend — It’s been just over 2 weeks since we won our race, defeating longtime extremist Chabot, and to say it has been a whirlwind would be an understatement. I attended the first week of Congressional orientation in D.C, where I learned about how to do great constituent services, pursue a legislative agenda, hired staff, and much more! I was also interviewed on Meet The Press and PBS Newshour , and even made my first appearance in The Washington Post (well, half of me did). But most importantly, I’ve gotten to know legislators on both sides of the aisle, people who want to fight for their constituents. Like them,I’m ready to get to work for the people of my district, and for children and families across the country. I’m ready to get to work for you, friend. So please don’t hesitate to reach out with questions, concerns, or any suggestions to help you get the most out of your representation. Thank you, Greg Landsman Congressman-elect, OH-01 | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. Box 413, Cincinnati, OH 45201 www.landsmanforcongress.com Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and send Greg to Congress, make a=. to receive fewer emails. to update your information. Click here to . | | = =

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
| | | Dear Peter,[**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946620:JrIo7CGNX:m:1:3370555685:08CAB5BCE94A26E6DCD9F475FDDC4EB5:r) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail.Over what?Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.**Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space._And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute)._Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI.Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement).And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans.[**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946620:JrIo7CGNX:m:1:3370555685:08CAB5BCE94A26E6DCD9F475FDDC4EB5:r) Now, I'll cut right to the chase.Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency.If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**.Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.**That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY****LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI.His offer was rejected.Why?**Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** "_We can get to you. We can get to your family._ "That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict.And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap.[**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946620:JrIo7CGNX:m:1:3370555685:08CAB5BCE94A26E6DCD9F475FDDC4EB5:r)The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, _they 'll multiply._So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946620:JrIo7CGNX:m:1:3370555685:08CAB5BCE94A26E6DCD9F475FDDC4EB5:r), before it's too late.For Life,
---
---
Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946620:JrIo7CGNX:m:1:3370555685:08CAB5BCE94A26E6DCD9F475FDDC4EB5:r)
---
P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide).[**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946620:JrIo7CGNX:m:1:3370555685:08CAB5BCE94A26E6DCD9F475FDDC4EB5:r)
---
| | |
---
[ Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946620:JrIo7CGNX:m:1:3370555685:08CAB5BCE94A26E6DCD9F475FDDC4EB5:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946621:JrIo7CGNX:m:1:3370555685:08CAB5BCE94A26E6DCD9F475FDDC4EB5:r)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606[privacy policy](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946622:JrIo7CGNX:m:1:3370555685:08CAB5BCE94A26E6DCD9F475FDDC4EB5:r)

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
| | | Dear Peter,[**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946632:Jik_7CGN5:m:1:3371220873:AC164E2A406C6A3805203A983A9AF736:r) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail.Over what?Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.**Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space._And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute)._Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI.Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement).And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans.[**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946632:Jik_7CGN5:m:1:3371220873:AC164E2A406C6A3805203A983A9AF736:r) Now, I'll cut right to the chase.Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency.If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**.Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.**That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY****LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI.His offer was rejected.Why?**Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** "_We can get to you. We can get to your family._ "That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict.And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap.[**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946632:Jik_7CGN5:m:1:3371220873:AC164E2A406C6A3805203A983A9AF736:r)The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, _they 'll multiply._So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946632:Jik_7CGN5:m:1:3371220873:AC164E2A406C6A3805203A983A9AF736:r), before it's too late.For Life,
---
---
Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946632:Jik_7CGN5:m:1:3371220873:AC164E2A406C6A3805203A983A9AF736:r)
---
P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide).[**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946632:Jik_7CGN5:m:1:3371220873:AC164E2A406C6A3805203A983A9AF736:r)
---
| | |
---
[ Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946632:Jik_7CGN5:m:1:3371220873:AC164E2A406C6A3805203A983A9AF736:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946633:Jik_7CGN5:m:1:3371220873:AC164E2A406C6A3805203A983A9AF736:r)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606[privacy policy](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946634:Jik_7CGN5:m:1:3371220873:AC164E2A406C6A3805203A983A9AF736:r)
---

---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system October 12, 2022.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Count Update: Though Rudy Salas is currently slightly trailing his GOP opponent in the CA-22 District, The Washington Post election model predicts when all the votes are counted that Salas will win! So let's secure this race for Rudy Salas by making sure EVERY VOTE IS COUNTED!!
body:
Make House Republicans miserable
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9610216a-b5ef-4029-8ef1-9e112f56107f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | **_UPDATE :_**** ** Republicans currently have 219 House seats--giving them a three-seat majority--yet, there are a few seats left, and we're in very good shape in most to all of them. _In CA-22, the news is really good. __Though Rudy Salas is currently slightly trailing his GOP opponent, The Washington Post election model predicts when all the votes are counted that Salas will win! So let's secure this race for Rudy Salas by making sure EVERY VOTE IS COUNTED!!_ **[To do this, can you give $5, $10, $25 to Rudy Salas so he can pay staffers and lawyers--the watchdogs--for this effort? Let's take another seat, keep the GOP majority so small they remain in chaos and have an even better Thanksgiving!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5bdef05e-7014-490b-b3f9-02f76b305ff9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_THANK YOU!_**
**_Cliff_** On Sun, Nov 20, 2022 at 10:28 PM Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action <info@mail.blueampaction.com> wrote: Peter, **WE HAVE A FEW RACES LEFT THAT WE MUST DELIVER** **[Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Rudy Salas!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T113bd7ba-e34c-47ca-b31f-cde7f164e2b6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Republicans are now expected to have a 5-7 vote edge in the House. Two of those votes, lunatics Andy Biggs & Matt Gaetz, have promised to will NEVER vote for Kevin McCarthy as leader. 31 voted for Biggs over McCartthy in a leadership contest. And Republican House member, Rep. Don Bacon, who is one of the more normal Republicans, has already floated the idea of power-sharing with Democrats if McCarthy doesn't have the votes._** **__This all adds up to something simple: Every seat we win makes it more likely McCarthy won't be Speaker, the GOP won't be able to agree on any candidate and Democrats can join Bacon and perhaps a half dozen to a dozen sane Republicans to form a power sharing agreement, where progressive legislation we care about can get a vote.__** **_One of the races still outstanding is California's 22nd Congressional District, a seat long held by Democrats, but taken over in 2020 by Republican David Valadao. Democrat Rudy Salas is currently within 4,000 votes with an entire 25% of the vote left to count. A political science professor in the area was quoted saying she expects the race to be decided by 100, maybe 1000 votes at most._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Support the CA-22 count!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9dc32a4d-5b27-4075-9293-29650cb687c4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_We must ensure Salas has the funds for staff & lawyers for what might be another week or two, so every vote is counted, we can take this seat and make it less likely there is a Speaker McCarthy, and more likely a power sharing arrangement that ensures the issues we care about don't get buried._** **[Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Rudy Salas!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc38ad14e-7dea-4497-8234-89ea9c2fd505/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Thank you to all the members of the Blue Amp Action Community who keep showing they intend to take every seat we can._** **_Cliff_**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Donate Now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62d9dfdf-c32f-49ff-908c-6cba3e9b85f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/rudysalascount-6-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4eb77171-dab3-4e90-9d9b-3f500da05696/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

name: Tragic Conclusion in Georgia via VPP
subject: [Raphael Warnock] calling all top Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
The Georgia Senate runoff race is about to end in a tragic conclusion...
| The Georgia Senate runoff race is about to end in a tragic conclusion...

If Democrats don’t step up in the next 8 hours, we will lose our last shot to re-elect Democrats like Sen. Warnock and have an IRONCLAD Senate Majority.

Almost nobody -- NOBODY -- is donating to our ad campaign before our strict deadline. We’re $6,452 short with 8 hours to go. [**_Rush a donation right now to help re-elect Democrats like Sen. Warnock:_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35820?t=6&akid=5458%2E878179%2EQAD_1G) | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35821?t=7&akid=5458%2E878179%2EQAD_1G)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35822?t=8&akid=5458%2E878179%2EQAD_1G)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35823?t=9&akid=5458%2E878179%2EQAD_1G)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35824?t=10&akid=5458%2E878179%2EQAD_1G)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35820?t=11&akid=5458%2E878179%2EQAD_1G)
Listen, hitting this goal is important.

**If we fall short,** Sen. Warnock will lose his runoff race.

**If we fall short,** we’ll have another RAZOR-THIN Senate Majority. President Biden’s agenda will come to a __screeching halt!__

So we desperately need you to do the right thing and rush a donation ASAP.
[**_Your donation will help re-elect Democrats like Sen. Warnock and secure an UNSHAKEABLE Democratic Majority. Rush anything you can right now! »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35820?t=12&akid=5458%2E878179%2EQAD_1G)

Don’t let us down,

VPP

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5458%2E878179%2EQAD_1G). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5458%2E878179%2EQAD_1G).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=5458%2E878179%2EQAD_1G) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=18&akid=5458%2E878179%2EQAD_1G). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=5458%2E878179%2EQAD_1G)

name: Salinas HQ
subject: What issues matter to you? (survey enclosed)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Cavaleri?=
subject: Our Season of Gratitude
body:
Happy Thanksgiving Week from the Cavaleri for Congress Campaign

** Friends of Cavaleri for Congress,
------------------------------------------------------------

As Thanksgiving approaches and the sun sets on the 2022 campaign season, I can’t help but lament on the incredible effort put forth by the members of my team over the past year. This includes campaign staffers, volunteers, donors, voters and everyone else in between. Well over 100,000 of our fellow citizens voted for this campaign, and it’s all due to your unparalleled hard work and generosity.

To every one of you that shared your talent, treasure, and gave up precious family time to work on this campaign: I’m truly in your debt.

When Yankees first baseman Lou Gehrig was diagnosed with terminal cancer and given less than six months to live, two weeks later he addressed a sold-out Yankee stadium and told the fans that he “considered himself to be the luckiest man on the face of this earth.” In what seemed like an odd thing to say, he later explained shortly before his death, how blessed he was to have such an amazing wife and circle of friends during his time on earth; and considered this to be life’s true blessing. He kept a grateful heart until the end.

My friends, this is not an ending, it’s a beginning. God brought us together in this moment of time for His purpose. Our goal always has been, and always will be, to protect and defend God’s gift to humanity, which is the United States of America; and with this endeavor we will never relent.

In closing, we wanted to say thank you and Happy Thanksgiving to you and your family. We are eternally grateful for all of you. We truly are the luckiest people on the face of the earth.
- Vincent, Lilian, and the entire Cavaleri for Congress Team

============================================================
** Campaign Website (https://cavaleriforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4a29b1ba509ec449e66652aec&id=2f76336940&e=4003acec22)

subject: Elections Top 5 - November 2022
body:
|
---
[](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/2zZrMp_w-PMr/UGRwWm1pUWNpZXVVaDJFL1RXVU9ZNVhYUkZ1eS9YeTViMGsvZDZOMnF1cjN2UEl5Nmd6TXhxaGtidGM3YmNBK1dHcWR1V2p6NGdDOGYvYU1ONHJnVDkyR0NoRmJlSks5STdTeTJxN2M4YXc9S0/ZXpXM3VDbEI1bzVybS9JK29lZVZiUWRZeDA0SVJQSTcyYzZBbWp0a201VFlTNldtYWlCZnlzU0paM2IwZVNsWnNWZ29MRWdWbXNxVnZLTitWdDNUUE10enFaQW1lNFVsS0)

| Dear Peter,

Together, we did it! Against long odds, political headwinds, and historical trends, last week, **voters turned out and delivered a clear victory for climate and democracy in the 2022 elections**. Thank you for being part of this effort!

LCV Victory Fund and partners invested more than [$100 million](https://links.messages.lcv.) to elect climate, justice, and pro-democracy leaders at all levels of the ballot this election cycle. We engaged two million Climate Voters, knocked on two million doors, and ran nearly 200 ads to build support for pro-environment candidates across the country. Environmental donors also helped raise a midterm record of $27 million in contributions directly for candidates through GiveGreen, a project of LCV Victory Fund and NRDC Action Votes. In doing so, **we made the difference in close races and helped climate and democracy champions WIN.** Thanks to this work, pro-environment leadership will retain control of the U.S. Senate -- with the Georgia race heading to runoff in December -- and many incumbent and new climate champions will head to Congress. And thanks to the work of our state affiliates, **there was a "green wave" in critical governors, state legislative, and other state and local races across the country** -- an outcome that will expand the landscape for climate and clean energy progress and help protect free and fair elections through 2024.

**These victories didn 't happen by accident**. They are the result of investing strategically to turn out millions of voters, supporting hundreds of pro-environment candidates, and mobilizing thousands of LCV members to volunteer with campaigns.

[**Click here for a brief video on how our movement achieved these historic results, and for a reminder of why we do this work for people and the planet.**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~NwYfDgz0YFX/UGRwWm1pUWNpZXVVaDJFL1RXVU9ZNVhYUkZ1eS9YeTViMGsvZDZOMnF1cjN2UEl5Nmd6TXhxaGtidGM3YmNBK1dHcWR1V2p6NGdDOGYvYU1ONHJnVDkyR0NoRmJlSks5STdTeTJxN2M4YXc9S0/)****
[](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-RewZFv/UGRwWm1pUWNpZXVVaDJFL1RXVU9ZNVhYUkZ1eS9YeTViMGsvZDZOMnF1cjN2UEl5Nmd6TXhxaGtidGM3YmNBK1dHcWR1V2p6NGdDOGYvYU1ONHJnVDkyR0NoRmJlSks5STdTeTJxN2M4YXc9S0/)
**_And now, here are our Top 5 stories from the November 2022 elections:_**
**The Top Story** [**Memo: State Elections Saw a Green Wave in 2022**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVH2RV-jB-/UGRwWm1pUWNpZXVVaDJFL1RXVU9ZNVhYUkZ1eS9YeTViMGsvZDZOMnF1cjN2UEl5Nmd6TXhxaGtidGM3YmNBK1dHcWR1V2p6NGdDOGYvYU1ONHJnVDkyR0NoRmJlSks5STdTeTJxN2M4YXc9S0/ZXpXM3VDbEI1bzVybS9JK29lZVZiUWRZeDA0SVJQSTcyYzZBbWp0a201VFlTNldtYWlCZnlzU0paM2IwZVNsWnNWZ29MRWdWbXNxVnZLTitWdDNUUE10enFaQW1lNFVsS0)
Across the country, state and local leaders who ran on climate action won -- creating a [green wave](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/9zEZM80Yw-Fm/UGRwWm1pUWNpZXVVaDJFL1RXVU9ZNVhYUkZ1eS9YeTViMGsvZDZOMnF1cjN2UEl5Nmd6TXhxaGtidGM3YmNBK1dHcWR1V2p6NGdDOGYvYU1ONHJnVDkyR0NoRmJlSks5STdTeTJxN2M4YXc9S0/ZXpXM3VDbEI1bzVybS9JK29lZVZiUWRZeDA0SVJQSTcyYzZBbWp0a201VFlTNldtYWlCZnlzU0paM2IwZVNsWnNWZ29MRWdWbXNxVnZLTitWdDNUUE10enFaQW1lNFVsS0) that will be critical for continued climate and clean energy progress. With the help of our state affiliates, nearly all of the governors who our movement helped elect in 2018 -- and who have since ensured that more than 40% people in the U.S. now live in places committed to 100% clean energy -- won reelection. Our state affiliates also helped new pro-environment governors win their races in Maryland and Massachusetts.
[](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Pwb7C3pPz_f3/UGRwWm1pUWNpZXVVaDJFL1RXVU9ZNVhYUkZ1eS9YeTViMGsvZDZOMnF1cjN2UEl5Nmd6TXhxaGtidGM3YmNBK1dHcWR1V2p6NGdDOGYvYU1ONHJnVDkyR0NoRmJlSks5STdTeTJxN2M4YXc9S0/ZXpXM3VDbEI1bzVybS9JK29lZVZiUWRZeDA0SVJQSTcyYzZBbWp0a201VFlTNldtYWlCZnlzU0paM2IwZVNsWnNWZ29MRWdWbXNxVnZLTitWdDNUUE10enFaQW1lNFVsS0)

Other critical wins by our state affiliates include **establishing two new pro-climate majorities in state legislatures in Michigan and Minnesota**. These states, along with Maryland and Massachusetts, will have _new_ pro-environment, pro-democracy trifectas -- governor, state senate, and state house -- beginning in 2023.

In 2023, we expect these leaders to advance state policies that will tackle the climate crisis, address environmental justice, and protect and strengthen democracy. Critically, these leaders will also help ensure that the federal investments in the Inflation Reduction Act are implemented equitably to benefit communities hardest hit by pollution.

**_READ_** about the climate and democracy champions who will serve as governors, state legislators, attorney generals, judges, and more [here](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/9zEZM80Yw-Fm/UGRwWm1pUWNpZXVVaDJFL1RXVU9ZNVhYUkZ1eS9YeTViMGsvZDZOMnF1cjN2UEl5Nmd6TXhxaGtidGM3YmNBK1dHcWR1V2p6NGdDOGYvYU1ONHJnVDkyR0NoRmJlSks5STdTeTJxN2M4YXc9S0/ZXpXM3VDbEI1bzVybS9JK29lZVZiUWRZeDA0SVJQSTcyYzZBbWp0a201VFlTNldtYWlCZnlzU0paM2IwZVNsWnNWZ29MRWdWbXNxVnZLTitWdDNUUE10enFaQW1lNFVsS0).
**Rounding out the Top 5**
[We Held Pro-Environment, Pro-Democracy Leadership in the U.S. Senate](https://links.messages.lcv.)

[LCV Action Fund-Endorsed Candidates Head to Congress -- and Make History](https://links.messages.lcv.)

[Defeating the _Dirty Dozen_ and the _Dirty Dozen in the States_](https://links.messages.lcv.)

[Mobilizing LCV Members Through GreenRoots](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/6Lg6B~LDVYsr/UGRwWm1pUWNpZXVVaDJFL1RXVU9ZNVhYUkZ1eS9YeTViMGsvZDZOMnF1cjN2UEl5Nmd6TXhxaGtidGM3YmNBK1dHcWR1V2p6NGdDOGYvYU1ONHJnVDkyR0NoRmJlSks5STdTeTJxN2M4YXc9S0/ZXpXM3VDbEI1bzVybS9JK29lZVZiUWRZeDA0SVJQSTcyYzZBbWp0a201VFlTNldtYWlCZnlzU0paM2IwZVNsWnNWZ29MRWdWbXNxVnZLTitWdDNUUE10enFaQW1lNFVsS0) | | ** **
---
****THE BEST THING YOU CAN DO RIGHT NOW****

[](https://links.messages.lcv.)
The past two years have shown us how challenging it can be to enact climate legislation by the slimmest of pro-environment majority margins. We made history when Congress passed historic climate legislation in 2022, but to truly overcome the threat of climate change, we need to go even bigger.

Next year, we're facing an anti-climate majority in the House, but President Biden has the authority to take executive action right now. He can immediately: 1.) Declare a climate emergency; 2.) Require companies to disclose climate-related risks; and 3.) Strengthen clean air and water protections. **The best thing you can do right now is**[**add your name to tell President Biden: He can and must act on climate now.**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f_-yARfY/UGRwWm1pUWNpZXVVaDJFL1RXVU9ZNVhYUkZ1eS9YeTViMGsvZDZOMnF1cjN2UEl5Nmd6TXhxaGtidGM3YmNBK1dHcWR1V2p6NGdDOGYvYU1ONHJnVDkyR0NoRmJlSks5STdTeTJxN2M4YXc9S0/ZXpXM3VDbEI1bzVybS9JK29lZVZiUWRZeDA0SVJQSTcyYzZBbWp0a201VFlTNldtYWlCZnlzU0paM2IwZVNsWnNWZ29MRWdWbXNxVnZLTitWdDNUUE10enFaQW1lNFVsS0)
**** ****

**Shop Corner**
[](https://links.messages.lcv.)

We cannot have a healthy environment without a functioning democracy. This election cycle, climate voters showed up big time in race after race after race. And because of this, we will have the chance to keep making urgently-needed progress on climate, clean energy, and environmental justice in 2023.

But we can't rest on this success for long, because our work to address the climate crisis is far from over. **With**[**LCV 's Climate Action Now tee**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/G8bxcg3dw_fd/UGRwWm1pUWNpZXVVaDJFL1RXVU9ZNVhYUkZ1eS9YeTViMGsvZDZOMnF1cjN2UEl5Nmd6TXhxaGtidGM3YmNBK1dHcWR1V2p6NGdDOGYvYU1ONHJnVDkyR0NoRmJlSks5STdTeTJxN2M4YXc9S0/ZXpXM3VDbEI1bzVybS9JK29lZVZiUWRZeDA0SVJQSTcyYzZBbWp0a201VFlTNldtYWlCZnlzU0paM2IwZVNsWnNWZ29MRWdWbXNxVnZLTitWdDNUUE10enFaQW1lNFVsS0)**, you can support the movement for safeguarding our air, water, land, and climate future for all. This tee is also available in Women 's cut.**

************ ************
********

---

If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=8933184&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDQxMTg2NAS2&spReportId=MTYyMDQxMTg2NAS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=8933184&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDQxMTg2NAS2&spReportId=MTYyMDQxMTg2NAS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://www.lcv.org/) |

body:
YouTube BANNED Our Video

| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vaccine_injured_woman_speaks&n=1)

# Vaccine Injured Woman Speaks Out
## And YouTube BANNED Our Video with Doctor
**Wednesday, November 23rd, 2022** Friend, We just got BANNED again from YouTube for the great sin of discussing the sudden death phenomenon with a medical doctor. They'll stop at nothing to hide the truth! Luckily for us, Rumble has been a great partner in allowing open dialogue about important topics. So today we sat down with Suzanna who is a COVID vaccine injured woman from St Paul. Her story is fascinating. Joining me in the conversation was Mark Bishofsky who led the "Stop the Mandates" rallies. We also show you what happens when YouTube and Facebook remove content. You won't want to miss this one!
## **WATCH Exclusively on Rumble:**
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/vaccine_injured_woman_speaks_out_and_we_are_banned_on_youtube?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vaccine_injured_woman_speaks&n=2)
# [WATCH NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/vaccine_injured_woman_speaks_out_and_we_are_banned_on_youtube?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vaccine_injured_woman_speaks&n=3)
## **Jake Duesenberg**
**Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vaccine_injured_woman_speaks&n=4 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vaccine_injured_woman_speaks&n=4)

You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vaccine_injured_woman_speaks&n=6).

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
| | | Dear Peter,[**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946637:65J23CGNq:m:1:3372944669:3B78E8E211CD57833E1DBB0BDC7C5E1C:r) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail.Over what?Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.**Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space._And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute)._Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI.Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement).And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans.[**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946637:65J23CGNq:m:1:3372944669:3B78E8E211CD57833E1DBB0BDC7C5E1C:r) Now, I'll cut right to the chase.Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency.If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**.Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.**That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY****LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI.His offer was rejected.Why?**Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** "_We can get to you. We can get to your family._ "That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict.And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap.[**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946637:65J23CGNq:m:1:3372944669:3B78E8E211CD57833E1DBB0BDC7C5E1C:r)The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, _they 'll multiply._So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946637:65J23CGNq:m:1:3372944669:3B78E8E211CD57833E1DBB0BDC7C5E1C:r), before it's too late.For Life,
---
---
Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946637:65J23CGNq:m:1:3372944669:3B78E8E211CD57833E1DBB0BDC7C5E1C:r)
---
P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide).[**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946637:65J23CGNq:m:1:3372944669:3B78E8E211CD57833E1DBB0BDC7C5E1C:r)
---
| | |
---
[ Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946637:65J23CGNq:m:1:3372944669:3B78E8E211CD57833E1DBB0BDC7C5E1C:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946638:65J23CGNq:m:1:3372944669:3B78E8E211CD57833E1DBB0BDC7C5E1C:r)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606[privacy policy](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61946639:65J23CGNq:m:1:3372944669:3B78E8E211CD57833E1DBB0BDC7C5E1C:r)
---

body:

**We’re ready to flip the peach state red, but we’re going to need ALL patriot hands on deck.**

body:
This last seat matters... A LOT. | | | Peter — With just one seat left to be decided, Democrats have secured at least a 50-seat majority in the United States Senate heading into 2023. **But that last seat matters... A LOT.** On December 6th, Georgia voters will head to the polls for a runoff to decide whether to re-elect Senator Raphael Warnock and give Democrats an expanded 51-49 majority in the Senate. **There are so many reasons why this race matters to all of us, and we wanted to take a moment to highlight just a few of them for you.[But before we do: Can you chip in to power WFP’s get-out-the-vote program in Georgia? Every last seat in the Senate matters — and every last vote to re-elect Raphael Warnock on December 6th will matter too.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYULfkBn8kErsOzPEeuScpTvSCnWTRP0Hxw-bfoKad2FqG-gbxbRCYEMUW0XUmlUOfobV4ZUpYLB_37tGV5eDH1yGxben36DYRx2PFYB07o5Y6wO6M8im3p0LWDMS_d7o6TB4lAP5fYUypcCfn1w7TbfYo4FX1XJtaTPKFRf_yzRfpAJLzKHWqDopGXtScNchXbZUQeESLre0B4D3-j1o8ZZ0wSwqVxYBivfp3KwgGPIp0cH8vvB969XrNgZdbnMeOzqMIlomYbfBeFrgFDEcv7dw/3re/k12R_k2XSr65CEhz5thI7g/h0/J_SPdcaOaJG7Wze1XDqLlyjcjxeQHCzbDUEW-mrmRMc)** **[Donate »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYULfkBn8kErsOzPEeuScpTvSCnWTRP0Hxw-bfoKad2FqG-gbxbRCYEMUW0XUmlUOfot-vRaNJhqH9a-a1fE-LO6btefCHsJRGClmD9PMcM0fgfemj0Et4u8EjlPB07zkS8F-WaPuqg2oHaQLBl-Z9NpRke_8y1-Mf7vMfr5UH2r1_198tvtX9vTgQ1tZ1wUq513FJ0i9SZGsKiippDBlS18Hb3aaqj-r79DI-oIyFRqXrBDsAnS-66b-9mJD9jmNY5sUOB1k6DOLYt41jK_wS1Ug/3re/k12R_k2XSr65CEhz5thI7g/h1/PdxBpHaLjtSnHroIUCTLtD6DGvJ2VNBFmm3KdvwZu3k)** Here are five reasons why winning a 51st Senate seat is absolutely critical:
1. **Weakening the leverage of corporate Democrats.**
With a majority of only 50 seats, every single Democratic senator gets to have a veto on any legislation. Over the last two years, Senators like Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema have used their leverage to obstruct the priorities of working people and President Biden’s entire agenda on behalf of their corporate donors. Adding to the Democratic majority makes it less likely they will be able to do so in the future.

2. **More power in Senate committees.**
Senate Democrats have had control for the last two years despite holding only 50 seats because Vice President Harris serves as the tie-breaking vote. But that relies on a power-sharing agreement with Republicans that, among other provisions, gives them equal numbers on committees. Growing the majority to 51-49 would allow Democrats to have actual majorities on Senate committees, which means they would have subpoena power, the power to pursue oversight of things like the January 6th insurrection, and faster confirmations of judges and other nominees.

3. **Historically speaking, 50/50 majorities are uncommon — and unstable.**
The current Senate is the fourth 50/50 split in history, and _already_ the longest-lasting one. In 2001, the Republican 50/50 majority came to an abrupt end after five months when a Republican senator switched parties. It’s not uncommon for a senator to be out of office, but even one senator taking a sick day right now means important votes might not pass. A 51-49 majority would mean votes could pass even with two Democratic absences, and would provide a buffer in the case of unexpected events.

4. **Every Senate seat matters. Always.**
Unlike members of the House of Representatives, senators are elected to 6-year terms. That’s three full election cycles. In previous years, Democrats have failed to win closely contested races for Senate, putting them at even more of a disadvantage than they already were in an institution that allocates as many seats to low-population, largely rural states as it does to high-population ones. This seat matters just not for the next two years, but for years and years to come — including in 2024 when Democrats will face a much more challenging senate map.

5. **Herschel Walker... really?**
Herschel Walker is a uniquely unqualified candidate for office. He has a history of violence against women. He supports a national ban on abortion for everyone — except the privileged few like himself and his partners. If it wasn’t for his support for the MAGA right wing agenda and his promise to deliver for his corporate donors, he wouldn’t be anywhere close to the senate. We can’t allow him to win.

**All of this is why we are asking for your help to reach and mobilize every voter in Georgia from now until December 6th.[Will you make a $4 donation today to help us get out the vote on the ground in Georgia?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYULfkBn8kErsOzPEeuScpTvSCnWTRP0Hxw-bfoKad2FqFhRELqMeFtNrakcZpeZTv-yPgAspS5Zrx1pIG0R5AvPmZ3898rfwHgmEbIN3MIGmAN_MsFv_WqWyY-1g_7xEz8Ke8REYhOD-VQrAhBU21HFcod1xdrXYCt5Wtl1aSdCSMRo-mVaffU-S-bnl4SqAYpSMxbX1toFQ5zxSpDMQnatM409Ri9mExtg5GK34VDvseiYzqMC5aniHuKXGnKhzBi3Q-Qdsg-hFvLQEK4_HGCqQ/3re/k12R_k2XSr65CEhz5thI7g/h2/_Oft8JIn1jR_DOrf-mQPMp3sVKG5KhAeA7jZ7zSU4Ac)** clean_body: This last seat matters... A LOT. | | | Peter — With just one seat left to be decided, Democrats have secured at least a 50-seat majority in the United States Senate heading into 2023. But that last seat matters... A LOT. On December 6th, Georgia voters will head to the polls for a runoff to decide whether to re-elect Senator Raphael Warnock and give Democrats an expanded 51-49 majority in the Senate. There are so many reasons why this race matters to all of us, and we wanted to take a moment to highlight just a few of them for you. Here are five reasons why winning a 51st Senate seat is absolutely critical: 1. Weakening the leverage of corporate Democrats. With a majority of only 50 seats, every single Democratic senator gets to have a veto on any legislation. Over the last two years, Senators like Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema have used their leverage to obstruct the priorities of working people and President Biden’s entire agenda on behalf of their corporate donors. Adding to the Democratic majority makes it less likely they will be able to do so in the future. 2. More power in Senate committees. Senate Democrats have had control for the last two years despite holding only 50 seats because Vice President Harris serves as the tie-breaking vote. But that relies on a power-sharing agreement with Republicans that, among other provisions, gives them equal numbers on committees. Growing the majority to 51-49 would allow Democrats to have actual majorities on Senate committees, which means they would have subpoena power, the power to pursue oversight of things like the January 6th insurrection, and faster confirmations of judges and other nominees. 3. Historically speaking, 50/50 majorities are uncommon — and unstable. The current Senate is the fourth 50/50 split in history, and already the longest-lasting one. In 2001, the Republican 50/50 majority came to an abrupt end after five months when a Republican senator switched parties. It’s not uncommon for a senator to be out of office, but even one senator taking a sick day right now means important votes might not pass. A 51-49 majority would mean votes could pass even with two Democratic absences, and would provide a buffer in the case of unexpected events. 4. Every Senate seat matters. Always. Unlike members of the House of Representatives, senators are elected to 6-year terms. That’s three full election cycles. In previous years, Democrats have failed to win closely contested races for Senate, putting them at even more of a disadvantage than they already were in an institution that allocates as many seats to low-population, largely rural states as it does to high-population ones. This seat matters just not for the next two years, but for years and years to come — including in 2024 when Democrats will face a much more challenging senate map. 5. Herschel Walker... really? Herschel Walker is a uniquely unqualified candidate for office. He has a history of violence against women. He supports a national ban on abortion for everyone — except the privileged few like himself and his partners. If it wasn’t for his support for the MAGA right wing agenda and his promise to deliver for his corporate donors, he wouldn’t be anywhere close to the senate. We can’t allow him to win. All of this is why we are asking for your help to reach and mobilize every voter in Georgia from now until December 6th. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to you?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947940:JfGW3CG3N:m:1:3373497171:F5C5CB5DC3C9DCF77E4729979F991D88:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947940:JfGW3CG3N:m:1:3373497171:F5C5CB5DC3C9DCF77E4729979F991D88:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947940:JfGW3CG3N:m:1:3373497171:F5C5CB5DC3C9DCF77E4729979F991D88:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61947940:JfGW3CG3N:m:1:3373497171:F5C5CB5DC3C9DCF77E4729979F991D88:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator
